Name: Bilfinger België & Nederland
Description:
Bilfinger is de toonaangevende partner in België en Nederland voor innovatieve industriële dienstverlening. Met bijna 5.000 vakmensen bieden we een breed scala aan oplossingen om de efficiëntie, veiligheid en duurzaamheid van uw processen te verbeteren.

Onze expertise beslaat de volledige levenscyclus van uw assets: van engineering en advies tot bouw, onderhoud en optimalisatie. Of het nu gaat om piping & mechanical, electrical, instrumentation & control (EI&C), of gespecialiseerde diensten zoals isolatie, steigerbouw en painting (ISP), wij staan voor klaar met op maat gemaakte oplossingen.

Bilfinger streeft ernaar de nummer één partner te zijn voor het verhogen van de efficiëntie en duurzaamheid van bedrijfsprocessen. We werken nauw samen met onze klanten om innovatieve en toekomstbestendige oplossingen te leveren, met als doel duurzame waarde te creëren.

Dankzij onze lokale aanwezigheid, uitgebreid dienstenportfolio en diepgaande kennis van de markt kunnen we snel inspelen op uw specifieke behoeften en bieden we betrouwbare ondersteuning, ongeacht de complexiteit van een project. Samen zetten we de volgende stap naar een duurzame toekomst.

Name: Quant Service
Description:
We are Quant – your maintenance partner.

For many industrial companies, maintenance has traditionally been about fixing machines when they fail. At Quant, we take a more proactive approach. We are your reliable maintenance partner, focused on keeping your equipment running efficiently.

Our flexible maintenance solutions combine the expertise of our professionals with proven processes and advanced digital tools. This approach ensures smoother production, minimizes downtime, and optimizes efficiency. By predicting failures before they occur, we help extend the life of your equipment and provide maintenance that aligns with your production goals in a sustainable, cost-effective manner.

For more than 35 years, Quant has been a market leader in this field, maintaining and improving the safety, production and equipment performance for over 400 facilities worldwide. Quant employs 2,200 people and operates in 12 counties across Europe, Middle East, and the Americas.

We know that effective maintenance is vital for long-term success. Let’s partner to unlock the full potential of your operations!

Name: SDT Ultrasound Solutions
Description:
Pioneering Excellence & Advancements in Predictive Maintenance, Reliability, and Condition Monitoring.

At SDT Ultrasound Solutions, we enable our customers to achieve their operational objectives by improving the reliability of their assets.

We've been supporting industry with our advanced ultrasound predictive maintenance solutions for over 50 years; Promoting more reliable, sustainable, and safe manufacturing processes and empowering maintenance and reliability teams to better understand the health of their most critical production assets. 

SDT's Ultrasound Condition Monitoring, Vibration Analysis, and Acoustic Imaging Devices provide maintenance and reliability teams with advanced warning signs of equipment defects giving them the means to anticipate production asset failures, control energy costs and improve profitability by preventing unplanned downtime.

Enhance your condition monitoring capabilities with SDT’s Ultrasound Solutions and gain an enormous advantage over competitors who still employ a run-to-failure asset management strategy.

Join our ultrasonic community here on LinkedIn, and never hesitate to reach out to us if you want to #HearMore!

#ConditionMonitoring #Maintenance #Reliability #PredictiveMaintenance

Name: MaxGrip
Description:
TRUSTED ADVISORS IN ASSET PERFORMANCE MANAGEMENT

MaxGrippers are the trusted advisors in Asset Performance Management (APM). MaxGrip was founded in the Netherlands over 25 years ago. Since then, we have grown into an internationally renowned consultancy firm in APM, including maintenance and integrity management. Our clients are market leaders in industries like Manufacturing, FMCG, Pharmaceuticals, Power Generation & Distribution, Oil & Gas, Water & Wastewater and Metals & Mining. 

Our consultants combine domain expertise with experience in realizing change to get the job done. They help industry leaders improve their asset performance with our well-known Asset Improvement Program, we deploy EAM systems and our consultants fill positions when companies are short on essential staff. MaxGrip also helps customers to take the next steps in their digital transformation by deploying, for example, connected frontline worker and predictive maintenance solutions. 

Around the globe and together with our clients, we resolve the asset management challenges of today and tomorrow. We operate on all continents and have a global presence with three main offices in the Netherlands (Utrecht), USA (Houston) and Malaysia (Kuala Lumpur).

Name: Actemium Spain
Description:
Mejorando el rendimiento industrial

Actemium, la marca industrial de VINCI Energies, ofrece soluciones y servicios a medida a sus clientes en 40 países. Su red multidisciplinaria combina la experiencia de 440 unidades locales con un enfoque global para crear valor a lo largo de todo el ciclo de vida industrial. En 2024, la red generó 4 mil millones de euros en actividad.

Los 25,000 expertos de Actemium comparten, junto a sus clientes, la firme convicción de que la industria es clave para construir un mundo sostenible y se esfuerzan por hacer una contribución positiva al rendimiento global.

Las soluciones de Actemium van desde el mantenimiento hasta la ingeniería y el movimiento de máquinas en múltiples sectores: aeronáutica, automoción, logística, química y agroalimentaria. 

Además, Actemium es líder en el mercado español y referente a nivel internacional en equipos de manutención para la industria del automóvil. La misión de Actemium es conseguir que nuestros clientes sean más competitivos y que el rendimiento industrial de sus fábricas sea superior, ofreciendo soluciones multidisciplinares, seguras y sostenibles para todo el ciclo de vida industrial. 

Los proyectos “llave en mano” desarrollados por Actemium van desde la adaptación de la Industria 4.0 hasta la eficiencia energética, ciberseguridad y sistemas MES.

Atualmente, atendemos clientes em todo o país e estamos sempre buscando novas oportunidades para expandir nossos negócios. Estamos comprometidos em fornecer aos nossos clientes um serviço excepcional e acreditamos que a confiança é a base de todo relacionamento de negócios e é por isso que nos esforçamos para construir uma relação confiável e comprometida com a excelência para que seja atendida às necessidades e as expectativas de nossos clientes.

Name: Fives Maintenance
Description:

— Élaboration de Plan de Maintenance
Préventive (PMP) et de Plans de progrès
— Rédaction de gammes, process et
modes opératoires
— Utilisation et déploiement de solutions GMAO
— Réalisation d’audits fonctionnels et de maîtrise opérationnelle
— Mise en place d’indicateurs de performances technique et économique

Fives peut aussi prendre en charge la maintenance des infrastructures de ses clients dans le cadre d’une synergie avec le contrat à obligation de résultats.

Parce que Fives fait de la sécurité des hommes et du respect de l’environnement une priorité absolue, nous sommes engagés dans une démarche d’amélioration continue et disposons de certifications
dans le cadre de notre système de management QSSE.

With 158 years of history, AVS is one of the leading innovators in its industry's realm. AVS is a symbol of experience, stability, steady growth and a forward looking management style. Over the years, we have had the pleasure of representing a host of global organizations in Pakistan and continue to do so today. Cognizance of market needs in today's dynamic economic sphere, business foresight, entrepreneurship, organizational stability and vision have contributed to customer satisfaction, an ever expanding client base and a prominent position in the market. AVS is known as a corporation that makes a difference, keeping up tradition with innovation. 

AVS Methodology

At AVS, our central focus is to ensure that all our clients requirements are met. The clients needs are reassured at every stage of the process to guarantee satisfaction. This method allows us to have a flexible development process which can be catered to meet each unique clients needs. 

Quick Glance at AVS

AVS was established in 1867 in Karachi, in the then undivided subcontinent. Initially AVS dealt with
 the supply of light engineering products. Over the years, the product line gradually increased and coverage also began to expand beyond Karachi. The founding fathers and subsequent generations have since then made their mark on the country's industrial progress by their entrepreneurship and innovative business activities.

Name: Pred Engenharia
Description:
A Pred Engenharia é uma provedora de soluções para gestão de ativos e processos com foco na garantia da segurança, confiabilidade e produtividade das atividades, atuando na indústria e área de serviços desde 1993. Suas inovadoras soluções são fornecidas ao mercado através de três área de negócios: Serviços Técnicos, Tecnologia de Informação e Automação Industrial.

•Na área de Serviços Técnicos, atua com inspeção preditiva, consultoria em engenharia de manutenção e treinamento técnico.

•Em Tecnologia da Informação, dispõe de uma plataforma chamada S3i (Sistema Inteligente de Inspeções Industriais), que de forma pioneira usa desde 2002 dispositivos móveis de forma rastreável, inteligente e integrada à ERP/EAM, como IBM Maximo, Infor, Oracle JDE, SAP e Totvs.

•Na área de Automação Industrial provê soluções de monitoramento térmico com termografia infravermelha para melhoria da segurança, qualidade e custo em processos críticos.

Name: ARGICO, SAS
Description: Somos una empresa dedicada a la distribución exclusiva, venta y respaldo total de los motores diesel CUMMINS, asi como la distribución de los generadores eléctricos, transfer switches y sistema de sincronización de la prestigiosa marca Cummins Power Generation. En la actualidad seguimos en constante crecimiento. Hemos ampliado nuestras representaciones con excelentes líneas: Aire Comprimido con la exclusividad de la prestigiosa línea Atlas Copco Compressors, Plataformas Aéreas con JLG, Montacargas, Manipuladores Telescópicos con SkyTrak, Plataformas y Elevadores de construcción y Perforadoras y Equipos.

Name: Terra Cat
Description:
We are a business built on solid ground, with 90 years of experience and a real connection to the people we work with. We supply a full range of Cat equipment, services and technology solutions, powered by people to drive tailored business solutions, enabling our customers to be safe, sustainable, productive and profitable. We call it power on the ground. 

Our genuine Cat equipment is available new, used, or to rent, with premium parts and service support. Terra Cat has a national network of 18 facilities including 14 branches from Whangarei to Invercargill and more than 200 expert technicians.

Name: CE Power
Description:
Qualus is a leading pure-play power services firm and innovator at the forefront of the energy transition and transformation, with differentiated capabilities across grid modernization, resiliency, security, and sustainability. The firm partners with utilities, commercial, industrial, data center, and government clients, and renewable and energy storage developers, offering comprehensive solutions through boutique and integrated advisory, planning, engineering, digital solutions, program management, and specialized field services. Qualus also provides software and technology enabled services and develops breakthrough solutions for critical power industry challenges such as distributed and variable resource integration, emergency management, and secure data exchange. The firm has nearly 1,600 professionals, with offices throughout the U.S. and Canada.

Name: EMF İŞ MAKİNALARI SAN. TİC. LTD. ŞTİ.
Description:
EMF İş Makineleri 2010 yılının ilk çeyreğinde İstanbul’da kurularak SIFIR SATIŞ , İKİNCİ EL SATIŞ, KİRALAMA ve SERVİS HİZMETLERİ alanlarında faaliyet göstermeye başlamıştır. 2010 yılından günümüze kadar çalışmalarına hiç durmadan  devam etmektedir. Biz kurumsal bir grubun parçası olarak büyük başarıların ancak takım oyunuyla kazanılabileceğine inanarak takımımıza güveniyoruz sizlere daha iyi hizmet verebilmek için sürekli yenileniyoruz. 


Güvenilir, etkin, paylaşımcı çalışma anlayışımız ile sizlere sunduğumuz hizmetlerin en iyi olduğunu ve hizmetin bu adreste yapıldığını sizlere hissettirmek için çaba sarf ediyoruz İstanbul Avrupa yakasından Edirne’ye kadar olan bölgede satış – servis - yedek parça - kiralama faaliyetleri alanlarında siz değerli müşterilerimize hizmet vermekten mutluluk duyuyoruz.


İSTANBUL/Esenyurt yerleşkemizde 800 m² kapalı alanımızda ,  TEKİRDAĞ/Çerkezköy yerleşkesinde 1.700 m² kapalı 500 m² açık alanımızda sıfır, ikinci el araçlarımızı sergilediğimiz Showroom'larımızı ve servis alanlarımızı ziyaret etmenizi bekliyor, siz değerli müşterilerimizi ve dostlarımızı misafir etmekten mutluluk duyuyor olacağız.

Name: ABC Drives
Description:
Há 20 anos, a ABC Drives transforma desafios da automação industrial em resultados concretos. 

Do projeto à manutenção corretiva e preventiva, passando pelo fornecimento de peças de alta qualidade e consultoria técnica, nosso compromisso é entregar eficiência, confiabilidade e inovação para indústrias de todo o Brasil.

Nosso time de especialistas é preparado para indicar soluções sob medida, sempre em conformidade com as normas de segurança e com a agilidade necessária para lidar com as manutenções mais complexas.

Em nosso Centro Especializado de Manutenção, contamos com Laboratório de Testes, simuladores e tecnologias avançadas, capazes de garantir o máximo desempenho de equipamentos, sejam eles de atuais ou já considerados obsoletos.

Na ABC Drives, inovação e excelência caminham juntas para manter sua operação sempre em movimento.

Name: ENGINEERING MV
Description:
Engineering MV, située à Saint-Ouen-l’Aumône, est spécialisée dans l’installation et la maintenance des équipements haute tension (HTA) et des tableaux généraux basse tension (TGBT). ￼

Parmi les services proposés :
	•	Retrofit de relais de protection : mise à jour et modernisation des systèmes de protection électrique.
	•	Maintenance haute tension et TGBT : entretien préventif et correctif des installations pour assurer leur performance et leur sécurité.
	•	Montage et mise en service : installation complète des équipements électriques et leur mise en fonctionnement.
	•	Supervision : surveillance des systèmes pour optimiser leur fonctionnement et anticiper les défaillances.
	•	Formations : programmes éducatifs pour former le personnel à la gestion et à l’entretien des équipements électriques.
	•	Astreinte haute tension : service d’urgence disponible 24h/24 pour intervenir rapidement en cas de problème.

L’entreprise propose également une gamme de produits tels que des cellules haute tension, des transformateurs, des groupes électrogènes et des postes préfabriqués. ￼

Avec plus de 15 ans d’expérience, Engineering MV se positionne comme un partenaire de confiance pour les projets électriques industriels, garantissant performance et sécurité des installations. ￼

Name: Eastern Lift Truck Co., Inc.
Description:
Eastern Lift Truck Co., Inc. was founded in 1971 with a singular but powerful goal:  become the best material handling equipment service provider in the industry! As a family-owned business, our core values include loyalty, honesty, respect, and pride in our work. We pursue excellence in all that we do and strive to keep our core values front and center. These values define us and what it means to be a good service provider to our customers.
Today, 50+ years since our founding, we are proud to be recognized as one of the premier service providers in the Northeast and one of the most successful dealerships in the United States.

Eastern Lift Truck Co. is headquartered in Maple Shade, NJ, and operates more than 20 locations to serve businesses throughout the Mid-Atlantic region including Delaware, Maryland, New Jersey, Southeastern New York, Central and Eastern Pennsylvania, Northern Virginia, the "panhandle" of West Virginia and our nation's capital, Washington, DC.

The Company is involved in the local communities it serves and has been awarded the Yale “Dealer of Excellence," Hyster “Dealer of Distinction, Combilift “Dealer of Excellence,” Material Handling Equipment Distributor Association’s “Most Valuable Partner,” and Steel King's Excalibur Premier Dealer Award.

Name: TRASER Electromechanical Services
Description:
TRASER Transformer Service Electromechanical Maintenance San. A.Ş. was established in 2004, specializing in transformer services including field assembly, oil filling, testing, commissioning, and maintenance. Since its founding, TRASER has successfully provided turnkey installation, vacuum processes, oil filling, testing, commissioning, maintenance, and supervision for over 2000 power transformers both domestically and internationally. Its international projects span Denmark, Germany, France, Spain, Greece, Romania, Sweden, Morocco, Tunisia, Algeria, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, and other regions across Africa and the Middle East.

Over time, TRASER expanded its expertise to include the supply, installation, testing, and maintenance of HV/MV/LV switchyard equipment. Additionally, the company proudly manufactures oil treatment units with a 100% domestically engineered design.

TRASER serves globally renowned transformer manufacturers such as GE, Siemens, Hitachi, ABB, Sonmez, and Astor, along with numerous contractors and industrial organizations worldwide. Beyond reliable turnkey project execution and supervision, TRASER provides consultancy and specialized expertise through its experienced technical team, positioning itself as a trusted solution partner.

As of January 2025, Maschinenfabrik Reinhausen (MR) has become the majority shareholder of TRASER, integrating TRASER into the Reinhausen Group. This strategic partnership enhances TRASER's competencies, significantly elevating its global service capabilities and network.

Committed to excellence, environmental sustainability, quality, and occupational safety, TRASER holds multiple internationally recognized certifications acquired consistently since 2012.

Name: B&T Group
Description: B&T Group started its journey in the year 2000 as Contech Construction Ltd, founded by the visionary entrepreneur Engr. Moklesur Rahman. Contech Construction Ltd. is the leading supplier of spun pre-stessed concrete poles and piles in Bangladesh. Under the leaderhsip of the founding chairman, we expanded our operations and established a new factory named Pre Stressed Poles Ltd. in the year 2004 to meet the ever-increasing demand for our products. B&T Group has always been forwarded thinking with a view to diversify into other markets and thus B&T Cables Ltd. was established in the year 2005 to supply electric cables. Continuing our impressive track record of supplying high quality and afforable products, we expanded into the logistics market with B&T Cold Storage Ltd. Our cold storage facilities provide an affordable way for Bangladesi farmers to store their perishables in fully climate controlled and weather proof facilites. Now we are known as B&T Group, the Best & Trusted conglomerate in Bangladesh and our flagship investment is in B&T Development Ltd, a pioneer in the civil housing market in Bangladesh. Our future proects in the pipeline include B&T Poles Ltd to expand our pole production capacity and and B&T Knitwear Ltd. with a vision to be the highest quality knitwear and apparel manufacturer in Bangladesh.

Onze klanten vertrouwen ons al vele jaren met proces kritische technologie, zoals datacenters, productielijnen, MCC’s, drives, laag-, midden- en hoogspanningsinstallaties. Proteam Temizlik Hizmetleri A.Ş., Türkiye genelinde faaliyet gösteren, endüstriyel temizlik, kurumsal temizlik ve destek hizmetleri alanında uzmanlaşmış bir hizmet sağlayıcısıdır. Temizlik sektöründeki uzun yıllara dayanan tecrübemizle, üretim tesislerinden ofislere, lojistik merkezlerinden alışveriş merkezlerine kadar geniş bir yelpazede hizmet sunmaktayız.

Şirketimizin temel amacı; hijyen, iş güvenliği ve operasyonel verimlilik konularında yüksek standartlarda çözümler sunarak iş ortaklarımıza değer katmaktır. Profesyonel kadromuzla sadece temizlik hizmeti değil; aynı zamanda geçici ve sürekli personel temini, mekanik temizlik çözümleri, fabrika içi bakım destek hizmetleri ve fuar / etkinlik personeli temini gibi çeşitli alanlarda da hizmet vermekteyiz.

İstanbul merkezli olarak kurulan firmamız, 2022 itibarıyla İzmir şubesini açarak operasyon ağını genişletmiştir. Bugüne kadar 12.000’den fazla başarılı proje gerçekleştirdik ve sektörün öncü markalarıyla çalışmanın gururunu taşıyoruz.

Çalışanlarımızın sürekli eğitimi, saha denetimleri ve kalite kontrol süreçleri ile maksimum müşteri memnuniyeti hedeflenmektedir.

Hizmet verdiğimiz sektörler:
• Rafineri ve petrokimya tesisleri
• Lojistik ve dağıtım merkezleri
• Fabrikalar ve üretim sahaları
• Alışveriş merkezleri
• Kamu ve özel sektör ofisleri
• Oteller ve hastaneler

Referanslarımız arasında: Arçelik, Boyner, Samsung, Nike, Netflix ve diğer prestijli markalar yer almaktadır.

Proteam olarak her projeye özel bir yaklaşım geliştiriyor, müşterilerimizin operasyonel süreçlerine uyum sağlayacak çözümler üretiyoruz. Sadece temizlik değil; işinize değer katan bir hizmet ortağı olmayı hedefliyoruz.

VORES VÆRDIER UDGØR HJØRNESTENENE I VORES VIRKSOMHEDSFILOSOFI.
DE GUIDER OS I ALT, HVAD VI GØR.

INTEGRITET
Integritet er vores fundament. Vi forpligter os til ærlighed, ansvarlighed og etik i alle vores handlinger og beslutninger. Vi opretholder det højeste niveau af troværdighed i vores forhold til kunder, samarbejdspartnere og kolleger.

KVALITET
Kvalitet er kernen i vores arbejde. Vi stræber altid efter at levere produkter og tjenester af højeste kvalitet, der opfylder eller overgår vores kunders forventninger. Vores dedikation til kvalitet er afgørende for vores succes.

SAMARBEJDE
Samarbejde er vores styrke. Vi værdsætter og fremmer samarbejde på tværs af vores virksomhed og med vores kunder. Vi tror på, at det er gennem samarbejde, at vi opnår de bedste resultater og skaber værdi for vores kunder.

INNOVATION
Innovation er en drivkraft bag vores udvikling. Vi er passionerede omkring at udfordre det eksisterende og stræber efter forbedring og nyskabelse. Ved at være åbne for nye idéer og teknologier forbliver vi konkurrencedygtige og relevante.

FOREBYGGELSE
Forebyggelse er vores forpligtelse til at minimere risici og skabe driftsikker produktion hos vores kunder. Vi tager ansvar for at identificere og reducere potentielle farer, og vi arbejder proaktivt for at forhindre problemer, før de opstår. Sikkerhed er altafgørende for os, både for vores medarbejdere og vores kunder.

Vores værdier er ikke kun ord, men en integreret del af vores daglige arbejde. De guider os i at opbygge stærke relationer, levere enestående kvalitet og forblive innovative i en stadigt skiftende verden.

En cas d’urgence, nous intervenons rapidement pour limiter les interruptions de service et rétablir vos installations.
 
Nos solutions favorisent des approches économiques et écologiques grâce à la restauration des transformateurs, au remplacement des équipements défectueux et à l’adaptation aux normes. Nous réalisons également des études et coordonnons des projets comme le remplacement de tableaux HTA, de câbles ou de disjoncteurs, tout en assurant leur mise en conformité.
 
MRA garantit un accompagnement sur mesure pour optimiser vos installations électriques.

Name: Autogenics Automation
Description:
Autogenics Automation is a leading provider of industrial automation solutions, specializing in smart technologies that enhance safety, security, efficiency, and quality across various industries. Our core expertise lies in advanced computer vision, robotics, and automation systems designed to help businesses operate smarter, safer, and more effectively.

At the center of our product portfolio is Nexa, a locally developed computer vision platform that addresses the critical pillars of modern industrial operations: Safety, Security, and Quality. Nexa uses artificial intelligence to monitor real-time video streams, detecting unsafe behaviors, unauthorized access, and quality deviations. By providing instant alerts and actionable insights, Nexa empowers companies to prevent accidents, secure assets, and maintain high production standards.

One of the key advantages of our solutions is their focus on data security. Unlike many cloud-dependent systems, all Autogenics Automation solutions run on local servers, ensuring that no video or sensitive data is streamed to the cloud. This protects clients from cyber threats, preserves data confidentiality, and provides full ownership and control over operational data.

In addition to Nexa, we offer a broad range of automation technologies tailored to diverse industrial needs:

Smart Surveillance Systems: These systems detect unsafe employee behaviors and policy violations in real time. They help enforce safety standards, reduce workplace incidents, and promote a culture of compliance.

Blind Spot Detection Systems: Designed to improve operator awareness around heavy machinery and vehicles, these systems detect objects or personnel in blind zones, sending timely alerts that prevent collisions and injuries.

AGVs (Automated Guided Vehicles): Our AGVs automate internal material transport and logistics processes.

Name: Forum Vision Instandhaltung e.V.
Description:
FVI – DAS EXPERTENNETZWERK DER INDUSTRIELLEN INSTANDHALTUNG 
Das FVI als Netzwerk der industriellen Instandhaltung verfolgt das Ziel, gemeinsam mit allen Mitgliedern Ideen zu entwickeln und voranzubringen, die für die gesamte Themenpalette der Instandhaltung zukunftsweisende und praxisorientierte Lösungen bieten. Die Basis unserer Tätigkeit bildet der intensive Informationsaustausch und Wissenstransfer zwischen Forschung und Praxis. Wir wollen das aktuelle Know-how der Instandhaltung in einem Wissenspool bündeln und ein Forum für den Erfahrungsaustausch schaffen. 

GEMEINSAM DIE ZUKUNFT GESTALTEN 
Die professionelle Instandhaltung ist ein entscheidender Faktor für die Maschinenverfügbarkeit und den wirtschaftlichen Erfolg eines Unternehmens. Mit unseren Arbeitskreisen, Events und Netzwerktreffen bieten wir unseren Mitgliedern aus den unterschiedlichsten Branchen die Chance, gemeinsam über die Möglichkeiten und Potenziale der Instandhaltung zu diskutieren und neue Wege der Optimierung zu beschreiten. Unsere Veranstaltungen sind Diskussions- und Informationsforen von Fachleuten für Fachleute. 

DIE ZUKUNFT IM BLICK 
Gerade im Bereich der Instandhaltung spielt das Thema Innovation eine tragende Rolle. Für die Praktiker ist es umso wichtiger, schnell und ungefiltert an die für sie relevanten Informationen zu gelangen. Hierbei versteht sich das FVI als Schnittstelle der verschiedenen Branchenakteure. Wir sorgen dafür, dass Sie schnell und zuverlässig auf dem Laufenden sind, um Ihre Instandhaltungsprozesse sicher und effizient umsetzen zu können. 

INNOVATION
Eine unserer wichtigsten Aufgaben ist der Know-how-Transfer zwischen Forschung und Praxis. Wir ermöglichen unseren Mitgliedern einen unkomplizierten, direkten Kontakt zueinander. Von den sich daraus ergebenden Synergien profitieren alle Seiten - Forschung und Unternehmen, Start-ups und etablierte Branchenpartner.

Name: Pragmatic Maintenance & Reliability Ltd
Description:
We aim to be the best-value Predictive Maintenance & Condition Monitoring service provider in the UK. Our approach is to listen closely to clients, to understand and meet their needs through the right mix of consultancy, services and products. We tailor all our solutions to individual client requirements.

We provide both routine monitoring services and one off, in-depth machinery investigations. We can provide services on-site or remotely with a global reach. The focus of our routine services is not only to find machinery and maintenance problems for clients, but to help fix them once and for all. We work with a wide range of clients - other service providers, major machinery OEM's, blue chip companies, government agencies and small manufacturers.

We have in-depth knowledge and experience of a wide range of industries and machinery, and are equipped for almost any machinery vibration / reliability investigation. Past projects have included balancing a 787 tonne flywheel, troubleshooting gas compressors and generation sets in offshore service, solving resonance problems in large fume extraction fans, designing vibration absorbers, solving pipework vibration problems and forensic examination of failed equipment ranging from gas turbine oil pumps to bearings in a food manufacturer's oven conveyor. 

Contact us whatever your Predictive Maintenance / Condition Monitoring needs and we'll try to help you as best we can. We're ready to listen to you and see how we can help.

#conditionmonitoring #assethealth #predictivemaintenance #engineering

We appreciate the crucial role that TRUMPF lasers play in your business therefore we’ve tailored our services for you. We can reduce your downtime and costs as many breakdowns can be fixed quickly via phone support or remote diagnostics.

Above all, HillTech have the only TruDisk level 3 trained independent engineer in the UK.

Description:
TAMAMOUL is a Djiboutian company that provides turnkey industrial maintenance solutions for ports, transport and logistics companies, factories, construction companies, administrations and individuals.

 But local businesses and administrations cannot find a solid partner locally who can enable them to maintain this high rate of development by providing them with a quality maintenance service. helping to ensure business continuity.

 OUR PROMISE : to do everything possible to ensure the continuity of port, industrial, logistics, health and construction activities that contribute to the economic development of our country and the entire sub-region.

Name: Templa Soluções Industriais
Description:
Templa Soluções Industriais: Excelência e Sustentabilidade em Manutenção Industrial

Com mais de 28 anos de experiência do nosso fundador, a Templa Soluções Industriais é sinônimo de excelência, confiabilidade e inovação. Acreditamos que a manutenção industrial é uma ferramenta estratégica para a sustentabilidade. Ao otimizar o desempenho de máquinas e equipamentos, não só garantimos a eficiência operacional, mas também reduzimos o consumo de energia e prolongamos a vida útil dos ativos, minimizando a geração de resíduos.

Nossa jornada é guiada por um compromisso inabalável com a qualidade, segurança e a responsabilidade ambiental. Nosso trabalho impulsiona o desempenho dos nossos clientes, contribuindo para um futuro mais eficiente e sustentável.

Nossa Essência e a Conexão com a Sustentabilidade
Nossos valores refletem nosso compromisso:

Segurança: Proteger pessoas e equipamentos é nossa prioridade, garantindo operações que minimizem riscos ambientais.

Comprometimento: Assumimos cada desafio com responsabilidade, promovendo práticas que contribuem para a longevidade dos ativos e a eficiência dos recursos.

Qualidade: A busca pela excelência resulta em equipamentos mais eficientes, com menor consumo de energia e menos necessidade de substituição.

Pontualidade: Respeitar prazos garante que a manutenção seja preventiva, evitando paradas que geram desperdício.

Nossa Visão

Ser a referência em manutenção industrial, reconhecida por soluções personalizadas e inovadoras. Estamos empenhados em ser o parceiro estratégico que impulsiona o crescimento e a sustentabilidade dos nossos clientes, promovendo a eficiência operacional e a responsabilidade ambiental em cada projeto.

Name: Corrosion Intel
Description:
Corrosion Intel has the responsibility of providing insights for improving the useful life of Metallic Assets. Since its inception in 2022, the team has been developing softwares and systems customised to the assets. 

Two of our mature technologies are, customised corrosion progression monitoring software for  Crude Oil Distillation Columns and Crude Oil Storage Tanks. Collaboration and technology deployment for Indian Oil Corporation Limited and Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited has laid our foundation. The team of engineers and scientists are nurturing this foundation to build an incredible asset monitoring ecosystem.

Fulfilment of our responsibilities will lead to momentary satisfaction, as it will be a mere subset of the engineering challenges that we will be solving for humanity.


Corrosion Intelligence Private Limited has 5 fundamental work areas-

1. To develop, demonstrate and deploy Machine Learning models to predict corrosion
2. To identify large industries facing the issue of unmonitored asset depreciation due to corrosion
3. To aid large industries in optimising their maintenance program by providing adequate insights
4. To leverage the advancement of data-driven models to predict breakdown of systems due to corrosion.
5. To be a market leader in the aforementioned work areas.

Name: Power Maintenance Corp.
Description:
Power Maintenance Corporation (PMC) is a leading provider of comprehensive maintenance, reliability, and life cycle services tailored to support industries that rely on critical infrastructure and power systems. We specialize in ensuring that our clients' operations remain efficient, resilient, and optimized for maximum performance throughout the entire asset life cycle.

PMC delivers preventive, corrective, and predictive maintenance solutions, ensuring that equipment is consistently performing at optimal levels. Our team is equipped to handle both routine and emergency maintenance, reducing downtime and extending the life of your assets.

Through our advanced reliability services, we offer root cause analysis, reliability-centered maintenance (RCM), and condition monitoring to anticipate potential failures. This allows clients to make data-driven decisions that improve operational efficiency and reduce maintenance costs.

Our life cycle services are designed to support the long-term management of assets. From planning and commissioning to decommissioning, we assist in every stage of the asset's life, maximizing its value and minimizing total cost of ownership.

We offer expert consulting services that focus on the optimization of maintenance processes, energy efficiency, and system reliability. Our tailored solutions help clients achieve their operational goals while adhering to industry standards and regulations.

PMC offers specialized training programs to help your team stay up to date with the latest technologies, methods, and safety protocols. Our ongoing support ensures your staff is prepared to maintain and operate complex systems effectively.

Name: Forum Vision Instandhaltung e.V.
Description:
FVI – DAS EXPERTENNETZWERK DER INDUSTRIELLEN INSTANDHALTUNG 
Das FVI als Netzwerk der industriellen Instandhaltung verfolgt das Ziel, gemeinsam mit allen Mitgliedern Ideen zu entwickeln und voranzubringen, die für die gesamte Themenpalette der Instandhaltung zukunftsweisende und praxisorientierte Lösungen bieten. Die Basis unserer Tätigkeit bildet der intensive Informationsaustausch und Wissenstransfer zwischen Forschung und Praxis. Wir wollen das aktuelle Know-how der Instandhaltung in einem Wissenspool bündeln und ein Forum für den Erfahrungsaustausch schaffen. 

GEMEINSAM DIE ZUKUNFT GESTALTEN 
Die professionelle Instandhaltung ist ein entscheidender Faktor für die Maschinenverfügbarkeit und den wirtschaftlichen Erfolg eines Unternehmens. Mit unseren Arbeitskreisen, Events und Netzwerktreffen bieten wir unseren Mitgliedern aus den unterschiedlichsten Branchen die Chance, gemeinsam über die Möglichkeiten und Potenziale der Instandhaltung zu diskutieren und neue Wege der Optimierung zu beschreiten. Unsere Veranstaltungen sind Diskussions- und Informationsforen von Fachleuten für Fachleute. 

DIE ZUKUNFT IM BLICK 
Gerade im Bereich der Instandhaltung spielt das Thema Innovation eine tragende Rolle. Für die Praktiker ist es umso wichtiger, schnell und ungefiltert an die für sie relevanten Informationen zu gelangen. Hierbei versteht sich das FVI als Schnittstelle der verschiedenen Branchenakteure. Wir sorgen dafür, dass Sie schnell und zuverlässig auf dem Laufenden sind, um Ihre Instandhaltungsprozesse sicher und effizient umsetzen zu können. 

INNOVATION
Eine unserer wichtigsten Aufgaben ist der Know-how-Transfer zwischen Forschung und Praxis. Wir ermöglichen unseren Mitgliedern einen unkomplizierten, direkten Kontakt zueinander. Von den sich daraus ergebenden Synergien profitieren alle Seiten - Forschung und Unternehmen, Start-ups und etablierte Branchenpartner.

Rebuilds and Retrofits

Grouting Services

Name: Swan TurboMachinery Consulting
Description:
Swan TurboMachinery Consulting (STC) core services offers consulting on the complete maintenance and repair lifecycle of turbomachinery, rotating equipment, and related mechanical auxiliaries.

Consulting services include initial assessment of equipment specifications and current operating parameters, maintenance events-past reports and forthcoming events; analysis of existing faults or fault finding; defining forthcoming maintenance events’ scope of work, including resource requirements, spare parts requirements, scheduling, as well as defining scope of inspection and repair of parts and subassemblies; compilation of quality management and technical instruction documents and protocols for the decommissioning, disassembly, test and inspection plan, repair instructions, reassembly and recommissioning to handover; and comprehensive works report- encompassing machine centreline and associated auxiliaries. 

Additional machinery services include:
- Reverse engineering of components and subassemblies; 3D measuring, 3D solid modelling, and 2D manufacturing design/ assembly drawings; inspection and test plans through refurbishment lifecycle; quality assurance from suppliers related to the reverse engineering process, and final signed approval of service. 
-3rd party quality assurance services: compilation/ approval of appropriate test and inspection plans, including final signed approval; supplier qualification, review and approval of supplier scope of supply and services rendered; and alternative supplier suggestions
-Consulting on procurement of new or used replacement machinery; relocation of existing machinery; erection and commissioning of new machinery; including all technical requirements review and approval, quality management test and inspection plans; resource planning and scheduling; and long-term service planning. 

-Comprehensive consulting on ISO 9001:2005 Quality Management Systems for turbomachinery services

Name: EMtech Industrial Repairs BV
Description:
EMtech is a Team of professional R & R Engineers with passion and focus for repairing defective industrial electronics located near Eindhoven. EMtech specializes in supporting large continuous industry through professional rapid repairs of control electronics. From a clear insight into your specific production line we can quickly analyze what exactly went wrong and where the cause of the defect in the electronics can be traced.

Industrial electronics such as frequency converters, servo drives, soft starters, PLCs, CNC-controllers, servo motors, robot electronics, touchscreens, displays, keypads, power supplies and individual PCBs come to us every day. Our Team of professional R & R Engineers with extensive research and measurement equipment can quickly trace defects and repair professionally.

EMtech repair time is 4 weeks. In the event of an emergency, we often repair in 1 week. All repairs are tested after recovery. Many big names in the industry are years of customer at EMtech thanks to our professional fast service.

For the large continuous industry, it is a must to reduce ad hoc downtime to a minimum.  Every malfunction and repair must contribute to the further optimization of the continuous process. Where are the specific critical points in your production lines and how can they be made more and more manageable in the chain? In this way every initial ad hoc problem contributes as an action point for improvement for the entire production process.

Sign up your defective industrial electronics and receive a repair costs proposal immediately. Or make an appointment for a personal meeting to discus your possibilities in ad hoc downtime reduction shortly.

Name: Etheredge Industrial Services
Description:
Etheredge Industrial Services has been serving the industrial market since February 1986. We have grown from one service center in Shreveport, LA with five employees to three service centers with over 100 employees in Tyler, TX and Lake Charles,
LA. We are a complete service facility, providing repairs, rewinding and upgrading of AC and DC electric motors of all makes and sizes.  We also repair pumps, gearboxes, and air compressors. Our Field Service Department can handle any on site maintenance or repair of your rotating equipment.  Catering to the Steel, Petrochemical, Pulp & Paper, Mining, Railroad, Wood Products and all types of manufacturing industries, Etheredge specializes in rebuilding large AC, DC, Synchronous, Verticals, Pumps, Gearboxes, and Air Compressors. We are available 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, with a full crew on call to service your repair needs. 
At Etheredge, we're aware that your plant may experience electrical/mechanical problems and may even shut down for long periods of time. Since "down time" translates into loss of revenue, we "Sweat The Details" to beat deadlines, solve emergencies, locate the causes of machinery failure and keep your equipment in top operating condition to prevent future breakdowns. We invite you to take a look around our page and call or e-mail us with any questions you may have concerning the repair of your rotating equipment.

Name: Interflon Scotland Ltd
Description:
Interflon manufactures high performance lubricants, cleaners and hardware. Our purpose is to help you to move forward in a constantly evolving world with innovative lubrication solutions. We operate in more than 50 countries, servicing over 135.000 clients in all kinds of industries. We give the market a new working method: we reframe Technical Maintenance.

Interflon helps companies to reduce their maintenance and energy costs, at the same time reducing down-time. We employ 400 skilled Technical Advisors worldwide to assist our customers on-site in optimizing their processes and implementing the selected Interflon lubricants converting them into real cost saving solutions. We offer you lubricants with exceptionally good performance for industrial and food processing equipment maintenance purposes. Our products reduce maintenance cost, power consumption and CO2 emissions whilst promoting component reliability and factory output. Our portfolio includes industrial and NSF listed lubricants in all current viscosity grades for first assembly, repair and maintenance work. Similarly, we can provide you with cost saving ecological cleaners.

Unlike conventional petrochemical lubricants, Interflon products are fortified with high performance additives and MicPol particles. These particles form a solid ultra thin lubrication film that provides for a very long lasting lubrication film at the lowest friction. In this way, Interflon lubricants reduce friction and wear much better than conventional lubricants, in particular, in adverse conditions of extreme loads, high and low temperatures, strong contamination and in high water wash areas.

Interflon customers experience considerably lower lubrication labour cost and lubricant consumption rates. They prolong the service life of their critical components bringing down-time to a minimum, reduce power consumption and CO2 emissions and improve equipment utilization rates and reliability at the same time.

Método de ampla compatibilidade com diversos materiais e de menor custo operacional.anos vem prestando serviços com qualidade e buscando excelência no atendimento a seus clientes.

Esterilização, Reprocessamento, Termodesinfecção e Rastreabilidade de Materiais
A Curitiba Esterilização conta com os melhores profissionais e a melhor tecnologia para poder agir em cada etapa de nossos serviços, afim de limpar, desinfectar, esterilizar e rastrear todo equipamento necessário.

Esterilização à VAPOR SATURADO

Está tendo dificuldades com a sua autoclave? Temos a solução!
Disponibilizamos o processo de ESTERILIZAÇÃO POR VAPOR SATURADO, indicado para materiais termo resistentes.

Esterilização por PLASMA DE PERÓXIDO DE HIDROGÊNIO

Necessita de esterilização a baixa temperatura com agilidade? Indicamos o processo de ESTERILIZAÇÃO POR PLASMA DE PERÓXIDO DE HIDROGÊNIO, com qualidade e segurança.

Termodesinfecção

Processo de desinfecção de alto nível que substitui a desinfecção química, é ideal para produtos semi críticos, com alta rotatividade de uso e que suporta temperaturas até 90º graus C.

Rastreabilidade
Quer saber onde está, por onde passou e aonde irá seu material? Conheça nosso sistema de RASTREABILIDADE de materiais, o Sistema TMS (Tracking of Medical Supplies) oferece ferramentas que possibilitam a rastreabilidade dos produtos médicos por meio de identificação por leitura de QrCode, sendo que cada material cadastrado no TMS recebe um selo de identificação.

A segurança do processo é aumentada com o uso do QrCode único, padronizado internacionalmente, possibilitando que se tenha acesso do histórico e ao estado atual do material.

Name: Xado Perú
Description:
Prolongamos los tiempos útiles de producción alargando los intervalos de paros de mantenimiento y evitamos paros en líneas de producción no programados por fallas mecánicas.

Con Tecnología de punta nuestros productos permiten alargar los intervalos entre paros por mantenimiento, revitalizando componentes desgastados con nuestra nanotecnología.

Xado protege del desgaste y prolonga la vida útil. Ahora recursos de energía, su dinero y tiempo. 

Protege el medio ambiente reduciendo la contaminación de escapes, disminuyendo ruidos y vibraciones.

El consorcio internacional químico XADO es el único fabricante del mundo que ofrece una gama completa de productos de alta tecnología basados en la innovación REVITALIZANT. 

REVITALIZANT es la tecnología única excepcional de ahorro de recursos y energía, que protege el medio ambiente y es ecológicamente racional y eficiente. Sin desarmar restaura y prolonga la vida útil de máquinas y mecanismos. La esencia de un elemento clave de la nueva tecnología fue el desarrollo del proceso de revitalización. Muchos años de investigación en el campo de la tribología de lubricantes y procesos de revitalización nos han permitido crear para el mercado de consumidores los productos únicos XADO revitalizantes. 

XADO es compatible con cualquier tipo de lubricante, químicamente inactiva, no modifica su viscosidad y no es un ingrediente aditivo o remetalizador. XADO es la tecnología más actual de tratamiento del metal puede asegurar incomparables propiedades físicas. 

Unos de los mayores problemas que surgen con el tiempo es el desgaste inevitable de las máquinas y mecanismos. La composición XADO permite evitar el desgaste y recuperar las superficies en rozamiento de las piezas que se utilizarán durante un largo plazo. Es la única tecnología en el mundo capaz de regenerar los metales y restablecer la geometría de las piezas desgastadas. Los cambios geométricos producidos pueden ser verificados mediante instrumentos de medición.

Name: IVC Technologies
Description:
IVC Technologies is dedicated to helping our customers achieve optimal efficiencies through Condition Based Monitoring (CBM) utilizing our highly experienced and certified PdM Analysts, cutting-edge technology and equipment with unsurpassed analytic capabilities. Our Advanced Testing Group (ATG) is compiled of the foremost leading experts in the diagnosis of the most complex problems plaguing industry today.

Our PdM service offerings employ the necessary tools to isolate and identify the failure modes most commonly found in industrial equipment long before they adversely impact your business. Accurate recommendations on how to address these problems allow you to plan, schedule, and act upon these potential problems on your schedule—not theirs. IVC Technologies can provide Corrective Services in the form of precision machine alignment and in-place balancing to ensure that your assets are fine-tuned prior to releasing them back into production and getting you back on track.

Recognizing that a one-size-fits-all approach cannot succeed in complex applications, our team is prepared to develop and implement customized programs that account for all of the parameters associated with your specific situation. From basic analyses to in-depth personnel training, IVC Technologies is your single source technology partner.

IVC Technologies is ISO 9001:2015 certified and a corporate member of the American Society of Non-Destructive Testing (ASNT).

Name: Modderkolk Projects & Maintenance BV
Description:
Wij zijn Modderkolk. Wij verstaan de kunst van techniek.

Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in industriële automatisering, systeemintegratie en installatietechniek binnen het water, de industrie en de zorg. Sectoren waarin impact gemaakt wordt door onze opdrachtgevers. En waaraan wij met trots ons steentje bijdragen. Het zijn sectoren waarin we ons gespecialiseerd hebben, om zo écht van waarde te kunnen zijn. Onze oplossingen zorgen ervoor dat we, samen met onze opdrachtgevers en partners, het water, de industrie en de zorg vooruithelpen.

En terwijl techniek onze passie is, snappen wij als geen ander dat onze opdrachtgevers en partners zich ‘gewoon’ willen focussen op hun corebusiness. Dat regelen wij! Door geheel te ontzorgen en het primaire proces zo min mogelijk te verstoren, dragen onze technische installaties geruisloos bij aan de bedrijfsdoelstellingen van onze opdrachtgevers. Of het nu gaat om (productie)processen optimaliseren, kosten besparen of doorlooptijden verkorten; onze (technische) oplossingen maken het verschil!

Dit alles vraagt wat van onze organisatie en onze vakmensen. Het vraagt ons om onze opdrachtgevers volledig centraal te stellen, door onze hele werkwijze op hen in te richten. Het vraagt ons altijd de beste kwaliteit te leveren. Op tijd, binnen budget én boven verwachting. Het vraagt om continu te blijven ontwikkelen en te geloven dat er áltijd een oplossing voor een vraagstuk is. Het vraagt ons de beste kennis en specialisten in huis te halen óf zelf op te leiden. En het vraagt ons om samen te werken. Met elkaar, met onze opdrachtgevers en met onze partners. Zo verstaan wij de kunst van techniek.

Com sua Matriz instalada em uma área de aproximadamente 6.000m², na cidade do Rio de Janeiro, a Norpem criou um centro de desenvolvimento de produtos e serviços, com a finalidade de disponibilizar um conjunto de meios (serviços, produtos e tecnologia) para gerar uma “sinergia positiva” com os clientes. Tal sinergia materializa-se pela transferência de habilidades, destinadas a criar soluções personalizadas para os parceiros comerciais. Estas soluções resultam em otimização de desempenho e redução de custos. Para viabilizar máxima qualidade em todos os projetos, a Norpem promoveu uma perfeita dinâmica com os clientes e alianças estratégicas com fornecedores. Desta maneira surgiram as atuais parcerias comerciais com as marcas: SKF, Goodyear, FRM, BURGER, Novex e BGL.

Com atendimento personalizado, flexível, e técnicos qualificados, nossa empresa busca acompanhar de perto todas as necessidades e identificar futuras demandas. É com cuidado e dedicação em cada projeto, considerado único, que transmitimos força e confiança.

Description:
A SMI – Serviços Industriais LTDA representa a Mirion (IST-Quadtek) no Brasil e América do Sul desde 2003, onde mantém uma estrutura técnica e comercial visando apoiar seus clientes na busca da solução mais adequada em relação ao monitoramento da combustão no processo industrial, desde a elaboração dos projetos, definição dos equipamentos e acessórios apropriados, bem como executa a supervisão de montagem, start-up, operação assistida, treinamento e manutenções preventivas e corretivas. Já realizamos a instalação de mais 200 sistemas no território nacional, comprovando a experiência da equipe e qualidade dos equipamentos, sempre com retorno positivo de nossos clientes.

Buscando constantemente a melhoria no atendimento técnico aos seus clientes no Brasil e para as eventuais manutenções preventivas e corretivas, a SMI disponibiliza uma estrutura de assistência técnica completa em Pedro Leopoldo-MG, compreendendo um laboratório técnico com ferramentas e instrumentos de medição e calibração, aprovados pela fábrica e devidamente certificados, bem como um estoque estratégico de peças sobressalentes originais para reposição e manutenção. Desta forma, os nossos clientes não precisam se preocupar em manter estoques desnecessários de peças e podem direcionar a atenção para para o seu processo.

A flexibilidade na instalação dos sistemas para o monitoramento industrial, muitas vezes instaladas em uma janela de visita já existente, e a satisfação dos nossos clientes, garantem uma ampla variedade nos ramos industriais que atuamos, partindo desde fornos rotativos e resfriadores, caldeiras de força, biomassa ou recuperação, fornos elétricos, secadores, fornos reformadores, de vidro, termelétricas, etc.

Nossa equipe especializada e com ampla experiência em monitoramento de processos industriais em alta temperatura tem a solução adequada a sua demanda.

Description:

Our state warehousing and production centres carry substantial stock and can undertake the manufacture and testing of our products which include: wire rope, strand & terminations; wire rope, synthetic & chain slings; lifting, general purpose & mooring chain; hoisting & winching equipment; lifting & rigging components, hardware & accessories; blocks, swivels & materials handling equipment; height safety harnesses & equipment; electronic load measuring systems; and load restraint & vehicle recovery devices.

Nobles also provides a range of in-house customer engineering and technical services for all your highly specialised and complex lifting/rigging needs including: engineering design, manufacture & audit of standard & special lifting gear; developing custom lifting procedures, guidelines & lift plans; assessment of lifting gear & cranes for repair & maintenance; big lift division for heavy lift slings & testing; on-site testing, inspection & asset management; destructive & non-destructive testing; crane servicing, inspection & assessment; electronic load cell calibration & hire; project management, lifting gear procurement, hire & site management; technical training seminars & literature; and on-site load testing using water weights for industrial & off-shore marine applications.

Name: Quant Finland Oy
Description:
Vastuullinen ja moderni teollisuuden kunnossapito. Tavoitteena varmistaa tehokas tuotanto. 

Olemme sitoutuneet tuottamaan palvelumme vastuullisesti ja turvallisesti. Tavoitteemme on nolla vahinkoa. Teemmekin paljon jatkuvaa kehitystyötä turvallisuuden suhteen ja pyrimme vähentämään kunnossapidon- ja muun toimintamme ympäristövaikutuksia.

Uskomme vakaasti henkilöstömme voimaan. Asiantuntijamme ovat motivoituneita ja he toimivat tuotantoryhmien osana. Quant Smart Maintenance on tapamme yhdistää työntekijöidemme tietotaito, prosessit ja menetelmät, maailmanluokan turvallisuusjohtaminen ja räätälöidyt digitaaliset ratkaisut. Arvioimme ja kehitämme prosessejamme ja järjestelmiämme jatkuvasti varmistaaksemme niiden tehokkuuden. 

Kunnossapito pitää yllä liiketoiminnan tehokkuutta ja kannattavuutta – se takaa turvallisuuden sekä laitosten tuottavuuden ja energiatehokkuuden. Kunnossapito on intohimomme ja meille on ollut kunnia-asia toteuttaa kumppanuuden tavoitteita ammattimaisesti jo yli 30 vuoden ajan. Kun asiakkaamme menestyvät, voimme olla ylpeitä myös omasta menestyksestämme.

Les origines d’EPM Mecanic remontent à 1978, alors sous le nom d’E.P.M. Ltée. Elle était dès lors l’une des premières entreprises en entretien planifié de la mécanique du bâtiment au Québec.

C’est avec sa division d’entretien préventif et de service qu’EPM a forgé sa réputation. L’entretien préventif et correctif des systèmes électromécaniques, les programmes d’entretien protection globale et les conversions de systèmes sont quelques-uns des services offerts par cette division, et ce 24 heures par jour, 7 jours par semaine.

En 1980, l’entreprise ajoute une division de conception et d'installation afin d’offrir une gamme complète de services à sa clientèle. Cette division s’est rapidement développée au cours des années qui ont suivies. Les réalisations se sont multipliées et les projets d’envergure continuent d’affluer. Les équipes de travail sont très stables et particulièrement performantes.

C’est également au cours des années 80 qu’EPM Mecanic innove en offrant des services de gestion d’exploitation.
Plusieurs clients ont opté pour cette solution hybride où EPM fourni au propriétaire et/ou gestionnaire d’immeubles du personnel entraîné et qualifié afin de s’occuper de la gestion des systèmes mécaniques de leurs édifices.

Name: Ace Electric Motor & Pump Co
Description:
Melvin Gutsche spent 18 years in the electric motor industry and had a tremendous passion for what he did, so in 1952 he purchased the electric motor division from Heild Electric and founded Ace. He set out on a mission to serve the central valley. Melvin had been running the company for more than 20 years and successfully completed the repair of thousands of motors and pumps when in 1970 he decided to bow out due to health reasons. His youngest son lance, who had begun working at the shop at the early age 6, took the reins at 28 years old in 1970 as operations manager then in 1976 he purchased the company from his father. Lance was committed to his father’s vision for creating an exceptional product which began a more than 34 year love affair with the company his father founded.

Lance continued the traditions his father created until April of 2010 when lance decided to retire to spend more time with his family. He sold the company to his then operations manager, Josh Iris, who immediately begin reinvesting into and modernizing the facility. Ace now has more than 13 passionate and performance oriented team members who are committed to growing, learning and innovating every day while still continuing the traditions and values set into motion so many years ago.

Today, Ace has a new mission, and this is what we believe

“TO IMPROVE THE WAY OF LIFE FOR MILLIONS OF PEOPLE…. SILENTLY.
What we believe (core values)

Integrity – having the courage and commitment to provide honest and innovative solutions

Reliability – we are committed to excellent, consistent and dependable results

Contribution – our success is not defined by mere profit alone, but by learning and empowering each other and our communities.

Fun – we are committed to having a team who aligns with our core values, if you love what you do fun is a by product

Morrison Industrial Equipment is a multi-line material handling equipment dealer on a mission to lift local businesses through material handling efficiencies and throughput. Since our launch in 1953, we’ve been committed to the big goal of making forklift downtime disappear. We were founded on the belief that business shouldn’t grind to a halt because a forklift battery dies. We’ve developed highly accurate parts inventories and supply chains, superb technician training programs, and forklift service and maintenance programs to empower local businesses to keep moving, lifting, stacking, loading, and storing product with maximum efficiency and profitability.

We've always had a deeper mission at Morrison — partnership. To build valuable partnerships with our neighboring companies, and do the best job we possibly can to help them succeed and grow. We're committed to our core value of being your partner in material handling excellence, providing service, solutions, and peace of mind as you move your business forward.

Name: EDC AIR COMPRESSORS SCOTLAND LTD
Description:
Your local Scottish compressed air specialists and SCR distributor. We like to think we're a little bit different - in a good way. Yes, we carry out the usual supply, installation, servicing and repair of air compressors and blowers.
Yes, we conduct leak detection and energy surveys (these energy surveys are free and could save you a fortune by the way). And we also carry out pressure vessel testing, providing Written Schemes of Examination.
In fact, we do everything you would expect of an established compressed air company.
The difference is, we'll remember you, and your compressor set up - and that can be invaluable when it comes to a breakdown or attending site. 
With engineers at the top of their game, we relish problem solving, providing our valued customers with energy-saving advice and long-term solutions to issues which may have been ongoing.
That's why we say we're big enough to cope, but small enough to care.

Name: Ontime Automação e Proteção
Description:
Somos uma empresa de manutenção em equipamentos eletrônicos industriais e treinamentos em Automação. Criada em 2005 com a terceirização do departamento de serviços da GE Supply do Brasil, a Ontime era especializada em Assistência Técnica da linha GE Automation, hoje  também fazemos reparos em PLCs e IHMs multimarcas como Rockwell Automation /Allen Bradley, Siemens, Schneider, Emerson Automation e ABB, além de toda linha GE Fanuc / GE Automation.

Também realizamos treinamentos de PLC, IHM e Redes Industriais, sendo no passado o Centro de Treinamentos GE Automation no Brasil. Disponibilizamos cursos básicos e avançados com conteúdo padrão ou customizado conforme as necessidade e características da aplicação do cliente, otimizando tempo e investimento. Os cursos podem ser In Company ou em nosso Centro de Treinamento.

Oferecemos também atendimento em campo para restabelecimento do funcionamento de máquinas ou processos industriais com equipamentos GE Automation ou para otimização da aplicações.
Por fim, oferecemos também, serviços de retrofit das linhas de PLC 90-30/90-70 para PACSystems e IHMs GE.

Name: Drukatt
Description:

Name: Pictet Cameroun
Description:
Depuis 1983, PICTET-CAMEROUN est un acteur de référence dans les domaines du froid, de la climatisation, de la ventilation, de la plomberie, de l’électricité, des systèmes de protection incendie, ainsi que dans la gestion technique de bâtiments. Nous offrons des solutions complètes de maintenance multitechnique tous corps d’état, couvrant aussi bien les travaux neufs, les projets de réhabilitation, la maintenance préventive et corrective, que les études techniques pour les bâtiments résidentiels, commerciaux et industriels.
 
Forts de plus de 40 ans d’expérience, nous avons développé une approche rigoureuse, fondée sur l’analyse fine des coûts et la sélection des équipements les mieux adaptés à chaque usage. Grâce à des partenariats solides avec les meilleurs fournisseurs, des institutions de recherches et des ordres d’ingénieurs, nous garantissons des solutions fiables, performantes et conformes aux normes internationales.
 
À ce jour, plus de 15 000 interventions réussies témoignent de notre expertise à travers tout le Cameroun, au service d’acteurs publics, de multinationales, de banques, d'hôtels, d’industries et d’entreprises des secteurs des télécommunications, agroalimentaire, pharmaceutique, logistique et commercial.

Nos équipes expérimentées assurent une permanence 24h/24, capables d’intervenir en urgence à tout moment pour garantir la continuité de vos opérations et la sécurité de vos installations.
 
Notre engagement : Apporter des solutions durables, fiables et évolutives, tout en garantissant performance énergétique, sécurité, confort et maîtrise des coûts.

Name: HidroVapor
Description:
Com criatividade, inovação e constante investimento em tecnologia, a HIDROVAPOR é líder em manutenção de sistemas de controle de fluídos, com forte atuação em diversos segmentos industriais, incluindo usinas de açúcar, papel e celulose, siderúrgicas, mineração, óleo e gás, fábricas de suco e frigoríficos. Oferecemos serviços de manutenção preditiva, preventiva e corretiva com assistência técnica 24 x 7.

Nossos profissionais altamente experientes e qualificados garantem transparência, qualidade técnica e agilidade no atendimento às necessidades dos clientes. Nossa missão é oferecer soluções corretas e assertivas para o controle de sistemas de fluídos para cada especificidade de projetos e processos.

Nosso objetivo é garantir a maior disponibilidade e qualidade de operação da planta produtiva, seguindo todas as normas técnicas de aplicações, testes e sistemas de gestão da qualidade para a maior confiabilidade dos produtos e serviços oferecidos.

A HIDROVAPOR é especializada em manutenção de válvulas de controle, segurança e alívio, alta pressão, bloqueio flangeladas e wafer, bloqueio sw e bw, condicionadoras e by-pass, além de acionamentos elétricos e eletroposicionadores. Realizamos testes regidos por normas internacionais para garantir a operação tranquila e o perfeito controle de processos industriais.

Além disso, prestamos serviços de consultoria e engenharia em aplicação e dimensionamento de válvulas e equipamentos para instrumentação. Também somos revendedores de atuadores pneumáticos, filtros reguladores de pressão, monitores de posição, posicionadores de válvulas, válvulas esferas, válvulas borboletas, válvulas gavetas, válvulas globo e retenção, além de linha de produtos pneumáticos em geral.

Garanta a qualidade técnica e a transparência que sua empresa precisa.
Venha para a HIDROVAPOR.
Tecnologia em controle de fluídos.

Name: Tecniprecisión Cia. Ltda.
Description:
Nuestro laboratorio de metrología inició sus labores en el año 2012 como persona jurídica, conjuntamente con la creación del Departamento de Asesoramiento en Metrología Dimensional, como una unidad de apoyo a toda la industria interesada en adquirir instrumentos debidamente certificados. Posteriormente, ampliamos nuestras capacidades de medición y calibración mediante inversiones logradas a través de convenios estratégicos con empresas privadas comprometidas con el desarrollo del laboratorio.

Actualmente, contamos con patrones de la más alta tecnología que mantienen trazabilidad a laboratorios acreditados y/o Institutos Nacionales de Metrología cubiertos por acuerdos internacionales como ILAC. Además, nuestros servicios están respaldados por dos importantes acreditaciones: SAE (Servicio de Acreditación Ecuatoriano), como organismo nacional de acreditación, y A2LA (American Association for Laboratory Accreditation), una de las entidades más reconocidas a nivel internacional, lo cual garantiza la competencia técnica de nuestros procesos conforme a la norma ISO/IEC 17025.

Nuestro laboratorio dispone de una infraestructura física conformada por cinco áreas de especialización: Dimensional – Longitud, Electricidad CC y Baja Frecuencia, Fluidos – Presión y Vacío, Mecánica – Momentos, Temperatura, Mecánica-Masa, Volumen, Tiempo y Salas de Capacitación, ofreciendo así un servicio integral, confiable y de alta calidad a nuestros clientes.

- Limpieza o cambio de membranas y filtros.

Name: Al Sadeq Group Machinery
Description:
Al Sadeq Group Machinery stands as the premier exclusive dealer for JCB, Renault Trucks, and DYNAPAC in Iraq, delivering top-notch machinery solutions across various industries. From excavators to telehandlers, our JCB lineup ensures efficiency and productivity on every job site. Our range of rollers and pavers ensures smooth and durable surfaces, contributing to the development of infrastructure across Iraq.

At Al Sadeq Group Machinery, we prioritize customer satisfaction and aim to exceed expectations with our exceptional service and support. Our team of experienced professionals is dedicated to providing comprehensive aftersales services, including maintenance, repairs, and genuine parts supply, ensuring the longevity and reliability of our equipment.

With a strong commitment to quality, reliability, and customer service, Al Sadeq Group Machinery continues to be the trusted partner for businesses across Iraq, empowering them to achieve their goals and contribute to the nation's development.

Our success is the result of strong partnerships between Quant and our customers.

Situated in the vibrant heart of Dubai, UAE, Quant Gulf isn't just an extension of Quant Service; it's your trusted partner for groundbreaking maintenance solutions in the Middle East. Our story began in the region in the year 2015, and we've been on a relentless mission to transform the world of maintenance ever since.

In a world driven by Industry 4.0 and Digital Transformation, the United Arab Emirates is at the forefront of change. At Quant Gulf, we're not just embracing change; we're redefining maintenance with innovation and data-driven decision-making at its core.

We're not just service providers; we're your smart maintenance experts. Our secret sauce? Cutting-edge AI and predictive analytics, empowering you to make data-driven decisions and propelling your maintenance operations into the future.

For more than 30 years, Quant has been a market leader in industrial maintenance, maintaining and improving the safety, production and equipment performance for over 400 facilities world-wide. Quant employs 3,100 people and operates in 12 counties across Europe, Middle East, and the Americas.

Join us on this thrilling journey as we reshape maintenance for a new era, where your data becomes your superpower. https://app.hybridx.ai/QG

Name: Directech Engenharia
Description: With more than 20 years of experience, our company stands out in the development of projects and maintenance of fluid systems, covering hydraulics, pneumatics and utilities in sectors such as steel industries, tire manufacturing, mining and oil and gas. We offer a thorough analysis and diagnosis of systems, providing maintenance recommendations and project improvements in line with international standards and best market practices. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our emergency technical support, available 24 hours a day. In addition, we promote specialized and personalized technical training, focusing on practice in industrial power units, providing educational material and exclusive certificates. Our services include overhaul, retrofitting, upgrade, calibration, assembly, installation, commissioning and startup of machines, equipment and components, always using modern techniques and procedures. We carry out precision repairs and performance tests on variable pumps, piston motors, proportional servo valves and standard and special cylinders. We use advanced technologies to collect data, allowing detailed analysis and precise definition of operational parameters. All services are accompanied by the issuance of technical reports and detailed reports, ensuring transparency and quality. We are committed to meeting the needs of our customers with high quality and professionalism. Get in touch and find out how we can help make your project a success!

Name: Metatech Thermal Spray Pvt Ltd
Description:
At Metatech, we're a leading provider of thermal spray coating and industrial painting services in India. 

We've been helping businesses overcome costly problems caused by corrosion and erosion since 2009.

Corrosion and erosion are major threats to industrial equipment, leading to breakdowns, production losses, and increased maintenance costs.

That’s why, we offer a wide range of thermal spray coatings and industrial painting services to protect your equipment and keep your operations running smoothly. 

We're ISO 9001:2015 certified, ensuring a commitment to quality across all our services.

By choosing Metatech, you can expect - 

→ Reduced downtime and maintenance costs
→ Improved efficiency and productivity
→ Compliance with industry standards
→ Extended equipment lifespan

Here's what sets us apart -

→ Proven Track Record: We've successfully completed projects for diverse industries like Chemical, Oil & Gas, Power, Pulp & Paper, and more. This includes coating and grinding over 75+ MG Cylinders and 300+ Dryer Cylinders in the last 5 years alone.

→ Wide Range of Services: We offer a variety of thermal spray coatings including Aluminum, Zinc, Tungsten Carbide, and more. We also provide services like Boiler Tube Coatings, Industrial Painting, and In-situ Dryer Grinding.

→ Expertise in diverse industries: We have a proven track record of success in various sectors, including oil & gas, power, pulp & paper, wind power, and more. 

→ State-of-the-Art Facilities: Our 25,000 sq.ft. facility allows us to handle large-scale projects efficiently with the latest technology.

Metatech is more than just a service provider. We're your partner in preventing costly breakdowns and production losses caused by corrosion and erosion. 

Contact us today at info@thermalsprayworld.com to discuss your specific needs to ensure optimal performance and reduced downtime for your industrial assets.

Afin d’assurer l’efficience opérationnelle de vos engins de travaux et de locomotives, ce groupement s’appuie sur un atelier de maintenance embranché au réseau Ferré Nationale (RFN), des équipes mobiles, une GMAO lui permettant d’avoir un système d’information partagé et un réseau d’experts pour une maintenance ferroviaire maîtrisée.

Die J.H.K. Gruppe bietet Auszubildenden, Studenten / Absolventen wie auch berufserfahrenen Fach- und Führungskräften spannende Chancen und Herausforderungen. Name: Interflon Latinoamérica
Description:
Interflon fabrica lubricantes, limpiadores y herramientas de alto rendimiento. Nuestro propósito es ayudarlo con soluciones de lubricación innovadoras. Operamos en más de 50 países, atendiendo a más de 135.000 clientes en todo tipo de industrias. 

En Interflon ayudamos a las empresas a reducir sus costos de mantenimiento, el consumo de energía y las emisiones de CO2, promoviendo la confiabilidad de los componentes, el rendimiento de la fábrica y reduciendo el tiempo de inactividad. 400 asesores técnicos calificados en todo el mundo ayudan a nuestros clientes a optimizar sus procesos e implementar los lubricantes Interflon adecuados, convirtiéndolos en verdaderas soluciones de ahorro. Nuestras soluciones incluyen lubricantes de alto rendimiento para mantenimiento de equipos industriales, de procesamiento de alimentos y certificados NSF, limpiadores ecológicos, herramientas y servicios de lubricación.

Nuestros productos cuentan con MicPol, tecnología exclusiva de Interflon, que proporciona una película de lubricación muy duradera, reduciendo la fricción y el desgaste mucho mejor que los lubricantes convencionales, en particular, en condiciones adversas.

Los clientes de Interflon poseen costos de mano de obra de lubricación y tasas de consumo de lubricante considerablemente más bajos. Prolongan la vida útil de sus componentes críticos reduciendo al mínimo el tiempo de inactividad, reducen el consumo de energía y las emisiones de CO2 y, al mismo tiempo, mejoran la vida útil y la confiabilidad de los equipos.

Name: AmeriCoil
Description:
Founded in the year 2000 AmeriCoil has been a leading provider in commercial HVAC cleaning throughout New York City and Long Island. Headquartered in Farmingdale, New York we offer premium HVAC cleaning and maintenance for commercial, industrial, and municipal clientele. Ventilation systems play a major part in your indoor air quality. When not prioritized your systems can be circulating dust, mold, odors, and other pollutants. The professionals at AmeriCoil routinely inspect your HVAC systems to create a safer and healthier environment and extend the life of your equipment. 

Our services include but are not limited to the thorough cleaning and maintenance of coils, ducts, cooling towers, dryer vents, refrigeration systems, and filters. AmeriCoil was built on honesty and trust, quality workmanship and admirable customer care.  Our large team of trained professionals understands the importance of safety and health and takes all necessary measures to ensure your building’s equipment is running the way it should be.
 
Why Should you Clean your HVAC Systems? 

The process of cleaning ducts is critical to the quality of air within your commercial building. When not properly taken care of, airborne contaminants can build up within your ductwork resulting in the growth of mold, bacteria, and fungus. These contaminants are then pushed through your heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) systems and become a problem for healthy indoor breathing air. 

•	Rebuild energy efficiency with routine maintenance.
•	Reduce the potential for mold build up. 
•	Save money by extending the life of your equipment. 
•	Offensive odors in your building can be irritating and unhealthy to your team and staff. Keep the air within your facility fresh and clean. 

AmeriCoil Promise:
•	Courteous and efficient customer service
•	Premium products for all cleaning and maintenance 
•	Honest and upfront pricing
•	We only hire highly skilled and professional experts

Name: Central Florida Forklift, Inc..
Description:
Founded in 1976 by Bruce Finley, Central Florida Forklift, Inc. provides services and repairs on all makes and models of forklifts and construction equipment. After nearly 35 years and several expansions, Bruce retired in 2011 and the new management he installed is continuing to follow his tradition of good customer service before and after the sale. From the back of his van to a large repair shop on three acres, Central Florida Forklift, Inc. would not be where it is today without his perseverance and dedication to customer satisfaction. 

Central Florida Forklift, Inc. became a dealer for Heli Americas in 2013 to allow the company to offer new forklifts and equipment to better meet more of our customer needs. This allows us to offer new Heli Forklifts to our sales, lease, and rental departments as a compliment to our used inventory. In 2015, Central Florida Forklift, Inc. began the process of registering our name with the United States Trademark and Patent Office. Others had begun using the Central Florida Forklift name either outright or as a dba. Central Florida Forklift wanted to preserve its 30-year name and reputation and was awarded the trademark in January 2017. 

In 2016, Central Florida Forklift, Inc. assumed control of Forklift Battery Supply, Inc. and integrated its line of products. Central Florida Forklift, Inc. now offers new forklift batteries from Reaco Battery and new forklift battery chargers from Ferro Magnetics. This allows Central Florida Forklift, Inc. to offer new batteries and chargers with our electric Heli Forklifts as well as those just needing a new battery or charger for their existing equipment. In 2017, Central Florida Forklift, Inc. became the Dieci Telehandler dealer. With Dieci, Central Florida Forklift, Inc offers construction and agricultural telescopic forklifts.
