Name: BJS Manutenção Industrial
Description:
Fruto da experiência acumulada de mais de 40 anos ao serviço da indústria a BJS tornou-se uma referência nacional na manutenção industrial de máquinas eléctricas em geral e, em particular, na reparação, reconstrução, beneficiação e bobinagem de motores AC/DC de baixa e média tensão, bem como, geradores, transformadores, ventiladores industriais, bombas e máquinas e ferramentas eléctricas. 


Desde 2010 temos vindo a desenvolver reconhecidas competências na manutenção e reparação de servomotores brushless: dispomos de um corpo técnico especializado no serviço destes equipamentos tendo já sido intervencionados no nosso laboratório mais de 125 marcas diferentes. 


Os nossos serviços estendem-se ainda à manutenção quer preventiva quer preditiva, dispondo a BJS de toda a instrumentação e equipamentos que habilitam os nossos técnicos a intervir prontamente e com a máxima segurança e eficácia nos equipamentos e, também, nas instalações do cliente. 


As nossas instalações, com uma área de 4.000m2, foram concebidas expressamente para esta actividade permitindo à nossa equipa de mais de 35 colaboradores, as condições físicas e operacionais apropriadas à prestação de um serviço de máxima qualidade. 

A BJS foi a primeira empresa do seu ramo de actividade a obter a certificação segundo a norma NP EN ISO 9001:2008.

Cégünk, az EVAPCO hűtőtornyok, kondenzátorok értékesítésével, alkatrészeinek forgalmazásával és az ipari hűtés területén jelenlévő más gyártók hűtőtornyainak alkatrész ellátásával, szervizelésével foglalkozik. 
Az EVAPCO által kifejlesztett és szabadalmaztatott alkatrészeket maximális szakértelemmel építjük be az egyéb gyártók által forgalmazott hűtőtornyokba, kondenzátorokba, ezáltal a teljesítményüket növelni tudjuk, működésük hatékonyabb és energiatakarékosabb lehet. 

Számunkra a legfontosabb, hogy kimagasló minőségű termékekkel tudjuk partnereinket kiszolgálni, ezért dolgozunk együtt egy olyan márkával, amely az ipari hűtőtornyok piacának vezető szereplője. Hivatásunk és szívügyünk, hogy ügyfeleink igényeit szakszerűen, kimagasló szakértelemmel tudjuk kielégíteni.

Eco Towers Kft! A hűtőtornyok szakértője!

Name: Iparfrío
Description:
Cuando trabajas con Iparfrío cuentas con más de 100 profesionales que te apoyan día a día:

Técnicos, instaladores, ingenieros, administrativos, el servicio de mantenimiento... Juntos te ofrecemos asesoría, diseño e instalación de la calidad de frío que necesita tu supermercado, quesería, matadero, pescadería... Nuestro objetivo es que tengas tu solución a medida ahorrando costes tanto en materiales como en refrigerante.

"Crecemos para que crezcas, viajamos por el mundo buscando la última tecnología en frío"

Estamos siempre en continuo movimiento, absorbiendo cada novedad del sector y ofreciéndotela una vez que la hemos testado. Este conocimiento de nuestra área nos permite asesorarte sobre tu instalación de frío a medida:

- Valoramos qué calidad de frío necesita tu producto.
- Te asesoramos sobre la humedad, temperatura, cámara...que necesitas.
- Montamos la instalación por piezas ahorrando costes y permitiéndote crecer.
- Cuentas con mantenimiento las 24 horas del día los 365 días del año.
Así mantienes el producto como si estuviera de origen aumentando tus beneficios. Cuidamos de tu negocio y de la cadena de frío de tus productos porque amamos nuestra profesión. Y esto te permite a ti cuidar de tus clientes.
Nos apasiona el frío, por eso sabemos cuál es la calidad que necesita tu negocio

"Somos frigoristas de toda la vida, y eso te aporta el trabajar con un equipo que ha convertido su pasión"
 Somos frigoristas de toda la vida, y eso te aporta el trabajar con un equipo que ha convertido su pasión en su profesión. En el año 2003 nos juntamos cuatro personas que ya trabajábamos en el mundo del frío. Nos dimos cuenta de que con nuestros perfiles, totalmente diferentes pero complementarios, podíamos ofrecerte un servicio integral de frío de calidad.

Queríamos estar cerca de nuestros clientes, porque sabemos que es algo importante. Por eso pasamos de trabajar en la zona de Gipuzkoa a tener delegaciones por otras zonas del norte y centro de la península.

Name: HPS-Group Hanseatic Power Service GmbH
Description:
Die HPS-Group vereint führende Dienstleisterunternehmen in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz, deren Ziel es ist, den Betrieb kritischer Infrastrukturen zu sichern, instandzuhalten und nachhaltig zu optimieren.

Unsere Mission ist es, stets eine verlässliche Betriebsbereitschaft bei unseren Kunden zu gewährleisten. Unser Engagement gilt nicht nur der Stärkung essenzieller Systeme, sondern auch der Entwicklung und Umsetzung von Nachfolgelösungen für unsere (potenziellen) Gesellschaften – Damit auch morgen alles läuft!

Wir bauen Anlagen und Krane, bringen Systeme wieder zum Laufen, verlängern ihre Lebensdauer und setzen hohe Standards für Sicherheit, Qualität und Umweltverantwortung. Durch umfassende Dienstleistungen von Wartung über Prüfung bis zur Zertifizierung bietet die HPS-Group mit ihrem wachsenden Netzwerk aus Gesellschaften Lösungen aus einer Hand und gewährleistet weltweiten Service – auch in Notfällen. Mit fundiertem Know-how und modernen Prüfständen können wir flexibel und effizient auf spezifische Anforderungen reagieren.

Unsere Arbeit basiert auf Vertrauen und Partnerschaft. In enger Zusammenarbeit entwickeln wir robuste, praxistaugliche Lösungen, die Hand in Hand mit unseren Kunden umgesetzt werden. HPS steht für ein respektvolles Miteinander, das durch Zuverlässigkeit und Integrität geprägt ist.

Name: ENINTER Svizzera
Description:
Eninter Svizzera SA il vostro partner per l'installazione e la manutenzione di ascensori propri e multimarca.

Eninter Ascensori è stata fondata in Spagna nel 1973 come azienda dedita alla manutenzione multimarca di ascensori. Fornisce servizi e prodotti con un’ampia rete di filiali in tutta la Spagna e nel sud Europa per offrire vicinanza al cliente. 

In Canton Ticino è presente da 25 anni con Ascensori Eninter Svizzera SA ( in precedenza Novalift SA ). Nell’anno 2023 è iniziata una collaborazione con una PMI operante nel nostro stesso settore anch’essa a conduzione familiare:  la Adula Ascensori SA di Pambio Noranco. 
Dal 1. gennaio 2025 Adula Ascensori è totalmente integrata nell’organizzazione Eninter Svizzera SA continuando naturalmente a garantire ai propri stimati clienti i servizi di manutenzione e riparazione, oltre alla consulenza e la realizzazione di nuovi progetti o ammodernamenti sul portafoglio impianti
Tramite questa prima acquisizione a distanza di 26 anni dalla fondazione a Balerna, Eninter Svizzera SA, conferma la propria solidità aziendale e la coerenza del programma espansione internazionale di ENINTER Ascensores di Barcellona, iniziata nel 2015.

I nostri valori rispecchiano la nostra personalità e rappresentano il nostro modo di intendere il mondo degli ascensori e il trasporto verticale di persone. Cresciamo perché lavoriamo in squadra e impariamo dai nostri errori con un unico obiettivo: migliorare la vostra qualità di vita. Miglioriamo costantemente i nostri prodotti e servizi. Progettiamo e sviluppiamo prodotti pensati per eliminare ogni barriera architettonica. Attualmente il gruppo, fondato 52 anni fa dal Sig. Damaso Martinez, è gestito dalla seconda generazione, composto da piu’ di 1000 collaboratori e da 59’000 ascensori in manutenzione in 4 paesi europei.

Attendiamo con piacere un vostro contatto!

Name: Greussing Kranservice
Description:
Wir von GREUSSING KRANSERVICE sorgen uns seit nahezu 20 Jahren weltweit erfolgreich um den Service und wenn notwendig um anfallende Fehlerbehebungen an Kranen auf Schiffen verschiedenster Reedereien und auf  Bohrinseln namhafter Ölfirmen. Gesteigerte Nachfrage hat das anfänglich beinahe „Ein-Mann-Team“ in kürzester Zeit beträchtlich anwachsen lassen. Bei der Gründung der Firma im Jahre 2003 konnte ich auf 10 Jahre Erfahrung an Hydraulik-Systemen bei Kaiser in Liechtenstein zurückblicken und 10 Jahre „Know how“ in Montage und Service von Offshore- und Schiffskranen für Liebherr in die Firma einbringen. Seitdem hat sich einiges getan. Das Team ist gewachsen.

Kundennähe,  fachliche Kompetenz, Motivation, Erfahrung, Teamgeist, Flexibilität, das alles sind Eigenschaften, die ich meiner Crew ruhigen Gewissens zuordnen kann. 
Während unserer Services an der Mechanik verschiedenster Krane wurden wir immer öfter mit Problemen elektronischer Art konfrontiert.
Eine Herausforderung, die das Team mit Freuden annahm. Bald war es uns möglich, den Kunden  maßgeschneiderte, von uns entwickelte, moderne Steuerungs-systeme anzubieten und zu installieren.

Mit Sicherheit haben wir auch für Sie eine Lösung. Unsere Geschäftsfelder umfassen:
Kranservice

Beton schneiden & Bohren.

Name: QMS360 (Quality Management System)
Description:
QMS is a SAAS application that can be installed remotely and physically to manage and control any workflow based on a step-by-step process. From data analysis and reporting to tracking and analyzing quality metrics, we do all. Our company has spent over half a decade in the Pakistani Industry introducing sustainable practices, automating industrial processes and providing custom optimization solutions. Now we have developed the innovative QMS app. The primary purpose of this app is to offer extensive data analysis and reporting features to its users. It allows them to closely monitor and assess various quality metrics throughout the manufacturing process. The value added is in the form of productivity increase by manifolds. We are building innovative technological systems for a sustainable tomorrow and the core objective of a 7-0 quality inline app system is to enhance product quality and minimize wastage through a range of automated quality control measures and data-driven practices.
QMS leverages technology and algorithms to inspect and assess product quality consistently and accurately. This automation reduces human error and ensures that every product meets the specified quality standards. the app offers real-time monitoring and alerts. This means that it continuously observes the manufacturing process as it unfolds. If it detects any deviations or anomalies that could lead to defects or subpar quality, it issues immediate alerts. This proactive approach enables swift corrective action, preventing the production of flawed products. The reports generated help to identify trends, areas for enhancement, and opportunities to optimize production processes, contributing to a continuous improvement cycle.
Solve your problems of Increased Scrap and Rework, low efficiency, and low customer satisfaction by using the QMS. It is specifically designed to optimize your QC. You will not find any solution that will give Visual Management System, Data Sync & Quality Reporting.

Nascemos para oferecer suporte técnico de elite a setores que movem a economia: mineradoras, indústrias de fertilizantes, usinas sucroenergéticas e o agronegócio de alta escala.

Diferente de oficinas convencionais, integramos quatro pilares de engenharia de manutenção em uma única estrutura de alta performance:

 Sistemas de Fluídos (Hidráulica e Pneumática): Diagnóstico avançado, reforma de cilindros e unidades hidráulicas com foco em marcas globais e alta pressão.  Reforma de Implementos e Componentes Agrícolas: Especialização na recuperação de componentes críticos para frotas pesadas, garantindo a disponibilidade das máquinas no campo.  Caldeiraria Técnica e Solda Especializada: Recuperação estrutural e fabricação de componentes com soldadores qualificados e rigorosos padrões de acabamento.  Suporte Local e Redução de Downtime: Eliminamos a dependência de serviços vindos de outras capitais. Reduzimos drasticamente o custo logístico e o tempo de máquina parada através de um atendimento ágil e técnico em Uberaba.

Nossa infraestrutura foi projetada para suportar o rigor operacional de gigantes como Mosaic, Yara, Eurochem e as principais usinas da região. Entendemos que na mineração, na indústria e no agronegócio, cada hora conta. Entregamos mais que reparos: entregamos disponibilidade, confiança e segurança operacional.
Gestão de Ativos

Name: O4Bi Mantenimiento
Description:
O4Bi es el mejor software para utilizar como herramienta en la gestión del mantenimiento.

O4Bi es un CMMS o GMAO que tiene los procesos de mantenimiento debidamente incluidos en sus módulos del área de mantenimiento e integrados a otras áreas de O4Bi.

O4Bi incluye procesos para planificar, ejecutar y controlar las actividades necesarias en el mantenimiento.

Con O4Bi usted puede tener un levantamiento completo de todos los activos a dar mantenimiento y todos los componentes o subniveles en que se pueden descomponer estos activos. Puede incluir activos físicos como equipo y maquinaria, activos humanos, activos financieros, activos intangibles y cualquier otro activo que considere necesario darle mantenimiento.

En O4Bi usted puede crear presupuestos, rutinas preventivas, correctivos y recursos necesarios para mantenimiento.

En O4Bi usted obtiene control de costos, fallas, modos de falla, causas de falla, tiempo muerto y otros elementos necesarios en el control del mantenimiento.

Con O4Bi usted adminsitra el recurso humano y los contratistas que ejecutan el mantenimiento.

Con O4Bi usted administra los inventarios de repuestos, materiales y consumibles y los procesos de compra, entrega y asignación al costo del mantenimiento.

Name: HAHN+KOLB SRBIJA
Description:
Hahn+Kolb doo osnovan je u Srbiji 2004. godine kao ćerka kompanije HAHN+KOLB Werkzeuge GmbH, koja postoji u Nemačkoj još od 1898. godine.

Proizvodi iz našeg asortimana, uključujući rezne alate, stezne i merne alate, uređaje za ispitivanje, opremu za radionice, ručne alate i alatne mašine, izrađeni su u skladu sa najvišim DIN i ISO standardima. HAHN+KOLB Werkzeuge je sertifikovan prema DIN EN ISO 9001:2008, što garantuje vrhunski kvalitet i pouzdanost naših proizvoda.

Naši tehnički obrazovani predstavnici prodaje spremni su da pomognu kupcima u rešavanju izazova u industriji proizvodnje i održavanja. Na taj način, HAHN+KOLB je prepoznat kao pouzdan partner za stabilan razvoj i dugoročni poslovni uspeh.

Danas, HAHN+KOLB doo uspešno sarađuje sa više od 1900 kompanija u Srbiji. U toku svog poslovanja, firma je objavila tri izdanja kataloga na srpskom jeziku, čime je olakšan pristup širokom asortimanu naših proizvoda.

HAHN+KOLB Metrološka laboratorija, osnovana 2011. godine, akreditovana je od strane Akreditacionog tela Srbije za oblast etaloniranja E-05 dimenzionalnih veličina i za E-09 sila i snage, prema standardu SRPS ISO/IEC 17025:2017, pod akreditacionim brojem 02-040. Laboratorija je još jedan dokaz naše posvećenosti tačnosti i kvalitetu u svim aspektima poslovanja.

Gli stampi da fonderia sono soggetti a usura e fatica a causa delle alte temperature e della pressione a cui sono sottoposti durante il processo di colata. Una manutenzione adeguata consente, in primo luogo, di mantenere la Qualità dei Prodotti;  Stampi in buone condizioni garantiscono forme precise e dimensioni corrette, riducendo il numero di difetti nel prodotto finale. La nostra competenza, che arriva da 20 anni di esperienza circa le manutenzioni di una importante Fonderia emiliana, ci permette di avere notevole competenza sulle manutenzioni degli stampi. La corretta gestione e manutenzione degli stampi non solo aumenta l'efficienza operativa, ma riduce anche i costi di produzione e migliora la soddisfazione del cliente
Siamo piccoli ma le nostre maestranze hanno molta competenza nelle lavorazioni della Carpenteria: dalle finiture alla saldatura, il tutto per creare strutture o "oggetti" utili al cliente (che si tratti di carpenteria per macchinari agricoli o industriali o rifare la cancellata della villa comunale o di un privato, abbiamo strumenti e competenze per poter gestire questo tipo di esigenza)

Description:
Industrial Non-abrasive precision pulse laser ablation of:

• Composite mould tooling
• Plastic and rubber injection moulds

• Industrial tools, plants, pipes and machinery

*surface prep for pre treatment, bonding or galvanising of metal surfaces 

Sectors we serve:
• Engineering

• National monuments 
• Rail
• Bridges 
• Water works and Utilities 
• Oil / Petrochemical refineries 
• Gasworks 
• Offshore rigs 
• Wind turbines 
• Aviation 
• Fire damage / restoration

Advanced Laser Cleaning provides an unrivalled on-site solution for vaporising rust, coatings, contaminants, release agents and grease from industrial plant, machinery, engineered components, tools, ferrous and non ferrous metal surfaces.

We substantially minimize costs related to the transportation of heavy parts to blast containers, thanks to our mobile service, bringing precision pulse laser ablation technology, directly to your doorstep.

Distinctly different from conventional blasting, our laser cleaning process ensures that your surface component tolerances remain uncompromised. Pulse laser cleaning will guarantee to maintain the surfaces performance capability and its near original state without compromising its structural integrity. 

With zero clean up, zero noise pollution and no contaminated blast media or chemicals to dispose of, laser cleaning is today’s most sustainable, effective solution, significantly reducing your carbon emissions footprint. 

Contact us today and experience the latest cutting-edge technology with our laser cleaning contractor services. 

For all enquiries, to book a demonstration or quote for our on or off site industrial laser cleaning contractor services:

Name: Laser-Clean
Description:
Sustainable, Gentle & Efficient Surface Cleaning.

At Laser-Clean, we aim to make our world more sustainable by extending the lifespan of materials using advanced laser technology. Instead of harsh chemical or mechanical methods, our approach removes rust, wear, and contamination without damaging the base material. The result? Products that last longer, less waste, and a cleaner, safer workplace.
With over 20 years of hands-on experience operating in demanding marine environments, we design, develop, and manufacture our high-tech laser cleaning solutions in-house. S-AXIS products are widely used in automation systems, robotics, special machinery, and industrial power transmission applications.
With our strong engineering expertise and flexible production capabilities, we aim to deliver the most suitable solution for every project.

S-AXIS, hassas güç iletimi gerektiren uygulamalar için DIN 808 standartlarında Cardan Joint (Hassas U Mafsal) üretimi yapan bir mühendislik markasıdır.

Standart ürünlerin yanı sıra; ölçü, açı, malzeme, tolerans ve uygulamaya özel gereksinimlere göre özelleştirilebilir çözümler sunuyoruz. Üretim süreçlerimizde yüksek hassasiyet, tekrarlanabilir kalite ve uzun ömürlü performans temel önceliklerimizdir.

S-AXIS ürünleri; otomasyon sistemleri, robotik uygulamalar, özel makineler ve endüstriyel güç aktarım çözümlerinde güvenle tercih edilmektedir.
Mühendislik yetkinliğimiz ve esnek üretim kabiliyetimizle, projelerinize en uygun çözümü sunmayı hedefliyoruz.

Integrated into the SANERGRID Group at the end of 2018, SONEC has been developing the “Services and Installation” activities for the group’s entities, notably SANERGRID and SYNERDIS. In 2020, SONEC became the first company in Europe certified by Kolektor ETRA and awarded the KESA (Kolektor ETRA Service Ability) label, authorizing it to supervise installation projects on behalf of the manufacturer.

As a designer of retention solutions since 2007, all our extinguishing basins and fireproof systems are validated by CNPP, the French fire laboratory in Vernon (certificate PE 11 8643A according to ERDF specifications). With SONEC, the SANERGRID Group consolidates its position as the French leader in the transformer retention basin market, offering French-manufactured products that comply with the latest NF-C13-200 and 17-300 standards.

Name: Airtork Kompresör ve Soğutma Sistemleri
Description:
Airtork Hakkında

Basınçlı hava sistemleri bizim için sadece bir iş değil, bir sorumluluk.
Her gün üretim sahalarında, makinelerin arasında, sistemlerin nabzını tutarak çalışıyoruz.

Airtork; kompresör bakımı, revizyon, enerji verimliliği analizleri ve basınçlı hava tesisat çözümleri sunan teknik bir ekiptir.
Bizim için iş, “sorunu çözmek” kadar “nedenini anlamaktır.”
Her ziyarette önce dinleriz, sonra ölçer, sonra çözüm üretiriz.

Sahada gördüğümüz her detay bizim için bir veri, her ölçüm bir adımdır.
Kaçak, basınç kaybı, enerji tüketimi ya da sistem dengesizliği…
Hepsi bizim için bir tabloyu tamamlayan parçalar.

Airtork ekibi, yıllardır aynı disiplini koruyan mühendisler ve teknisyenlerden oluşur.
Her bakımda, her raporda, her analizde amaç aynıdır:
Üretiminizin kesintisiz, güvenli ve verimli çalışmasını sağlamak.

Bursa ve çevre illerde yüzlerce tesiste aynı anlayışla sahadayız.
Her müşterimizi iş ortağı olarak görür, şeffaf biçimde çalışırız.
Ne yaptığımızı, neden yaptığımızı, nasıl sonuç verdiğini net şekilde paylaşırız.

Kısaca biz;
 Abartmadan, sözümüzü tutarak çalışan,
 Her işi kendi imzamızla yapan,
 Sadece sistem değil, güven inşa eden bir ekibiz.

Basınçlı hava sistemlerinde fark yaratan şey teknoloji değil, onu doğru kullanan insanlardır.
Biz o insanlarız.
Airtork – Basınçlı Hava Sistemlerinde Bakımın Ötesi.

Name: StokArti
Description:
StokArti is  an e-commerce platform that connects the commercial benefits of construction companies, bringing together the top contractors for collaboration and contributes to circular economy.

One of the problems of construction companies is that they might end up with an inventory full of building materials, equipment or spare parts at the end of the construction projects. If there is no other project to consume this inventory, the stocks are kept in the warehouse until they lost their commercial value, and then they get scraped.

Stokartı is a digital transformation initiative which defines a digital after sales marketplace without intermediary trades. The innovative B2B approach of Stokartı creates an international ecosystem that connects companies from various sectors including contractors, subcontractors, repair shops, part resellers, equipment rental companies. 

The ecosystem is equipped with lean tools which consist of listing and offer request features that matches product requests to the companies with correct profile. Stokartı have nearly 500 members from 53 countries worldwide with a listing of 16.000 stock items. Stokarti provides deals including not only in the domestic markets but also cross border transactions in EMEA region.

We use specialized tools for a wide range of valves and actuators with the most advanced pieces of test equipment and computer software assisting the engineers daily.

Name: CLK CNC LAZER KALİBRASYON HİZMETLERİ
Description:
CLKCNC KİMDİR?

CLKCNC Lazer Kalibrasyon Hizmetleri, CNC makine kalibrasyonu, lazer kalibrasyon, ballbar testi ve döner eksen kalibrasyonu alanlarında uzmanlaşmış bir teknik servis firmasıdır. CNC takım tezgâhlarında hassasiyetin ölçülmesi, doğruluğun belgelendirilmesi ve üretim kalitesinin artırılması için uluslararası standartlarda çözümler sunar.
Alanında tecrübeli mühendis ekibimizle, CNC makinelerinizin işleme hassasiyetini minimum hata ile sürdürülebilir hale getiriyoruz. Amacımız; CNC makinelerinin eksensel doğruluğunu, geometrik hassasiyetini ve servo performansını ölçülebilir ve belgelendirilebilir şekilde kontrol altına almanızı sağlamak.

ASLİ İŞİMİZ NEDEN KALİBRASYON?

Türkiye’de savunma sanayi, havacılık, otomotiv ve talaşlı imalat sektörlerinin hızla gelişmesiyle birlikte, CNC makinelerde yüksek hassasiyet her zamankinden daha önemli hale gelmiştir. Üretim süreçlerinde iş parçası toleranslarının daralması, makine doğruluğunun sürekli ölçülmesini ve kontrol edilmesini zorunlu kılmaktadır.
CNC lazer kalibrasyonu, ballbar testi, rotary eksen kalibrasyonu ve spindle çekme kuvveti testi gibi uygulamalar, bu doğruluğun korunmasında en etkili yöntemlerdir. Ancak bu yüksek teknolojili ekipmanlara sahip olmak ve süreçleri doğru şekilde uygulamak, birçok firma için hem yatırım hem işletme maliyetleri açısından zorluk oluşturur.
CLKCNC, kalibrasyonu sadece ek bir hizmet olarak değil, ana uzmanlık alanı olarak benimseyen bir ekip yapısıyla bu ihtiyaca çözüm sunar. Sahip olduğumuz mobil cihazlar ve deneyimli kadromuzla, CNC makinelerinizin doğruluğunu yerinde kalibrasyon hizmeti ile test eder, raporlar ve belgelendiririz.
Kalibrasyon bir maliyet değil, üretim güvenliğinin teminatıdır.
Doğru ölçülmeyen hiçbir süreç sağlıklı yönetilemez. Bu bilinçle, CNC makine kullanıcılarının ölçüm ve belgelendirme ihtiyacına yüksek standartlarda çözüm sağlıyoruz.

Name: Chalmers and Kubeck
Description:
LEADING THE MRO INDUSTRY 
Chalmers & Kubeck, Inc. is your trusted provider of industrial machining, maintenance and repair solutions.  Our state-of-the-art facility is a factory authorized repair center with ISO 9001:2015 registrations and a 10CFR50 compliant Nuclear Quality Program.  You can rest assured C&K’s expert staff has you covered: Nuclear Repair, Hydro Turbine Services, Welding & Fabrication, Thermal Spray & Grinding, CNC Machining and Gear Manufacturing, Valve & Actuation Services, and Rotating Equipment Repair for bearing housings, pumps, turbines gearboxes and compressors.  
 
Located just outside Philadelphia PA, C&K’s flagship facility is manned by 240 dedicated, highly-skilled employees with operation hours split into two 10-hour shifts. We understand the financial impact that a maintenance emergency has on your bottom line and we make it our mission to get your facility back up and running in the fastest and most efficient way possible.  Our calling card is our skilled team members and broad capabilities all under one roof - we are your “one stop shop”!

OUR EXPANSIVE FACILITIES 
The Chalmers & Kubeck main shop features both a 150,000 SQFT main building, in addition to a 27,000 SQFT dedicated valve shop. With over 130 machine tools, an impressive machining envelope, and lifting capacity up to 50T, we stand ready to meet your most demanding challenges.  
 
In addition to our flagship facility in Aston Pennsylvania, Chalmers & Kubeck is comprised of 11 other strategically positioned locations to provide prompt local service.  Each of our C&K Service Centers is known for dependable quality from our northernmost facility in New York all the way down to C&K South in Central Florida.

We are proud to provide local sales, service, and support for Clark-Reliance, Consolidated SRVs & PRVs, CPC Trim, Flender & SEW Gear Drives, HYDAC Hydraulic / Lube Systems, Jacoby-Tarbox, Jerguson, Limitorque Actuators, Masoneilan Control Valves and VELAN & HP Line Valves.

Vi är ett ständigt växande företag på många positioner och vi tar gärna in spontanansökningar om du är intresserad av att jobba hos oss. 
Våra Danska kollegor Fyns Kran Udstyr A/S som ingår i gemensamma koncernen WeDoLifting ,har funnits sedan 1969 och är ett förande företag inom lyftredskap och lyftverktyg, stållinor, taljor, kranar och relaterad utrustning för industri, marin och offshore - och mycket av allt detta används i dag över hela världen. Name: Bob White Electrix Australia
Description:
Founded in 1946 by Bob White operating out of his small backyard workshop located in Geelong. Today, Bob White Electrix is the preferred servicing choice of OEMs and operators of medium to large electric motors and generators in Australia and further abroad.

BWE service, repair and sell leading OEM electric motors including ABB, GE, Siemens, Toshiba, Mitsubishi, WEG, TECO, and much more. Its major service facility and workshop is located in Geelong, Victoria, near major road, air and sea ports.

The service facility includes extensive repairs, machining, fitting and testing capabilities, including Australia’s first high-speed balance pit, serviced by two 60 and 70-tonne gantry cranes. The facility also has four 1MW diesel generators onsite, enabling off-grid testing when required.

The company was acquired by ABB in 2012, before being purchased by an independent family-owned group in July 2022. Returning the business into local hands and continuing Bob White’s legacy as Australia’s leading electric motor and generator servicing company.

Name: Mid-Atlantic Truck & Equipment
Description:
The Beginning

Founded in 1985 by Rich Hood, Mid-Atlantic Waste Systems began in a modest office in Centreville, Maryland. Together with his wife, who was his first office manager and bookkeeper, Rich moved their office to Easton, Maryland in 1988, which subsequently became the Corporate headquarters location. In 1993, the Company opened an additional facility in Clinton, MD and continued a pattern of growth from that point on.

Today, Mid-Atlantic Waste serves customers with (8) eight fully staffed service locations in the Mid-Atlantic region. These facilities include Easton, MD; Clinton, MD; Chesapeake, VA; New Castle, DE; Salem, VA; Pittsburgh, PA; Manassas, VA; and Hampton, VA.

The Vision

Rich envisioned a company that would offer its customers superior quality in products, service, and parts. This vision has allowed the Company to grow to over 100 employees in eight offices. From the beginning, the Company’s purpose was not just to sell the best waste recycling products in the world but to give each customer outstanding quality, value, and service. At Mid-Atlantic Waste Systems, we strive to take care of the needs of our customers throughout the entire ownership process.

The Future

Mid-Atlantic Waste Systems would not exist without creating value for our customers through top-quality products combined with knowledgeable and committed employees. Name: ElectraClean
Description:
A ElectraClean oferece uma solução inovadora de limpeza para equipamentos elétricos e eletrônicos, utilizando tecnologia de nano-materiais. Sua abordagem permite a remoção eficaz de poeira, óleo, ácidos, sais alcalinos e umidade, fatores que podem comprometer o desempenho e a segurança dos equipamentos. 
A solução da ElectraClean é projetada para ser utilizada em equipamentos energizados ou desenergizados, abrangendo desde superfícies isolantes e buchas até reatores e bancos de capacitores. Além disso, é adequada para equipamentos de distribuição de energia de alta e baixa tensão, bem como dispositivos de comunicação de rede. 
Entre os benefícios proporcionados pela tecnologia da ElectraClean estão a redução de temperatura dos equipamentos, restauração do isolamento, melhoria no fluxo de ar para refrigeração, diminuição de ruídos e eliminação de eletricidade estática. A solução é inodora, não corrosiva, não inflamável, não tóxica, não condutiva e possui pH neutro, garantindo segurança e eficiência no processo de limpeza.

 That’s where Graeme comes in. Built with the idea in mind that whether its an SPX/APV, VIEX, GEA/KELVION, ALFA LAVAL, MUELLER or any other heat exchanger, we can help.

Description:
Notre objectif est d'augmenter votre rentabilité en améliorant le quotidien de vos collaborateurs !

ROOTS Industrie vous propose :

De diminuer vos pannes, vos coûts de production ainsi que vos risques d'erreurs.
D'améliorer vos processus, la transmission des compétences, les tâches répétitives.
De prolonger votre temps de production et la durée de vie de vos équipements.
De coupler les données, des machines, du terrain et de l'avancée de production pour une vision plus claire.

Savoir-faire Méthode et Maintenance :
- Diagnostique méthodique (5M, 5P...) Distinguer les causes et les conséquences d'une panne
- Remplacement des pièces défectueuses, modification des installations.
- Intégration des systèmes, montage et démontage (mécanique, électrique et pneumatique) des machines
- Modélisation 3D, création et fabrication de pièces pour modification (amélioration) 
- Fiabilisation des lignes de production, amélioration de la maintenabilité des équipements
- Exploitation des indicateurs clés de performances (TRS, MTTR, MTBF...) et données machines
- Rédaction de gammes de maintenance et des modes opératoires
- Audit sécurité machine, plan d'obsolescence

Savoir-faire Digitalisation :
- Faire bon du premier coup et dupliquer les connaissances grâce à notre solution de Réalité Mixte
- Afficher les KPI, les causes de pertes et bien plus grâce à la supervision de production
- Créer, planifier et assigner les tâches de maintenance à l'aide de notre GMAO simplifié
- Notre GMA-IA vous permettra d'analyser le fonctionnement de vos machines et prévoir la panne

 Savoir être :
- En écoutes active afin de bien définir votre besoin
- Constante remise en question en vue de nous améliorer
- Consciencieux, créatifs et curieux 
- Patients, organisés et méthodiques
- Notre détermination et notre adaptabilité font notre force

Alors n'hésitez plus et travaillons ensemble !

Description:
We help companies improve efficiency and accuracy whilst reducing energy consumption by using the latest and best cleaning technology on the market. 

Laser Tec is working alongside experts with vast, first-hand experience in the laser space to assist a wide variety of businesses and organisations, ranging from SMEs and local councils all the way through to multinational corporations. 

Whether you're in the car/antiques restoration business and are in need of a faster, safer solution for rust removal, an insurance company that could use a cost-effective way of removing smoke damage from buildings and high-value items, or even a local authority looking for a precise, delicate cleaning method for listed properties or monuments, laser technology IS the way forward. 

Not only can we provide the cleaning service ourselves but we can also help supply you or your organisation with a laser to suit your purposes. For example, we've found laser technology can be very effective in reducing down and improving efficiency in production lines for the baking and manufacturing industry.

Cleaning with laser technology involves....
• NO masking, 
• NO chemicals used, 
• NO abrasive consumables, 
• NO blast cabinets 
• NO grinding wheels, 
• NO noise, 
• NO dry ice blasting and best of all… 
• NO mess to clean up afterwards..

With the right calibration, we're confident laser technology can remove almost any contaminant from any given surface without damaging the substrate - want to put the tech to the test? Get in touch to book a demo...

Neben Kosteneinsparung ergeben sich besonders bei Vor-Ort-Reparaturen meist auch erhebliche Zeiteinsparungen, was für unsere Kunden mit geringeren Stillstandzeiten von Betriebs- oder Anlagenteilen verbunden ist. Trasformiamo macchine tradizionali rendendole a controllo numerico utilizzando materiali di ultima generazione per modernizzare, migliorare e aggiornare il loro funzionamento.

Questo permette alle aziende che si affidano alla nostra esperienza di aumentare la loro produttività, risparmiare sull’acquisto del nuovo (dal 50 al 70 %), ridurre l’impatto ambientale del consumo di massa e la produzione di rifiuti promuovendo un consumo più sostenibile.

#productivity #maintenance #retrofitting #revamping

For over 40 years, RMP has been the point of reference for the maintenance and overhaul of machine tools, in Italy and worldwide.

We are specialized in the retrofitting and revamping of production or non-functioning plants to restore productivity and transform them into 4.0 assets.

We transform traditional machines by making them numerically controlled using the latest technologies and materials, to modernize, improve and upgrade their operation.

This allows companies that rely on our expertise to increase their productivity, save on the purchase of new (50 to 70 %), reduce the environmental impact of mass consumption and waste production by promoting more sustainable consumption.

#productivity #maintenance #retrofitting #revamping

This can also be designed to help you in monitoring the condition of your electrical panels and electrical posts.

SEMEQ’s services and products are mainly intended to increase the availability of equipment by optimizing Predictive Maintenance. So check out how each can help you in your maintenance routine 

 Vibration Analysis: Detects more than 50 potential modes of mechanical failure in industrial equipment and agricultural machinery.
 MCE: Together with vibration analysis, it covers potential failure modes in electric motors and their power circuits.
 Thermography: Prevents power interruption and fires; detects mechanical failures in rotating and static equipment; and saves energy.
 Advanced technical Analysis with Artificial Intelligence: through Machine Learning, it detects potential failures in advance, indicating the possible causes.
 Oil Analysis: We have our own oil analysis laboratory, which indicates solutions to contamination problems and oil life and abnormal wear and tear of industrial equipment.
 Ultrasound: Saves energy in compressed air, steam and vacuum systems; detects failures in bearings, valves and electrical substations.

Name: Sling-Choker Academy
Description:
Celebrating 50 Years – And a New Era Begins

Sling-Choker Sudbury is proud to be the original location of Sling-Choker, where our journey began in 1975. For half a century, we’ve proudly served the industrial, mining, and construction sectors with high-quality lifting, rigging, and safety solutions.

2025 marks a major milestone - 50 years of serving Sudbury and beyond. As we celebrate this legacy, we’re also launching a bold new chapter: this page is now the official home of Sling-Choker Academy.

Sling-Choker Academy is our dedicated division for rescue, safety, and specialized training, supporting workers, emergency responders, and companies across high-risk industries. While our manufacturing operations continue under the Sling-Choker Manufacturing page, this Academy page will focus on:

 Safety & Rescue Training – High-angle, confined space, fall arrest, and emergency response programs

 Accessibility & Fall Protection Solutions – Including evacuation systems and compliance-focused tools

 Custom Safety Programs – Tailored to your worksite, your industry, and your crew

 Community Workshops & Industry Collaboration – Building real-world readiness through partnerships and hands-on education

Led by experienced professionals, including a 30-year police veteran, Sling-Choker Academy is committed to empowering people with the knowledge, skills, and tools they need to stay safe and effective on the job.

We honour our roots while stepping forward to build safer workplaces across Canada.

Follow us for updates on training programs, new safety innovations, and upcoming events.

#SlingChokerAcademy #SlingChokerManufacturing #50YearsStrong #SafetyTraining #RescueReady #FallProtection #Accessibility #WorkplaceSafety #MoreThanYouThink

Name: Flyby Shine- Home of the Power Wash Drone
Description:
Flyby Shine is a tech-forward commercial aesthetics company that helps facility managers, property teams and asset owners keep hard-to-reach exteriors clean and safe without lifts, scaffolding or added OSHA risk.

We combine drone technology, soft wash systems and pure water window cleaning to solve the jobs that slow everyone else down: mid-rise facades, roofs, tanks and glass on active sites where shutdowns are expensive.

Who we serve
	•	Facility managers and directors
	•	Commercial property and asset managers
	•	Industrial plants and terminals
	•	Schools, universities and government campuses
	•	REITs and portfolio owners who care about long-term asset health

What we do
	•	Drone-powered building washing and roof cleaning
	•	No-touch window and glass cleaning using DI water
	•	Exterior cleaning for tanks, stadiums and large facilities
	•	Planned maintenance programs that protect warranties and reduce repairs

How we are different
	•	Drone-first operations that remove most manlift use and reduce OSHA exposure
	•	Faster setup, less disruption and minimal footprint on busy sites
	•	Data-driven approach to planning, documenting and repeating exterior work
	•	Service-disabled veteran owned, with a safety mindset shaped by real world operations

For our clients, clean is only part of the win. We help them:
	•	Cut access and equipment headaches
	•	Reduce risk on every project
	•	Protect the building envelope and extend surface life
	•	Keep campuses and facilities looking like assets, not liabilities

If you manage facilities or building portfolios and want a safer, smarter way to handle exterior cleaning, follow Flyby Shine for practical insights and real project results or visit www.flybyshine.com to connect with our team.

Name: Infracon Pacific
Description:
Infracon started as a technical consultancy and project management firm specializing in technical infrastructure projects encompassing building systems, telecommunications infrastructure, critical systems, and plant control. The demand for our services arose from the gap between end-user requirements and construction specifications.

In today's advanced and technology-driven era, organizations increasingly integrate technical components into their projects to achieve efficiency, functionality, and manageability necessary for maintaining critical ICT/telecommunications infrastructure, HVAC, data centers, and electronic security systems at optimal efficiency and uptime levels. These disparities between requirements and specifications often result in project delays, changes, and budget overruns.

At Infracon, we address these challenges by offering client-centric design consultation, specification development, project management, User Acceptance Testing (UAT), auditing, and comprehensive design and construction services.

 La fourniture de panneaux solaires, d’onduleurs, de batteries et d’accessoires spécialisés pour la mise en œuvre de solutions solaires complètes et performantes.
 Les batteries stationnaires et solutions de stockage sur mesure.

 La création de salles de charge sécurisées, conformes aux normes les plus strictes.
 La maintenance, le suivi et le conseil pour prolonger la durée de vie des batteries.

Pionniers dans l’intégration de solutions performantes et durables, nous mettons un point d’honneur à réduire l’empreinte carbone de nos clients en alliant efficacité énergétique, innovation et durabilité.

Aujourd’hui, MAS Energy se positionne comme un acteur engagé dans la transition énergétique, en Belgique et dans les pays limitrophes, au service d’industries et de clients prestigieux tels que Safran, l’Oréal, la SNCB...

For a free demonstration or just some advice on the best floor cleaning machines for specific jobs then please get in touch.  01924 820876 or go to www.lincolncleaningtechnology.co.uk

Quem somos?
Desde 1997, a Plaman atende aos mais diversos serviços relacionados a manutenção industrial e técnicas preditivas, sempre focada em desenvolver parcerias duradouras com seus clientes. Nosso desafio de atender as necessidades e superar as expectativas dos clientes impõe um rigoroso critério na seleção de nossos fornecedores. Contamos com equipe técnica experiente, constantemente treinada e equipada para atender os mais elevados padrões de serviço com agilidade e profissionalismo.

A Plaman Compressores
Em 2012 em função da necessidade de nossos clientes por um atendimento de qualidade, iniciamos os trabalhos no segmento de ar comprimido e compressores de ar. Desde sempre focados na melhoria contínua e redução dos custos operacionais, realizamos avaliações no sistema de ar comprimido de nossos clientes e assim identificamos e quantificamos o potencial de redução de custos na geração de ar comprimido e elaboramos propostas dedicadas para a necessidade de cada cliente. Atualmente nossa divisão Plaman Compressores está plenamente capacitada para atender as mais diversas necessidades do setor industrial com soluções completas e inovadoras.

Solução completa nos sistemas de ar comprimido!
O ar comprimido é uma das mais importantes utilidades utilizada na industrial de modo geral. Embora o ar seja facilmente encontrado na natureza, o ar comprimido é uma fonte de energia muito cara ! Resultado do alto consumo de energia elétrica utilizado nos compressores de ar somados com o investimento necessário para aquisição de equipamentos somados aos custos variáveis na manutenção e gestão do sistema. Manter o sistema de ar comprimido operando de maneira confiável e eficiente é um trabalho que exige responsabilidade e conhecimento, uma vez que a maioria das indústrias dependem dessa fonte de energia para operar. Conte com a PLAMAN Compressores como um parceiro chave do seu negócio.

Name: SDT Ultrasound Solutions FR
Description:
Pendant des millénaires, l'homme s'est appuyé sur un sens aigu de l'ouïe pour nous avertir d'un danger, et aujourd'hui ce même attribut nous avertit lorsque nos équipements sont sur le point de tomber en panne. Mais lorsque les grondements et les bruits de fond des usines vous empêchent de percevoir les changements micro-soniques dans le fonctionnement d'un équipement, vous devez pouvoir mieux écouter. Par conséquent, améliorez vos capacités de surveillance de l'état des équipements grâce aux solutions à ultrasons de SDT et bénéficiez d'un avantage considérable par rapport aux concurrents qui continuent à appliquer une stratégie de gestion des équipements de type "faire fonctionner jusqu'à la défaillance". 

SDT fournit des solutions à ultrasons qui permettent à nos clients de mieux comprendre l'état de santé de leur usine. Nous les aidons à anticiper les pannes, à contrôler les coûts énergétiques et à améliorer la qualité des produits tout en contribuant à la disponibilité globale de leurs équipements.

Name: C.O.P. Service S.r.l.
Description:
C.O.P. Service è una realtà consolidata e altamente specializzata nella gestione e manutenzione di impianti HVAC-R, con un forte impegno verso l’innovazione tecnologica e la sostenibilità ambientale. Da anni affianchiamo i nostri clienti con soluzioni all’avanguardia, come 𝐂.𝐎.𝐏. 𝐁𝐨𝐱 𝐀𝐦𝐛𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞, un sistema innovativo di rilevazione automatica delle fughe di gas refrigerante brevettato dal Ministero dello Sviluppo Economico nel 2021.

La nostra tecnologia garantisce un monitoraggio continuo, preciso e proattivo degli impianti, permettendo di ottimizzare i consumi energetici, ridurre i costi di gestione e ridurre al minimo l’impatto ambientale. Questo sistema esclusivo rappresenta un esempio concreto della nostra capacità di coniugare innovazione e responsabilità ambientale efficacemente.

Servizi di manutenzione preventiva e predittiva
Per assicurare massimo rendimento, efficienza e affidabilità degli impianti HVAC-R, C.O.P. Service offre un servizio completo di manutenzione preventiva e predittiva. Grazie all’utilizzo di tecnologie avanzate e all’analisi dei dati in tempo reale, siamo in grado di prevenire guasti e fermi impianto, intervenendo con tempestività prima che emergano criticità.

I nostri interventi mirati permettono di ottimizzare la durata e le prestazioni degli impianti, riducendo sprechi e costi di gestione, oltre a pianificare attività di manutenzione senza impattare negativamente sulle attività produttive dei nostri clienti. Grande attenzione viene riservata alla sicurezza e al rispetto delle normative vigenti.

Mission aziendale
La nostra mission è supportare il cliente con servizi personalizzati, affidabili e orientati all’efficienza. Mettiamo a disposizione competenze tecniche specializzate e un approccio innovativo che coniuga sicurezza, risparmio energetico e sostenibilità ambientale.

Settori di riferimento
Ci rivolgiamo principalmente a realtà del settore terziario in cui la gestione efficiente degli impianti HVAC-R è fondamentale

Oferujemy najwyższej jakości obsługę, profesjonalnie wykonywane pomiary elektryczne (w tym również termowizyjne) jak również najbardziej efektywną z dostępnych na rynku technologię czyszczenia. 

Współpracujemy z największymi koncernami o zasięgu międzynarodowym, a także z firmami działającymi na rynku lokalnym. Indywidualnie podchodzimy do każdego Klienta.

Stosowana przez firmę 3N Solutions Sp. z o.o. technologia oparta jest na zastosowaniu innowacyjnego medium czyszczącego, którego głównym elementem jest mieszanka suchych gazów szlachetnych. Zanieczyszczenia usuwane z urządzeń i podzespołów w miejscu podania mieszanki, zabierane są automatycznie poprzez wyciąg ciśnieniowy.

Jesteśmy dumni, gdyż z sukcesem i satysfakcją klienta wykonaliśmy wszelkie dotychczas postawione przed nami zadania, a wszyscy nasi partnerzy wystawili nam pozytywne referencje kontynuując z nami współpracę.

Name: Luchtdruk Meesters
Description:
Hallo, mijn naam is Tom Kruiskamp en ik ben de trotse oprichter van LuchtdrukMeesters. Ik wil je graag kennis laten maken met ons bedrijf en wat we doen.

Bij LuchtdrukMeesters draait alles om professionaliteit en kwaliteit. We zijn gespecialiseerd in hoogwaardige perslucht oplossingen voor diverse sectoren. Onze missie is om open, eerlijk en transparant advies en installatiewerk te leveren aan bedrijven die behoefte hebben aan een oplossing voor hun perslucht 'uitdagingen'.

Met trots kunnen we zeggen dat we werken met de beste compressor merken en leidingwerk van onder andere #Airpipe & #Aquapipe. Dit stelt ons in staat om betrouwbare en efficiënte oplossingen te bieden aan onze gewaardeerde klanten. We begrijpen dat perslucht essentieel is voor jouw bedrijfsprocessen en we streven ernaar om je volledig te ontzorgen op dit gebied. Daarom bieden we ook onderhoudsdiensten voor compressorinstallaties, zodat jij je kunt concentreren op waar je goed in bent, terwijl wij zorgen voor de optimale werking van je persluchtsysteem.

Onze klanten bevinden zich in verschillende sectoren, zoals de industriële sector, bouwsector, medische sector, technische sector en landbouwsector. We begrijpen de specifieke behoeften van elk van deze sectoren en passen onze oplossingen daarop aan. Wat ons onderscheidt, is onze persoonlijke benadering en onze toewijding aan professionaliteit en kwaliteit. We geloven in het opbouwen van langdurige relaties met onze klanten, gebaseerd op eerlijkheid en betrouwbaarheid.

Ik nodig je uit om contact met mij op te nemen als je op zoek bent naar hoogwaardige perslucht oplossingen. Samen kunnen we jouw perslucht 'problemen' aanpakken en werken aan een efficiënter en succesvoller bedrijf. Laten we de kracht van perslucht benutten en samenwerken voor optimale prestaties.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Tom Kruiskamp
LuchtdrukMeesters

Name: Alpha Diagnostics Ltd
Description: Alpha Diagnostics understands the importance of connecting your machines with the digital world. IoT and Industry 4.0 are knocking on your door, it is therefore time to move to the next level of maintenance efficiency, and to rethink your asset maintenance strategy. AlphaSystem provides a revolutionary predictive diagnostic system (PDS) for combustion engines, rotating machines and bearings. As a plus, AlphaSystem offers a powerful algorithm to determine shaft torque. AlphaSystem is easy to retrofit to all kinds of assets, providing operators with the big picture as well as detailed reports. It provides information on the condition of a machine by monitoring torsional vibration. AlphaSystem allows you to be proactive in your maintenance by alerting you to upcoming issues, eliminating last minute and cost intensive maintenance emergencies.

Description:

• New Equipment: Process machinery from trusted global manufacturers to improve efficiency and throughput.
• Aftermarket Parts: Genuine and compatible parts to keep your systems running smoothly, with reduced lead times.
• Field Service: Trained technicians deliver on-site support and work directly with OEMs to ensure your equipment performs at its best.

Our strategically located warehouse near Chicago allows us to stock critical and high-volume parts, minimizing downtime for your operations. We offer custom stocking plans to meet your specific needs!

GQI was created to fill a service and support gap in the industry. We believe in building long-term, collaborative relationships with our customers. From equipment selection to end-of-life support, we’re with you every step of the way.

Name: Bio Circle Yüzey Teknolojileri
Description:
30 yılı aşkın bir süredir firmamız Bio Circle, müşteri temizlik süreçlerini optimize etmek, aynı zamanda çevresel etkiyi azaltmak ve kullanıcıların sağlığını ve refahını artırmak için teknoloji, kimya, biyoloji ve hizmetin bir kombinasyonunu kullanıyor.

Misyonumuz, 'işleri yapmanın eski yolunu' maliyet ve karbon bilincine sahip verimli, akıcı süreçlere dönüştürmektir.

Biz buna "MAKING GREEN WORK" diyoruz.

Kendi yan kuruluşlarımızla 15'ten fazla ülkede faaliyet gösteriyoruz ve dünya çapında 65'ten fazla ülkede varlığımız var.
 
Bio-Circle sistemleri; otomotiv, CNC imalat, gıda başka olmak üzere bütün endüstri dallarında ve havacılık, ulaştırma, demiryolu gibi sektörlerde kullanılmaktadır. 

Sistemlerimiz Avrupa ve Dünya'da her gün binlerce üretim, bakım, onarım ve revizyon tesislerinde kullanılmaktadır.  
 
Teknolojilerimiz ve sistemlerimiz temizleme gücünde oldukça etkilidir. Yağ ve gres temizleme, yüzey hazırlama, boru ve kalıp temizliği ve uzman boya ve vernik temizliğinde kullanılır.

Ekipman yelpazemiz, kullanımı güvenli olan ve geleneksel solvent bazlı temizleyiciler ve diğer tehlikeli maddelere kıyasla iç ve dış hava kirliliğine en aza indirilmiş katkısı olan VOC içermeyen veya VOC azaltılmış temizleme sıvılarımızla birlikte çalışmak üzere özel olarak tasarlanmıştır.
 
Avantajlar şunları içerir: Uygunluk I Maliyet Kontrolü I Verimlilik I Çevre Koruma I Sağlık ve Refah I Koku Kontrolü I Düzenli Hizmet - Bio-Circle Teknolojilerinin tesislerinizde ve operasyonlarınızda temizlik süreçlerini optimize edebileceği yolları keşfetmek için neden bizimle iletişime geçmiyorsunuz?

Description:

Soluciones Predictivas para la Optimización de Activos Industriales

En ENGINEERING MAINTENANCE GROUP S.A.C., ofrecemos mantenimiento predictivo y gestión de confiabilidad para maximizar la productividad y minimizar costos operativos. Con más de 15 años de experiencia, ayudamos a empresas a prevenir fallos, reducir tiempos de inactividad y mejorar el rendimiento de sus activos a través de tecnología avanzada y estrategias personalizadas.

Nuestros servicios incluyen:

Análisis de vibraciones para diagnóstico y prevención de fallas en máquinas rotativas.
Análisis de lubricantes certificado (ICML) para optimizar el rendimiento de equipos.
Termografía infrarroja para detectar fallas en sistemas eléctricos y mecánicos.
Consultoría en confiabilidad: Implementación de estrategias RCM para asegurar la longevidad y eficiencia de los activos.
¿Por qué nosotros?

Reducimos costos operativos y aumentamos la disponibilidad de equipos.
Monitoreo proactivo para prevenir fallos y maximizar la vida útil de tus activos.
Soluciones personalizadas que se alinean con tus objetivos operativos.
Contáctanos para descubrir cómo podemos ayudarte a optimizar tus activos y mejorar la confiabilidad de tu operación.

Name: MovParts Empilhadeiras
Description:
Distribuição, Comercialização e Assistência Técnica de Empilhadeiras Multimarcas.
A MOVPARTS Fundada em 2013, no norte do Brasil na cidade de Manaus – AM, iniciou suas atividades prestando serviços de manutenção em empilhadeiras, hoje Representante, Distribuidor e Assistência técnica Autorizada da marca EP.
Reconhecida no mercado pelo seu amplo mix de produtos e serviços. Atende à demanda de empresas e mercados de alta competitividade em diversos segmentos em todo o território nacional, onde há necessidade de obter o máximo retorno, viabilizando operações de movimentação e armazenagem de carga com baixo custo operacional. Oferece variedade de marcas em equipamentos com capacidade de carga de 1 a 10 toneladas, para comercialização e aluguel. Tudo isso, seguindo um rigoroso padrão de qualidade para garantir o crescimento sustentável e lucrativo dos seus clientes.
Missão
Nossa missão é participar, com excelência e rapidez, nas soluções para um melhor alinhamento e funcionamento da logística das empresas, através de uma diversa linha de equipamentos, produtos e serviços. Combinamos as vantagens competitivas de excelência operacional com a estratégia de conexão direta às empresas, fornecendo produtos de alta qualidade, confiança e totalmente seguros.
Visão
Nossa visão é ter presença global no segmento de movimentação e armazenagem de carga, com produtos de alta qualidade, serviços e soluções práticas em tempo hábil.
Valores
Eles desempenham um papel crucial, porque nos permitem ter um desenvolvimento seguro e saudável como empresa.
Acreditamos firmemente, que nossos valores são parte fundamental para o nosso trabalho diário e influenciam nosso comportamento individual e nossas interações com colegas, superiores, funcionários, clientes, fornecedores e candidatos, a fim de contribuir para um mundo melhor.

Contact email  contactactivepartnership@gmail.com  mobil 0747 057 402.

■ Brandul german INDU-SOL este orientat către echipamente pentru monitorizarea și diagnosticarea rețelelor industriale
■ Soluțiile sunt eficiente pentru ca utilajele și secțiile Dvs. să funcționeze sigur și fără defecțiuni. Ca ambasadori ai fabricantului INDU-SOL GmbH, specialist în rețele industriale promovam detecția cuprinzatoare a retelelor industriale prin intermediul switch-urilor.
■ Prin cele mai recente echipamente marca germană INDU-SOL GmbH sunt realizate rețele inteligente, avantajul fiind reprezentat de permanenta înregistrare pentru identificarea timpurie a punctelor slabe ale rețelei. Apare în acest caz conceptul de mentenanță centralizată.
■ Testarea ciclică sau permanentă a stării rețelei ar trebui să fie dorința fiecărui planificator de sistem, instalator, întreținător și inginer de servicii.
■ Cu seturile de diagnostic PROFIBUS, PROFINET , EMC, ASi beneficiați de economii mari în comparație cu achiziționarea separată a dispozitivelor.
■ O monitorizare permanentă a rețelelor Fieldbus și a rețelelor dvs. creează condițiile necesare pentru o performanță înaltă pe termen lung a mașinilor și instalațiilor Dvs.
■ Pentru PROFIBUS, PROFINET, Ethernet industrial și alte rețele obișnuite în industrie - de la planificarea unei noi instalații sau modernizarea rețelelor existente, la supravegherea testelor de acceptare, precum și măsurători și depanare - suntem partenerul Dvs.
■ Întreținerea preventivă este mentenanța prin care se efectuează în mod regulat pe un echipament pentru a diminua probabilitatea de a se defecta. Se efectuează în timp ce echipamentul încă funcționează astfel încât să nu se deterioreze pe neașteptate. În ceea ce privește complexitatea acestei strategii de întreținere, aceasta se încadrează între întreținerile predictivă si cea reactivă

Our mission is to be a recognised leader and preferred provider for our valued customers; by delivering unequalled instrument sales, repairs and calibration services through a highly qualified staff of trained professionals, with total commitment to quality, accuracy and reliability.

Our People:
We are pleased to be able to provide a friendly, flexible service and experience you can trust. Em 2020 aBRX Imagemobteve junto à Comissão Nacional de Energia Nuclear – CNEN as autorizações para manutenção (matrícula: 17520) e operação de equipamentos de inspeção de bagagens e contêineres (matrícula: 17456).

Em 2022, obteve a sua primeira operação dos equipamentos de inspeção de contêineres, em um grande terminal portuário brasileiro.

A BRX Imagem vêm implementando as novas tecnologias, com o objetivo de trazer mais eficiência e qualidade na manutenção e análise das imagens dos equipamentos de inspeção de bagagens, contêineres e consequentemente melhorando os resultados para os nossos clientes e a Receita Federal do Brasil – RFB.

rules and regulations

Name: Structural Mechanical Systems

SMS personnel are also trained in pneumatic controls, valve actuation, valve and pump maintenance, and hydraulic flushing. Our team of technicians, mechanics, and QA personnel work together to remove, repair, reinstall, align, and hydro test these systems.
We also operate a full-service valve and pumps repair facility. We perform repairs, testing, and installation on nearly every type of valve and pump and are experienced with gate valves, globe valves, relief valves, boiler safety valves, swing check valves, ball valves, butterfly valves, pressure/vacuum valves, and duplex strainers.
We remove, service, and install temperature and pressure control valves, operators, controllers, piston pumps, centrifugal pumps, wastewater pumps, fire-main pumps, lube oil pumps, and feed pumps from a diverse range of manufacturers.
Our machine shop also provides all the necessary support for fabrication, inspection, repair, and testing of the equipment we service and sell.

Teollisuuden kunnossapitopalvelut tarjoaa laajasti erilaisia huoltopalveluita asiakkaiden tarpeiden mukaisesti, oli kyseessä sitten ennaltaehkäisevä huolto, korjaus tai vikakorjaus.

Olemme luotettava kumppani kaikille teollisuuden alan yrityksille, jotka tarvitsevat ammattitaitoista ja laadukasta hitsauspalvelua. Meillä on käytössä kantavien teräsrakenteiden CE-merkintä (EN 1090-1).

Name: Diagnostic Solutions Ltd
Description:
Diagnostic Solutions designs world-class Predictive Maintenance and Vibration Analysis solutions, competitively priced with no compromise on data quality. Our expert team specialises in software, hardware, sensors, data analytics and remote condition assessment.

 Vibration products /  Handheld solutions

Our vibration products push the boundaries of value and innovation, using low noise sensors with at least a 10kHz flat frequency response and 24-bit data converters. Our commitment to quality underpins our measurement systems' ability to detect faults early for all-important early maintenance intervention.

• uClip 920/BLE Single-Channel 24-bit Measurement Pod wearable device for collecting 24-bit AC or ICP dynamic data as part of a walkaround vibration measurement system for optimal quality vibration condition assessment results.
• uMote EU IIOT Wireless 24bit smart Vibration sensor using IIOT LoRaWAN wireless networking system; takes all the readings needed to diagnose common machine faults and transmit data to the cloud
• uBlock IIOT Vibration and Temperature Sensor
• uBridge 16842/4G IIoT/Industry 4.0-compatible Intelligent Condition Monitoring solution for all types of critical production plant assets.

 Remote Analysis Services

Our advanced analysis software tools are only available to our dedicated, highly trained in-house team of Predictive Maintenance specialists. 24/7 asset monitoring in your language of choice.

 Integration and machine learning

Our complete solution embeds interoperability and decentralised decision making for optimal reliability. Our uBridge hardware platform has been designed to push cloud and local intelligence into any 4-20mA compatible system. Key process / speed and manufacturing data can be combined with many Reliability metrics to turn machine intelligence into Reliability. Data clustering and learned diagnostic symptom tags build up accurate machinery component cases with proven alarm setpoints.

Name: Consorzio Del Bo
Description:
Le origini dell'azienda risalgono agli inizi dello scorso secolo.
Nel 1908 Giovanni del Bo si trasferì da Pavia a Napoli per aprirvi una piccola concessionaria di ascensori. Nel corso degli anni l'azienda acquisì una propria linea produttiva ed un marchio che divenne sempre più conosciuto e che, tra alterne vicende e ben due guerre mondiali, è vissuto sino ad oggi. 

Oggi il Consorzio Del Bo è costituito da otto società di capitali, di cui due per azioni, attive nella costruzione, montaggio, manutenzione di ascensori, scale e tappeti mobili, impianti termici ed elettrici, oltre a sistemi integrati di trasporto bagagli ed impianti tecnologici in genere.
Significativi per il settore i numeri raggiunti: 18 Filiali per oltre 26.000 impianti elevatori gestiti in manutenzione, 350 collaboratori interni impiegati, 66 milioni di euro il fatturato aggregato di tutte le società Del Bo. 
Con un insediamento produttivo di 40.000 metri quadrati nell'area industriale di Caivano (Na) e sedi principali a Napoli, Roma e Milano, il Consorzio Del Bo si trova ai vertici nel settore del mercato di riferimento, subito dopo i colossi multinazionali, da cui peraltro si distingue in modo radicale, conservando una struttura organizzativa efficiente e dinamica ed una flessibilità tipica delle aziende a carattere familiare.

Our skilled technicians are trained to handle a wide range of maintenance tasks, from routine inspections to complex repairs. With regular maintenance, we help extend the lifespan of your equipment, minimize downtime, and maximize energy efficiency.

At BRS, we understand the importance of timely and responsive service. We provide efficient scheduling and prioritize your needs to ensure minimal disruption to your operations. Our dedicated team is available to address any concerns or emergencies, offering prompt and reliable support whenever you need it.

As your trusted partner, we are committed to your satisfaction. We strive to exceed your expectations by delivering exceptional customer service, cost-effective solutions, and timely project completion. With BRS, you can have peace of mind knowing that your boiler systems are in capable hands.

Contact Boiler Room Solutions today to discuss your boiler equipment, maintenance, and service requirements. We look forward to serving you.

• Certificación ISO 45001, que respalda nuestro compromiso con la seguridad y salud en el trabajo.
• Calificación del 89% en el RUC, evidencia de nuestro cumplimiento en estándares HSEQ exigidos por contratantes del sector industrial.
• Certificación en Responsabilidad Social Empresarial, otorgada por Fenalco Solidario, que reconoce nuestras acciones responsables con el entorno y la comunidad.
• Actualmente avanzamos en la implementación de las normas ISO 9001 (Gestión de Calidad) y ISO 14001 (Gestión Ambiental), fortaleciendo nuestra gestión organizacional y sostenibilidad.

En Totalmontajes S.A.S, creemos que cada proyecto es una oportunidad para construir progreso con seguridad, responsabilidad y eficiencia. Nuestra propuesta de valor se basa en la confiabilidad técnica, el cumplimiento riguroso y un compromiso constante con la excelencia.

A Planccor tem orgulho de sua história e de seus valores, que são: comprometimento, ética, inovação, respeito e transparência. Esses valores norteiam a missão da empresa, que é ser referência no mercado de manutenções industriais, oferecendo soluções eficientes e personalizadas para cada cliente. “A adaptação à mudança e aos desafios permite-nos crescer não só como indivíduos, mas como sociedade.”

Description:
Grupo Hydren
Hydren Equipos Industriales S.L es una empresa establecida en Barcelona, España, formada por un equipo humano multidisciplinario que cuenta con más de 15 años de experiencia en el sector industrial europeo, y más recientemente, en el mercado latinoamericano.

Hydren Equipos Industriales S.L. surge con la finalidad de asesorar y ofrecer soluciones específicas y de calidad a las necesidades industriales en las áreas de hidráulica, refrigeración industrial y control  de procesos. Desde 2012, Hydren cuenta con una sede en Venezuela, para atender y dar un mejor servicio a las necesidades de la industria local.

¿Qué ofrecemos?
•Amplia experiencia en el cálculo, el suministro y puesta en marcha de equipos y proyectos de hidráulica y refrigeración industrial.
•Una excelente relación comercial establecida por más de 10 años con los primeros fabricantes de sistemas hidráulicos y de refrigeración europeos.
•Servicio pre/pos venta y mantenimiento de equipos.
•Una amplia gama de productos adecuados que nos permite ofrecer un abanico de soluciones a medida.

¿Por qué?
La adecuada refrigeración de los fluidos, el mantenimiento, la lubricación de los elementos de accionamiento y la correcta instalación de elementos de control, son la clave para garantizar la continuidad en la producción, minimizando las variaciones del proceso y en consecuencia los costes.

Treinamento: Capacitação de equipes para operar e manter os equipamentos de maneira eficiente e segura.

Expertise Técnica: Nossa equipe é composta por técnicos altamente qualificados e com vasta experiência no setor.

Our mission: minimize downtime, secure productivity and extend the sustainable use of existing machinery.

As a pioneer in CNC machine service, we combine decades of experience with state-of-the-art technology.

Our Services at a Glance:

 Spare Parts & Components
Over 40,000 spare parts, available 24/7 online. Sales, exchange or repair solutions – including a 25-month warranty.

 Repairs – Electronics & Mechanics
CNC controls, motors, servo drives, measuring systems and more.
Supported by 200+ in-house test benches, X-ray analysis, flying probe testing and our own workshops.

 On-Site Service
Fast troubleshooting and efficient repairs directly at your facility – minimizing downtime and maximizing availability.

 Retrofit Program
Modernization of proven CNC machines (from Wendt to Waldrich Coburg):
– Use of current components for improved spare parts availability
– Increased precision, quality, productivity and output
– Compliance with legal and safety requirements incl. CE marking
– Integration into Industry 4.0, automation and robotics

 Prefit – Prevention Instead of Downtime
Proactive inspection and replacement of wear-prone electronic components to prevent unplanned machine failures – an economical approach aligned with predictive maintenance.

Our service philosophy is built on reliability, fast response times and transparency – with fair conditions and no hidden emergency surcharges.
Customers from tool and mold making, mechanical engineering and series production rely on us as a trusted technical partner.

 Looking to reduce downtime or future-proof your CNC machines?
Get in touch – we will find the right solution.

Name: Interflon Indonesia
Description:
Interflon manufactures high performance lubricants, cleaners and hardware. Our purpose is to help you to move forward in a constantly evolving world with innovative lubrication solutions. We operate in more than 50 countries, servicing over 135.000 clients in all kinds of industries. We give the market a new working method: we reframe Technical Maintenance.

Interflon helps companies to reduce their maintenance and energy costs, at the same time reducing down-time. We employ 400 skilled Technical Advisors worldwide to assist our customers on-site in optimizing their processes and implementing the selected Interflon lubricants converting them into real cost saving solutions. We offer you lubricants with exceptionally good performance for industrial and food processing equipment maintenance purposes. Our products reduce maintenance cost, power consumption and CO2 emissions whilst promoting component reliability and factory output. Our portfolio includes industrial and NSF listed lubricants in all current viscosity grades for first assembly, repair and maintenance work. Similarly, we can provide you with cost saving ecological cleaners.

Unlike conventional petrochemical lubricants, Interflon products are fortified with high performance additives and MicPol particles. These particles form a solid ultra thin lubrication film that provides for a very long lasting lubrication film at the lowest friction. In this way, Interflon lubricants reduce friction and wear much better than conventional lubricants, in particular, in adverse conditions of extreme loads, high and low temperatures, strong contamination and in high water wash areas.

Interflon customers experience considerably lower lubrication labour cost and lubricant consumption rates. They prolong the service life of their critical components bringing down-time to a minimum, reduce power consumption and CO2 emissions and improve equipment utilization rates and reliability at the same time.

Arinord è in grado di progettare, realizzare e manutenere impianti completi di gas compressi e refrigerazione acqua per uso industriale, evitando sprechi energetici, economici e mantenendo la qualità dell’aria o dei gas elevata secondo gli standard richiesti dal cliente.
Ci miglioriamo ogni giorno, per essere sempre all’altezza delle vostre aspettative, la nostra priorità è la continua innovazione ed il crescente sviluppo del conoscere, solo così possiamo mantenere elevato lo standard dei nostri servizi.

Además, en Brema nos preocupamos por el desarrollo y la capacitación, brindando consultorías, cursos y asesorías para que nuestros clientes y su personal operen sus sistemas de forma segura y efectiva.

Con proyectos exitosos en hoteles, spas y diversas industrias, somos un socio estratégico para quienes buscan soluciones personalizadas y un servicio excepcional.

Confía en Brema para maximizar el rendimiento de tus sistemas de calentamiento de agua.

Name: Göksu Maschinenmontagen GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Göksu Maschinenmontagen GmbH & Co. KG – Ihr Partner für professionelle Maschinenmontagen und industrielle Dienstleistungen

Die Göksu Maschinenmontagen GmbH & Co. KG mit Sitz im Raum Stuttgart ist seit nahezu 30 Jahren ein inhabergeführtes Unternehmen, das erfolgreich Dienstleistungen im Bereich der leichten bis schweren Industrie- und Maschinenmontage anbietet. Unser Leistungsspektrum umfasst Montagen, Demontagen, Remontagen, Anlagenbau, fachgerechte Lagerung, weltweite Transportlogistik sowie die umwelt- und fachgerechte Entsorgung von Produktionsanlagen. 

Unsere Kernkompetenzen:

- Maschinenmontage: Maßgeschneiderte Leistungen für Maschinenmontagen und Betriebsumzüge mit Fokus auf Präzision und Effizienz. 

- Schwergutlagerung: Über 10.000m² gedeckte Schwergutfläche mit Krananlagen bis zu 230t/320t Hakenlast für sichere und effiziente Lagerlösungen. 

- Verpackungslogistik: Individuelle Verpackungslösungen für den sicheren Transport Ihrer Maschinen und Anlagen.

- Maschinentransporte: Witterungsgeschützte Transporte mit eigenem Fuhrpark für eine zuverlässige Lieferung. 

- Reinraummontagen: Spezialisierte Montagen für Branchen wie Batteriezellenherstellung, Halbleiterindustrie, Luftfahrt und Pharmaindustrie. 

Unsere Werte – Integrität, Kundenorientierung, soziale Verantwortung, Umweltbewusstsein und gegenseitiger Respekt – bilden die Basis unseres täglichen Handelns. Mit höchster Qualität, Präzision und Perfektion realisieren wir Ihre Projekte termingerecht und kosteneffizient. 

Göksu Maschinenmontagen – Qualität, die sich auszahlt.

Name: Kolben - Técnica em Motores

Realizamos o monitoramento periódico dos equipamentos através da análise da tendência de desgaste, mantendo o desgaste dentro das condições normais de funcionamento. Também monitoramos outros equipamentos mecânicos, tais como: turbinas a diesel, gás ou vapor, monitorando-os com ensaios em óleos lubrificantes e combustíveis. Name: My Buddys Mobile Detail
Description:
Dhiraj Sane founded "My Buddy's Mobile Detail" in 2020, with extensive knowledge in automotive to recreation vehicle and marine craft detailing spanning over 20 years.

During his years of industry service, Dhiraj Sane observed a significant disparity in the performance of various detailing products. Realizing that the average consumer lacked the opportunity to try the diverse range of products he had experience with, he decided to bridge this gap by creating his own product line, thereby providing both education and access to his industry expertise. 

His work and product line has been recognized and endorsed by Exotics & Mimosas, which is a testament to the quality and excellence of his services. Exotics & Mimosas, founded by Joel Buckley, is an exclusive social auto club based in San Antonio that brings the passion of our exotics and premium cars with friendly-minded individuals. The club provides a high-end venue with entertainment, educational, social activities, and other activities centered on the betterment of the club members and their guests.  

He acknowledges that specific detailing tasks are too intricate to tackle alone, and his company is well-suited to be the go-to source for help. For example, swirl marks, overspray, hard water spots, oxidized paint, ceramic coatings, or stubborn substances like tar and tree sap necessitate an expert to guarantee a comprehensive clean.

CORE VALUES

2.	Technical Expertise: We maintain a deep understanding of cutting-edge laser 
         technology and leverage our technical expertise to deliver innovative 
         solutions.
3.	Quality: We are committed to upholding the highest standards of quality and

4.	Integrity: We conduct our business with honesty, transparency, and ethical 
        standards.
5.	Collaboration: We cultivate an environment of open communication and

6.	Safety: We place the safety of our clients and our employees as a top priority

7.	Sustainability: We strive to minimize our environmental impact through

Name: PM Service
Description:
PM Service is het gespecialiseerde verlengstuk van PM Elektro en richt zich volledig op drie essentiële pijlers binnen de paneelbouw: advies, monitoring en onderhoud.

Met jarenlange ervaring in de sector begrijpen we als geen ander hoe belangrijk betrouwbaarheid en continuïteit zijn voor technische installaties. Daarom ondersteunen we onze klanten met doordacht advies, zodat zij altijd de juiste keuzes maken bij het ontwikkelen, uitbreiden of verduurzamen van hun energieverdeler.

Dankzij geavanceerde Energie Monitoring Systemen kunnen we het volledige verbruik van je gebouw, installatie of productieproces inzichtelijk maken en kan je doelgericht meewerken aan verduurzaming en voldoe je gemakkelijk aan de verplichte wet-en regelgeving.

Daarnaast verzorgen we het preventief en correctief onderhoud aan bestaande of nieuwe energieverdelers, afgestemd op de specifieke behoeften van elke klant. Of het nu gaat om een éénmalige inspectie of een meer jarig onderhoudsplan, PM Service zorgt voor veilige, efficiënte en toekomstbestendige oplossingen.

Wij geloven in een duurzame samenwerking waarin Elektro en Service samenkomen. PM Service staat klaar als betrouwbare partner voor bedrijven die geen concessies willen doen aan kwaliteit en continuïteit.

 Parlons de vos projets
