Name: Skyner Engineering Services Ltd
Description:
We have been established for 5 years as Skyner Engineering Services Limited and have extensive experience prior to that. 
We specialise in preventative maintenance for factories in the local area, making sure that their production lines run smoothly. We do this by monitoring their machinery and advising on upgrades before there are breakdowns causing non scheduled down time.
Along side the on site work we have two workshops based on Zone 1 Deeside Industrial Estate. One workshop is used a machine shop and we have manual lathes, manual mill, CNC lathe and CNC mill which are a variety of sizes and capable of one off jobs or bulk making parts. The second unit is used a welding workshop where we do MIG, TIG and ARC welding.

Name: Carbon Free Ox
Description:
We work with a range of businesses on a global scale, all of whom share the same goal; to reduced costs while also reducing emissions. 

Our range of products offer huge benefits across any industry that consumes diesel and petrol the only constraint is having a desire to save money while reducing their emissions footprint across more than just Carbon Dioxide.

Industry has been seeking a way to significantly reduce the cost of maintaining its capital equipment whilst being non-toxic to the environment. Friction and poor combustion are the greatest destroyers of vehicles and machinery, efficiency and performance; and the environment. 

We provide the industrial world with the most innovative and powerful lubricants and fuel additives that not only extend the life of equipment but also reduce greenhouse gas emissions, fuel consumption, maintenance, and replacement parts costs. EliminoxEco, The Fuel Ox Infinity Lube and Fuel Ox fuel additive line of products have accomplished this and by doing so offer value far beyond that what exists in the market.

È grazie alla fiducia delle aziende che in questi anni ci hanno scelto ripetutamente che manteniamo sempre forte lo stimolo a migliorarci.
Portiamo con noi i valori e le conoscenze della tradizione meccanica italiana unite alle strumentazioni più attuali, garantendo ai clienti la professionalità dei nostri tecnici ed il supporto di un’officina meccanica adeguatamente attrezzata per ogni tipo di intervento di manutenzione.
Il cuore pulsante delle nostre attività è rappresentato dall’officina meccanica, uno spazio operativo di 1.500 mq dove è possibile effettuare numerose tipologie di lavorazioni meccaniche e realizzare componenti tecnici destinati agli interventi da effettuarsi on site.

Les six filiales de Galilé Manutention couvrent un large périmètre allant de Dijon (21) à Marseille (13), ainsi que de Marseille (13) à Bordeaux (33) permettant d’offrir à chaque client la puissance d’un acteur national et la réactivité d’un partenaire local en s’adaptant aux évolutions du marché.

Nous distribuons nos équipements et produits à l'échelle nationale, avec un service après-vente principalement actif dans les départements des Bouches-du-Rhône (13), du Gard (30) et du Var (83).

 Nous offrons à nos clients une large gamme de solutions, incluant la location d'équipements à court et long terme, la vente de matériels neufs et d'occasion, la distribution de pièces détachées et de fournitures industrielles, ainsi que des contrats de service personnalisés.
Partenaire de Bobcat, Mitsubishi Forklift, Stockman, Haulotte, Hangcha, EP et Tennant, notre expertise s'étend à une vaste sélection de matériels, tels que les chariots élévateurs, transpalettes, gerbeurs, chariots préparateurs de commandes, chariots télescopiques, tracteurs logistiques, nacelles, plateformes élévatrices (PEMP), autolaveuses, monobrosses et balayeuses.

 Prestations de services
Grâce à nos techniciens formés, nous vous proposons une gamme complète de services SAV réactifs, incluant le dépannage, la réparation, l'entretien, la maintenance, les contrôles VGP, la remise en service et le reconditionnement de matériels.

Essa trajetória nos levou à representação exclusiva da HERZOG Maschinenfabrik no Brasil, líder mundial em automação de laboratórios de mineração. Parceria estratégica que reforçou a nossa posição como referência nacional em tecnologia de preparação automatizada de amostras minerais e controle de qualidade industrial.

Garantimos a excelência de nossos serviços por meio de uma equipe interna altamente especializada e da combinação de experiência local com tecnologia internacional. 

Como representantes exclusivos, contamos com suporte técnico direto da engenharia alemã da HERZOG e participamos de treinamentos exclusivos que nos permitem oferecer instalação, operação e manutenção de sistemas automatizados com o mais alto nível de excelência.

Name: Tryckluftsteknik i Westervik AB
Description:
Tryckluftsteknik i Westervik AB startades i Västervik år 1992 av Gert Grönlund.

Företaget säljer, installerar och gör service på tryckluftskompressorer. Vi är auktoriserad servicepartner för Atlas Copco Compressor AB i Kalmar län, men utför service på alla fabrikat. Vi erbjuder både service på löpande räkning samt kundanpassade avtal för detta.

Tryckluftsteknik säljer också pneumatiska tillbehör, t ex cylindrar, ventiler mm av olika fabrikat enligt kundönskemål. Vi säljer även slang, armatur, rördelar och olika tryckluftsverktyg.

Andra områden som vi arbetar inom är automatisering med PLC-system, försäljning och service av vakuumpumpar och kvävgasgeneratorer.

Vår egen produkt, en laboratorieugn för tillverkare och användare av Coil Coatings ”XISCION LABORATORY OVEN M13” har slagit väl ut och den har vi exporterat runt om i världen. Vi har även en laboratorieugn för Powder Coatings att erbjuda i vårt sortiment.

Bra tryckluftskvalitet och energibesparing har blivit något vi arbetar mer och mer  med då detta blivit allt viktigare för våra kunder. Vi har idag avancerad utrustning för att kunna mäta tryckluftsförbrukning, läckage osv. Detta dokumenterar vi i detaljerade rapporter där vi kan presentera energioptimeringar och kostnader för tryckluften.

Som användare av en trycksatt anordning, t ex en kompressoranläggning har man idag en skyldighet att upprätta en riskbedömning samt rutiner för fortlöpande tillsyn (FLT) enligt Arbetsmiljöverkets direktiv AFS 2017:3. Vi har en gedigen erfarenhet av detta då vår tryckluftskonsult Stefan Grönlund har arbetat med detta sen 2004 och genomfört ett 50-tal sådana projekt.

Vi utför även rörarbeten för tryckluft främst med Atlas Copcos system Airnet eller rör av andra material om detta krävs.

Sedan 1 Juni 2015 finns även ett direktiv från Arbetsmiljöverket (AFS 2014:43) att alla rör ska märkas. Vi utför rörmärkning på tryckluft och alla andra medier som berörs av detta.

Företaget består idag av totalt fyra anställda.

Name: Machinery Maintenance, Inc.
Description:
Family owned and operated for 45+ years, Machinery Maintenance has supported the Midwest in all their maintenance and onsite repairs.  In 1998, in order to provide to our customers the highest value and best services Machinery Maintenance, Inc. divided our operations into three separate entities.  Machinery Maintenance, Inc. will remain our machine shop specializing in industrial maintenance and repairs (30,000 pound crane and mill table capacity and over 25,000 square feet of workable space).  On Site Repair Services, Inc. will handle all "field" services and Valley Fabrication, Inc. will become our steel fabrication facility.  All three facilities have 24/7 call out services. 

Machinery Maintenance services include but not limited to total rebuilds  of gearboxes, hydraulic and pneumatic cylinders, machine tools, seals, compressors and blowers, pumps and much more.  We are AWS certified and have an in-house AWS certified training facility to help grow our apprenticeship program and continue to give our customers the most innovative solutions out there.

Name: Done Right Hood & Fire Safety
Description:
Done Right Hood & Fire Safety didn’t always service kitchens for Burger King, Longhorn Steakhouse or Five Guys Burgers and Fries. Nor did we always have cafeteria accounts like Amazon and Facebook. It took a lot of hard work and dedication by a crew that never waivers on quality and professionalism.

It started in 2011 from one man deciding to change the way people perceive the importance of fire safety services in commercial establishments. The people who make up the team are highly dedicated and motivated professionals with a fresh approach to doing business based on innovative thinking, a strong work ethic and an unwavering attention to detail.

Our skilled staff has established a standard of excellence that is well recognized in the hood cleaning industry. Our expertise spans the industry spectrum from small cafes and restaurants to large restaurant groups and corporate cafeterias within the Tri-State area. Our extensive services include new hood fabrication and installation, complete commercial hood and duct cleaning, precipitator maintenance, fire suppression system sales and service, precipitator installation, corporate fire extinguishers, violation removal, grease trap cleaning, and much more.

We are truly a one-stop-shop for all your exhaust and fire safety needs. Our first-hand knowledge of industry updates and code changes are a priority for providing our customers with high quality professional services and reliable solutions to their most complex needs. We are licensed by the FDNY and all our technicians carry Certificates of Fitness (COF).

Our effective customer relation system makes it super easy to work with us. Not to mention, the majority of our customers have come to us by referral – because we support our clients from start to finish with our hands-on, pro-active approach, ensuring successful completion of any project regardless of its size.

Call us for service or for more information at (212) 660-3232.

Rigging

Whether you have CNC machines, metalworking, fabrication or manufacturing machines, printing or medical equipment, we are here to help you. We focus on getting your job done safely and quickly. Storage

Name: Industrial Clean Air Products
Description:
𝐌𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐮𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐩𝐚𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐝𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐜𝐨𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧.

Not because they want to - because nobody's giving them straight answers.
We started Industrial Clean Air Products because we were tired of seeing manufacturers:

Replace filters every month (when they should last 6-12 months)
Fail OSHA inspections on systems they were told were "compliant"

Deal with equipment breakdowns that shut down production
Worry constantly about combustible dust incidents

𝐇𝐞𝐫𝐞'𝐬 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐰𝐞 𝐝𝐨 𝐝𝐢𝐟𝐟𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐥𝐲:
We tell you the truth - even when it means less business for us. If your current system can be fixed, we'll tell you how. If you need new equipment, we'll explain exactly why and show you the engineering.

Our specialty is combustible dust - the kind that can level a facility if not handled correctly. Metal dust, wood dust, food processing dust, plastics - if it's explosive, we know how to control it safely.

𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐠𝐮𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐞 𝐢𝐬 𝐬𝐢𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐞: If we design or update your system and you fail an OSHA inspection, 𝐰𝐞 𝐟𝐢𝐱 𝐢𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐟𝐫𝐞𝐞.

We only work in the Southwest (Arizona, California, Nevada, New Mexico, Utah) because that's where we can deliver the best service. Every assessment is free. No pressure, no gimmicks.


𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐰𝐞 𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐞: Metal fabrication, woodworking, food processing, aerospace, automotive, plastics, cement, and many more

Results our clients see: 30-40% lower operating costs, zero compliance violations, equipment that actually lasts.

Comptem amb unes instal·lacions renovades de més de 3.000 m2, on tenim un considerable nombre de màquines en estoc, tant noves com d’ocasió per vendre i per llogar tant a curt com a llarg termini. També disposem d’una sala de formació, on impartim formació als nostres clients sobre l’ús de maquinària i la seguretat de maneig dels equips.

Carretilles Girona SL compta amb un gran equip comercial i tècnic que analitza les necessitats de cada client, amb l’objectiu que pugui reduir costos operatius i augmenti la productivitat de la seva empresa. Core services include:
• Condition monitoring and vibration analysis

• Reliability-centred maintenance (RCM) consultancy

• Asset health assessments and reporting

Industries served:
• Marine and offshore
• Cruise lines and superyachts
• Manufacturing and process industries
• Power generation and utilities
• Oil, gas, and energy

With a strong track record in both onshore and offshore environments, Datum RMS supports global clients seeking to improve asset reliability, reduce unplanned maintenance, and transition to proactive maintenance strategies.

Follow our page for insights on predictive maintenance, condition-based monitoring, and the latest developments in industrial reliability.

Phil-Nippon Kyoei Corporation (PNKC) is a SEC registered company founded by Filipino and Japanese engineers in 1995. It aims to provide excellent operational solutions in planned engineering maintenance, strategic

PNKC is a holding company of strategic business units engaged in industrial and commercial trading, technical consultancy, power and energy, ship maintenance and operations, cold storage and logistical services. Since

The cornerstone that differentiates PNKC’s operations is the Industrial Sales Group (ISG). ISG is responsible for the supply and sale of industrial equipment, spare parts and appurtenances, and engineering services required by industrial plants, power plants, marine and shipping companies, cargo terminals, and major commercial establishments. In tandem with its Japanese principals, the supply chain group constantly improves its purchasing strategies and schemes to lower capital and operating expenditures for its clientele.
PNKC is also a niche player in the power industry. It has the resources, technology, and organization to undertake Build-Own-Operate (BOO) projects ranging from 100 KW to 40 MW base-load demand capacities for industrial manufacturers and to engage in power sales agreement for enable heavy industries that requiring their own power source. PNKC provides self-generated power in the conventional base load reciprocating piston type diesel power plants.

Name: Imperial Engineering
Description:
Imperial Engineering is based in Stillington in Teesside, the historical industrial heartland of the UK, and provides a premium service for our customers across a wide range of sectors. 

Specialising in mechanical heavy engineering, we have an experienced and dedicated team who will always go the extra mile for our customers.

We offer the following services:

•	Breakdown machine repair - we are 24 hours a day and 7 days a week call out specialists.

•	Machine overhauls - we offer machine overhauls both on site for your convenience or at our workshop. From shutdown work to small maintenance, we can supply all the necessary parts required. 

•	Mechanical labour – we supply engineers to assist with outages or machine stoppages for essential maintenance.

•	Supply of parts – sourcing and supplying bespoke machined parts to suit customers’ needs.

•	Servicing - checking of vital parts of a machine, ensuring continuity, submitting reports, and performing corrective measures when required. 

•	Conveyor maintenance- supplying head and tail drums, bearing changes, motor gearboxes, and bed repairs. 

•	Fabrication - on site or projects in the workshop, whichever is suitable.


Our role is to ensure that your business can continue to operate to capacity – we offer rapid quote response, swift lead times and the very best in customer care as standard.

O PMOC (Portaria 3523 do Ministério da Saúde) é uma obrigação legal de todos os estabelecimentos com sistemas de climatização com capacidade igual ou acima de 60.000 btu/h (somatória total da planta), documento obrigatório para Certificação e manutenção da ISO 14.000.
Nos solicite uma apresentação para saber mais sobre.

A manutenção preventiva apresenta vantagem significativas:
•	Saúde e bem-estar dos usuários;
•	Redução do consumo de energia elétrica;
•	Vida útil do equipamento;
•	Aspecto legal (PMOC)

Características particulares da Aleander Service:
•	Especializada em manutenção preventiva e implantação do PMOC
•	Equipe treinada e capacitada seguindo todas as normas de segurança no trabalho
(NR 10, NR 12, NR 18, NR 35)
•	Registro junto aos órgãos de controle ambiental (IBAMA) e planos de descarte e reutilização
•	Software de gerenciamento desenvolvido para atender o PMOC

Sobre nós: 
Aleander Service é uma empresa líder no mercado de soluções de manutenção preventiva e corretiva para indústrias, residências e comércios. Com mais de 7 anos de experiência, nos orgulhamos de oferecer serviços de alta qualidade e um padrão de atendimento excepcional. Nossos contratos de PMOC garantem a segurança e o bom funcionamento dos sistemas de climatização. Estamos comprometidos em fornecer soluções eficientes e personalizadas, garantindo a satisfação de nossos clientes, fornecedores e colaboradores.

Our team of certified technicians use state-of-the-art tools to accurately detect and diagnose potential problems, enabling you to take preventative action before it's too late.

We are committed to delivering reliable and comprehensive solutions to our clients, no matter the size or complexity of their operations. Contact us today to learn more about our services and how we can help you optimize the performance of your equipment. Trust JWA Condition Monitoring and Trading for all your condition monitoring needs.

Name: ENINTER Italia
Description:
Fondata nel 1973, ENINTER è una delle 10 aziende familiari più importanti d'Europa nel settore degli ascensori.

Perciò, nonostante siamo già una delle aziende leader del settore, possiamo continuare a crescere ulteriormente, rendendoci un'azienda con molte opportunità reali di avanzamento.

In ENINTER, ci impegniamo anche per cause sociali e ambientali. Collaboriamo da oltre 10 anni con la Fondazione Vicente Ferrer in progetti di sviluppo umanitario ad Anantapur, India, e siamo impegnati in progetti che promuovono il miglioramento della società e dell'ambiente.

Unisciti a un team di professionisti dove potrai imparare e avrai opportunità di sviluppare una buona carriera professionale. Nel 2022, l'Indagine sul Clima Lavorativo volontaria ha registrato una partecipazione dell'85% e un punteggio di 8 su 10. Ti aspettiamo per far parte del nostro successo!

Wheeler Bearing Company, Powered by Jenkins. Jenkins is proud to add Wheeler Bearing Company to its portfolio of product offerings. Both companies come from a long history in the motor repair and parts manufacturing industries. Together, they will serve a wide array of customers.  

Wheeler is an ISO 9001-2008 Certified Supplier and has been helping industries solve their bearing needs by providing precision CNC machining, rebabbitting services, and design assistance. Wheeler is a leader in supplying bearings, oil rings, and seals to the electric motor, power generation, compressor, pump and machine tool industries. For over 75 years Wheeler has supplied bronze and babbitt sleeve bearings to GE, Westinghouse, Allis-Chalmers, Siemens, Reliance, Baldor, and many other electric motor manufacturers.

We maintain the largest inventory in the world of replacement bearings and oil lubrication rings for sleeve type electric motors for any urgent or planned requirement. Since 1919, Wheeler Industries has led the field in the manufacture and repair of industrial babbitt, bronze and aluminum bearings, oil rings, deflectors, and labyrinth seals.

Our 17,000 square foot manufacturing site houses an in-house babbitt and aluminum foundry, cutting-edge technology and equipment, 20,000+ OEM drawings, and provides you with access to the largest inventory of replacement motor parts in the world. We are committed to Lean Manufacturing principles and sustainable manufacturing practices.

Vores dygtige specialister håndterer udfordringer relateret til elektroniske, elektriske og mekaniske systemer forårsaget af brand, vand eller forurening.

I over 40 år har AREPA levert ledende løsninger for restaurering av utstyr til kunder i hele verden. Vi spesialiserer oss på å rekondisjonere teknisk utstyr med høy verdi etter uforutsette hendelser. Våre dyktige spesialister håndterer utfordringer innen elektriske, elektroniske og mekaniske systemer forårsaket av brann, vann eller annen forurensing.

I över 40 år har AREPA levererat branschledande lösningar för återställning av utrustning till kunder över hela världen. Vi är specialiserade på att återställa värdefull teknisk utrustning efter oförutsedda händelser. Dessutom erbjuder vi förebyggande underhållstjänster som hjälper företag att upprätthålla en stabil och pålitlig drift, vilket minskar risken för driftstopp. Våra skickliga specialister hanterar utmaningar relaterade till elektroniska, elektriska och mekaniska komponenter och utrustning som har påverkats av brand, vatten eller kontaminering.

Name: REFRAX
Description:
REFRAX is an international distributor of refractory materials for steelmaking and cement industries. We provide direct deliveries of high-standard refractory materials from China to Europe, North Africa, the Middle East, and Central Asia.

Our product range includes Magnesia Carbon, Magnesia Chromite, Magnesia Spinel and Fired Magnesia Bricks, which are widely used in steelmaking, non-ferrous metallurgy, and cement industries. Our refractory linings are most commonly used in basic oxygen furnaces, electro arc furnaces, steel Ladles, RH degassers, continuous casting machines and cement rotary kilns.

We collaborate directly with leading manufacturing plants that create refractory materials from the highest quality Chinese raw materials. Initially, all forms of fused magnesia are derived from the extracted ore, which is then processed in brick factories to create a variety of magnesite refractory bricks. Additionally, we provide not just standard types of magnesia bricks, but also exclusive refractory solutions tailored to individual orders for various production processes.

Our core services include:

• Commercial boiler installations & gas safety inspections
• Industrial mechanical and pipework installs
• Planned maintenance contracts
• School and education sector refurbishments
• HVAC systems, chilled water, and high-pressure solutions
• Restroom renovations and plumbing upgrades

We’re proud to support clients who value professionalism, clear communication, and dependable service - from facilities managers and site supervisors to project teams and business owners.

At Coniston Heating, it’s not just about fixing problems. It’s about helping our clients avoid disruption, reduce risk, and extend the life of their plumbing and heating systems.

We also provide nitrogen generation systems, tailored to meet the specific needs of manufacturing, food processing, and industrial applications.

Our capabilities include turnkey installations, laser alignment for any rotating equipment, and comprehensive pump service, repair, and rentals — including vacuum pumps. We understand how critical air and fluid systems are to your operations, which is why we also offer air treatment systems, custom skid packages, and detailed air audits to help you improve energy efficiency and system reliability.

Using cutting-edge tools like sonar leak detection, we help you identify costly inefficiencies and deliver real solutions that reduce waste and save money. Whether it’s planned maintenance, emergency support, or new system design, our mission is to provide the highest level of service with the discipline and dedication you'd expect from a veteran-led team.

At Innovative Oil Solutions, we don’t just fix problems — we prevent them. We’re your trusted partner for critical systems support, with a commitment to quality, accountability, and long-term performance.

Name: Climactic
Description:
Fondée par Bryan Martel, Climactic est une entreprise qui redéfinit les standards en chauffage, ventilation et climatisation. Nous sommes le point culminant d’une expérience client ultime!

- Remplacement des filtres
- Vérification des composantes
- Réparations préventives
- Etc.

Besoin d’un frigoriste rapidement pour réparer vos équipements de chauffage, ventilation et climatisation? Chez Climactic, on répond à l’appel de nos clients avec un diagnostic précis et des réparations qui règlent le problème une fois pour toutes!

- Analyse de l’unité dans son entièreté
- Recherche de solutions pour corriger le problème à la source
- Réparations ciblées et recommandations
- Rapport complet et détaillé toujours inclus

 OPTIMISATION DU RENDEMENT

Vous vous demandez si un système de chauffage, ventilation ou climatisation doit être remplacé? Consultez l’un de nos experts! Nos frigoristes certifiés se déplaceront pour une évaluation fiable et personnalisée.

- Validation du bon fonctionnement des unités
- Analyse des charges de réfrigérant + Remplacement du gaz R410
- Programmation des températures selon un horaire précis ou un endroit spécifique
- Recommandations pour l’amélioration de la performance ou le remplacement des installations

Montréal, Laval, Rive-Nord et les Laurentides.

Name: Johnston Tractors Ltd
Description:
Johnston Tractors Ltd is a family run company approaching our 60th year in business, having been established in 1962. Since the beginning we have been dealers for quality new and used agricultural equipment supplying and providing product support for customers in-and-around our core area of north Cumbria and east Dumfries & Galloway. The key activities of the company are sales of agricultural and construction equipment and the associated after sales parts and service backup.

We are main dealers for the prestigious tractor brand Fendt and highly popular brand Valtra, both part of the AGCO stable. We are also partnered with Kuhn, another world leading manufacturer with a wide range of machines for farming and amenity applications. Suzuki ATV’s complete the three pillars of our agricultural offering; Tractors, Machinery and Vehicles - with the renowned KingQuad off-road vehicle line-up. Partnerships with other manufacturers complement our portfolio of equipment including but not limited to; Nugent Trailers, Stewart Trailers, Sumo and Dalbo machinery.

Over the course of our history we have grown from head office on Rosehill Industrial Estate, Carlisle… to include additional Johnston Tractors branches situated in Dumfries and Penrith. All branches work symbiotically to share resources and enhance each other’s operational efficiency. Another string to our bow is BH Plant Sales, a division of Johnston Tractors which specialises in machinery for Plant and Construction. BH is an authorised dealer for Takeuchi excavators and Merlo construction telehandlers based at a second site just a stone’s throw from JT Carlisle Head Office. This is also where we house most of our used equipment for preparation and display.

Contamos também com itens em estoque para pronta entrega e frota própria com cinco veículos de até 15 toneladas de capacidade, garantindo a retirada e devolução no local solicitado.

Além disso, atuamos no desenvolvimento de projetos de Eficiência Energética, oferecendo soluções que promovem uma operação mais econômica, sustentável e com redução nos custos operacionais.

Norsk Korrosjonsteknisk Forening, Bergen (NKF Bergen) er inne i sitt 26. driftsår etter gjenforeningen i 1993.

NKF Bergen har som mål å skape interesse og engasjement rundt fagområdet korrosjon og korrosjonsbeskyttelse, og å bidra til kunnskapsutveksling, erfaringsoverføring og nettverksbygging for alle aktører innen faget. 

Foreningen har også som målsetting å stimulere til rekruttering av yngre medlemmer, med det mål for øyet å sørge for kontinuitet og fornyelse. Virkemiddel for å oppnå dette er å arrangere temakvelder, workshops, kurs og konferanse.

1983 yılında faaliyete başlayan şirketimiz 1996 yılında SKF Distribütör olarak endüstriyel sektörde hizmet vermeye başlamıştır. Başladığı günden bugüne kadar çözüm odaklı ilerleyen şirketimiz güvenilirliğini her geçen gün daha çok ispatlayarak, Türkiye’nin ileri gelen lider üreticilerinin tedarikçisi olmuştur. Şirketimiz ‘’ multi-brand ‘’ stratejisiyle bünyesine kuvvetli markaları katarak ; Rulman, Güç aktarım ürünleri, Sızdırmazlık ürünleri, Yağlama ürünleri ve sistemleri konusunda profesyonel hizmet vermeye devam etmektedir.

Şirketimiz 2015 yılında büyük bir yatırım yaparak yağlayıcı ürünler ve sistemleri hususunda durumunu bir üst seviyeye çıkarmış, yağlayıcı ürünler ve sistemleri departmanını kurmuştur. Bu oluşumun hemen ardından Bel-Ray ve Royal markalarını bünyesinde bulunduran Amerikan’nın lider kuruluşlarından biri olan Calumet Holding ile anlaşma imzalayarak ,Türkiye Distribütörlüğünü almıştır.

Tedarik ettiğimiz ürünlerin aynı zamanda kullanım alanlarında sağlıklı kullanılmaları ve müşterilerimize tedarik ettiğimiz ürünlerin tam performansından faydalanılabilmesi adına bedelsiz olarak Rehber eğitimlerini gerçekleştiren şirketimiz, satış odaklı değil sorun çözme odaklı çalışmaktadır.

Şirketimiz endüstriyel alanda sektör gözetmeksizin hizmet vermeye devam etmektedir.

Name: Golfo Medições
Description:
A Golfo Medições teve sua fundação em 2008, originando-se da Golfo Serviços Técnicos, estabelecida em 1991. Inicialmente, a Golfo Serviços Técnicos destacou-se na prestação de serviços relacionados à manutenção e calibração de equipamentos de instrumentação em diversas áreas, tais como química fina, farmacêutica, alimentícia, cosmética, naval, offshore, siderúrgica, saneante, biológica, aeronáutica e transferência.


Com o propósito de proporcionar valores econômicos, ambientais e sociais aos nossos parceiros, a Golfo realiza calibrações em instrumentos, comprometendo-se de maneira fidedigna com as tecnologias dos equipamentos.


Desde 2013, a Golfo Medições detém acreditação conferida pela CGCRE como laboratório de calibração, destacando-se no grupo de serviços de vazão e velocidade de fluidos, em conformidade com a norma ABNT NBR ISO/IEC 17025. Ao longo desses anos, a Golfo tem se dedicado incessantemente à inovação e ao aprimoramento de seus métodos e processos, com o objetivo de satisfazer da forma mais eficaz possível as expectativas dos usuários de serviços de calibração.


Com a disseminação contínua dos princípios de gestão da qualidade e metrologia, os usuários de serviços de calibração têm ampliado seus conhecimentos teóricos e experiência prática, tornando-se mais críticos e exigentes na execução e contratação de serviços de ensaios e calibração. Essa postura torna-se crucial na produção de produtos confiáveis.

Name: ETS PETIT
Description:
Depuis plus de 40 ans, les établissements PETIT mettent leurs expériences aux services des industriels et des collectivités.
Nous apportons notre expertise dans la vente, la maintenance, l’assistance et le bobinage de tous types de machines tournantes : moteurs électriques, servomoteurs, réducteurs, pompes, pompes à vide, ventilateur, moteur-vibrant.

Nous avons plus de 600 moteurs en stocks de différentes marques dans tous les montages.

Centre d’assistance et de réparation :
Nous disposons d’un centre d’assistance pour la détermination de réducteur et de pompe et la vente de matériel approprié aux besoins de nos clients.
Nous sommes réparateur et revendeur de plusieurs grandes marques de matériel (SEW, BAUER, DANFOS, XYLEM-FLYGT-LOWARA, CAPRARI, SALMSON, SULZER-ABS, FLOWSERVE, ALBIN Pump, SEEPEX, VEM, SERMES, WEG, ALMO, etc…).

Maintenance de machines tournantes :
Nous sommes organisé pour la maintenance de l’ensemble des machines tournantes, des moteurs à basse tension jusqu’à 700 kW, des réducteurs et des pompes de tous types.

Stock de pièces détachées :
Nous disposons de stocks de pièces pour la réparation des machines tournantes. Des stators, des freins et des pignons pour les motoréducteurs.
Des roulements, des plaques à bornes, des ventilations forcées pour la réparation de moteur..

Réfection des bobinages :
Nous bobinons l’ensemble des moteurs asynchrones à basse tension.
Les bobinages de rotor à barres, d’induits et d’inducteurs de moteurs à courant continu sont une de nos spécialités.

Banc d’essai en charge :
Notre banc d’essais moteurs, nous permet de tester en charge les machines avant leur livraison au client.
Un banc d’essais pompes, nous permet de recalculer les courbes de fonctionnement des pompes de surface et immergée après leurs révisions.

Service d’astreinte et d’urgence :
Nous disposons d’un service d’astreinte 24h/24 et 7 jours sur 7 pour le dépannage et la livraison de matériel chez nos clients.

Name: Elite Blasting Solutions Limited
Description:
Competitive pricing and innovative waste recycling that saves our clients up to a third of the cost!

Elite Blasting Solutions are specialists in ultra-high-pressure (UHP) blasting, reaching 2800bar/40000psi, and water treatment solutions; offering a full range of services, we recycle the majority of our waste on site, saving you significant costs in waste disposal.

SERVICE OFFERINGS:

 Surface Preparation
 Hydro Demolition
 Robotic UHP & Vacuum System
 Heat Exchanger/Tube Bundle Cleaning
 Internal Tank & Vessel Cleaning
 External Storage Tank Preparation
 Wastewater Treatment

Through surface preparation, we blast rust and previous coating systems off any metal structure whilst using robotic UHP and vacuum systems to remove waste. Additionally, we clean heat exchangers/fin fans in petrochemical plants, as well as internal oil storage tanks and vessels in high-risk and confined spaces. 

Our services do not stop there — Elite Blasting Solutions assists clients with precision concrete cutting and external storage tank preparation.

All our work is completed to H&S regulations and industry standards, including the Water Jetting Association’s code of practice, ISO 9001 and ISO 14001.

 https://eliteblastingsolutionslimited.co.uk/ |  +44 (0)1639 639741 | enquiries@eliteblastingsolutionslimited.co.uk

ENVIRONMENTAL IMPACT | Using a carbon filtration and reverse-osmosis system, we convert wastewater to medical-grade water. This process generates significantly less waste and helps us to recycle water, reusing it through our UHP equipment.

Name: Florida Precision Tool | FPT
Description:
Florida Precision Tool | FPT is a service-driven provider of industrial bolting, torque, calibration, and testing solutions supporting critical infrastructure across the Southeast and nationwide.

We specialize in torque tool rentals, sales, calibration, and on-site bolt testing, delivering technical support for high-risk, high-consequence applications in steel erection, power generation, refining, transportation, and heavy industrial environments. Our mission is straightforward: ensure bolted joints are assembled safely, accurately, and in full compliance with project specifications.

Florida Precision Tool operates an ISO/IEC 17025–accredited calibration laboratory, including mobile calibration services that bring certified results directly to your facility or jobsite. Our testing and verification capabilities include Skidmore-Wilhelm bolt testing, torque-to-tension correlation, load cell verification, and critical joint validation.

FPT also provides nuclear bolting and tensioning assurance services, supporting outage and maintenance activities with qualified personnel, procedural oversight, tooling verification, and documentation aligned with nuclear quality and safety expectations. We work alongside plant staff and contractors to reduce risk, ensure traceability, and maintain confidence in critical bolted joint assemblies.

Our rental and service fleet includes hydraulic torque wrenches, battery torque tools, manual torque wrenches, and specialty bolting equipment, backed by experienced technicians who understand outage schedules, field constraints, and compliance-driven work environments.

Florida Precision Tool is more than a tool supplier—we are a technical partner, providing practical solutions, rapid response, and knowledgeable support when accuracy, accountability, and uptime matter most.

 Serving the Southeast and nationwide
 Rentals | Sales | Calibration | On-Site Bolt Testing | Nuclear Bolting Assurance
 Mobile and on-site service

The Directors of Remistar bring well over 20 years of Rope Access, NDT and Maintenance project experience to the company and are involved in every aspect of the daily technical activities. We are based in Durban and can mobilize our teams to any destination around the world from the local International Airport.

We have operated safely, effectively and competitively in the challenging offshore environments of the North Sea, Middle East and West Africa gaining valuable experience in our fields of expertise.

 

The core technical qualifications are held by management, including the Directors themselves, to ensure continuous service delivery to customers without the possibility of disruption.

 

All of our technical services are complemented with specialized industrial rope access methods and we are focused on providing exceptional service to the local Industrial sector, Petrochemical and Offshore Marine Oil and Gas Industries.

 

Industrial rope access methods have been safely and successfully used for well over 35 years in some of the most hostile environments in the world, like the North Sea resulting in huge cost and time savings to customers all over the world and we are proud to be part of this community.

 

Our on-going mission is to maintain a strong drive towards increased usefulness to our customers, through continuous skills development training, technology and the measurement of results, thereby more successfully contributing towards a greater turnkey scope.

Name: Dansk Laser Rens.
Description: Dansk Laser Rens er en dansk virksomhed, der specialiserer sig i effektiv og skånsom rengøring af overflader ved hjælp af laser. De tilbyder laserbaserede renseløsninger til en række industrielle formål, som for eksempel fjernelse af maling, rust, graffiti eller andre urenheder. Laser teknologien gør det muligt at rengøre præcist og uden at beskadige de underliggende materialer, hvilket gør det til en miljøvenlig og økonomisk løsning. Virksomheden henvender sig til både private og erhvervslivet og tilbyder skræddersyede løsninger til deres kunders behov. Dansk Laser Rens tilbyder også en bred vifte af alternative rengøringsmetoder udover laserbehandling. De arbejder blandt andet med vandpolering, som er en effektiv metode til at fjerne snavs og forureninger uden at beskadige overflader. Derudover tilbyder de sandblæsning og sodablæsning, som bruges til at fjerne rust, maling og andre materialer fra metal- og betonoverflader, samt ultralydsafrensning, der benyttes til præcis og skånsom rengøring af komplekse eller sarte komponenter. Med disse forskellige teknologier kan Dansk Laser Rens skræddersy løsninger til et bredt spektrum af industrier, der kræver effektiv og miljøvenlig rengøring.

Description:
Na Global Spindle, somos especialistas em reparo de spindles, oferecendo um serviço que se destaca pelos altos padrões de qualidade, equiparando-se às melhores empresas do setor mundial. Com mais de 30 anos de experiência acumulada, garantimos que cada etapa do nosso processo esteja alinhada às normas internacionais e às especificações técnicas dos fabricantes de spindles e rolamentos.

1. Experiência Comprovada: Nossa equipe é composta por técnicos e engenheiros altamente qualificados, com vasta experiência adquirida em multinacionais e em constante atualização junto a fabricantes renomados. Essa expertise nos permite aplicar as melhores práticas e técnicas no reparo de spindles.
2. Processo Estruturado: O reparo de spindles é a essência do nosso negócio. Seguimos um processo 100% estruturado, realizado em um ambiente controlado. Cada etapa é meticulosamente planejada, permitindo a coleta de informações detalhadas e assegurando a qualidade e rastreabilidade de todo o processo.
3. Apoio Técnico Especializado: Oferecemos comunicação eficiente e apoio técnico contínuo, ajudando nossos clientes a aumentar a vida útil do spindle e a melhorar sua capacidade. Estamos sempre prontos para oferecer soluções personalizadas que atendam às suas necessidades específicas.
4. Gestão de Qualidade Total: Cada spindle passa por análises de falhas, calibrações e testes rigorosos. Garantimos que o batimento e a vibração estejam dentro dos padrões exigidos, resultando em uma operação mais suave, maior durabilidade e desempenho otimizado.
5. Histórico Detalhado: Mantemos um registro completo de cada processo de recuperação, permitindo consultas futuras e garantindo total transparência e confiança em nossos serviços.
6. Garantia de 1 Ano: Confiamos na qualidade do nosso trabalho e, por isso, oferecemos uma garantia de 1 ano para o serviço de reparo do spindle quando revisado o conjunto completo.
Minimize o Tempo de Inatividade da sua máquina CNC!

Cold Squad Oy:n vahvuus on nopeus. Reagoimme huolto-/korjauspyyntöihin nopeasti ja tulemme paikalle sopimuksen mukaan.

Asiakas on meille tärkeä. Tarjoamme ammattitaitomme juuri sinun laitteillesi. Ymmärrämme, että asiat tulee esittää selkeästi, jotta vältymme väärinkäsityksiltä. Olemme mitä lupaamme.

Cold Squad Oy on vuonna 2022 perustettu yritys, jonka omistaa Jenni Enckell ja Jari Arovaara. Olemme keskittyneet lääkintäkylmälaitteiden huolto- ja korjauspalveluun. Lisäksi asiakkaisiimme kuuluu mm. ravintoloita ja kahviloita.

Tarjoamme asiakkaille vikakorjaukset, vuosi- ja määräaikaishuollot, laitteiden asennuksen ja myynnin. Toimimme merkki riippumattomasti ja tarjoamme huoltopalvelut ja varaosat kaiken merkkisiin kylmälaitteisiin. Teemme yhteistyötä useiden laitevalmistajien ja jälleenmyyjien kanssa.

Alumiinituotteiden valmistuksesta ja suunnittelusta Arovaaran suvusta löytyy 80 vuoden vankka kokemus.

Olemme Euroopan johtava alumiiniprofiilista pääsääntöisesti kylmälaitteille suunniteltujen teline- ja moduuliratkaisujen valmistaja ja myyjä. Toimintamme perustuu kestävään kehitykseen.

Tarjoamme yksityis- ja yritysasiakkaille energia- ja kustannustehokkaita ratkaisuja parantamaan kylmälaitteiden käyttöikää ja pienentämään energiankulutusta. Tarjoamme asiakkaille valmiita telineratkaisuja, lisäksi toteutamme telineitä myös asiakkaiden omien toiveiden ja mittojen mukaan.

Name: Control Solutions for Industrial Engineering Co. (CSI)
Industrial Calibration & Service LLC.
Description:
BENEFITS WITH ICS 

Experience and knowledge in the industry. Combined 30 years experience with: Oven manufacturing, maintenance, calibration, and pyrometry. Devotion to excellence and attention to detail. Customer compliance and satisfaction is our #1 goal. 

ICS uses top line equipment and the latest tech along with an industry leading calibration software that completes a specification compliant certification in the background while the technician is performing the calibration and inputting data in the app based platform. Each customer receives a portal log-in where they can access previous and current certifications as well as view all upcoming calibrations. This is also where the quality team can complete their review and sign off. 

Research shows that 8 out of 10 NADCAP findings are directly related to calibration and pyrometry. We give the customer the piece of mind knowing that all certifications are compliant to the most current revision and ICS also provides audit support throughout the entire process. 

Service/Maintenance  

There is nothing worse than a furnace going down during production. Rest assured ICS has the equipment and the knowhow to get you out of any mess. From a broken belt to a new oven, and anything in between, ICS will provide the service and parts to get you back up and running better than ever.
In order to keep your equipment running as it should, and to avoid costly downtime, ICS offers preventative maintenance packages to suit your needs. PM customers get the peace of mind that their equipment is running according to manufacturer specification, while enjoying priority service should anything ever fail. Along with our NFPA safety check, ICS provides a one stop shop for your furnace maintenance needs.

En este proyecto estratégico, coordinado por la ingeniería TAMOIN y apoyado por el Gobierno Vasco, colaboran cuatro fabricantes de tecnología: FRIGOLAN, SEDICAL, ARROSPE y ARATT; dos especialistas en digitalización y control: MIESA y GENELEK; tres usuarios finales de referencia:  PAPRESA, NATRA y UNILEVER; y tres agentes científico-tecnológicos: TECNALIA, BCAM y el CLUSTER DE ENERGÍA.
 
En última instancia, las innovaciones tecnológicas abordadas en el proyecto se demostrarán y validarán en un entorno de laboratorio, emulando procesos y demandas industriales reales.

Name: BDM MAKİNE
Description:
Firmamız, makine yedek parça ve hidrolik sistemler alanında sektördeki yerini sağlamlaştırmış bir kuruluştur. Yıllar içinde edindiğimiz 25 yıllık deneyimle, müşterilerimize yüksek kaliteli ürünler ve güvenilir hizmetler sunma misyonumuzu sürdürdük.

Son yıllarda, genç kuşağın katılmasıyla birlikte modern bir yapıya geçiş yaptık.

2024 yılında sizlere BDM MAKİNE olarak hizmet vermeye başladık. Yenilikçi fikirler ve güncel teknolojilerle donatılmış bir ekip oluşturarak, sektördeki gelişmeleri yakından takip ediyoruz. Bu değişim, sadece iş süreçlerimizi değil, aynı zamanda müşteri ilişkilerimizi de dönüştürdü. Müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımız sayesinde, her zaman ihtiyaçlara özel çözümler sunmaya odaklanıyoruz.

Makine yedek parça tedariği ve hidrolik sistemler tamiri ve bakımı konusundaki uzmanlığımızla, endüstriyel süreçlerinizi optimize etmenizi sağlıyoruz. Kalite ve güvenilirliği ön planda tutarak, müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeye çıkarmak için sürekli çalışıyoruz.

Geleceğe yönelik hedeflerimiz arasında, teknolojik yenilikleri takip ederek sürdürülebilir çözümler sunmak ve sektördeki yerimizi pekiştirmek yer alıyor. Firmamız, bu doğrultuda hem geleneksel değerlerimizi korumakta hem de modern anlayışımızla büyümeye devam etmektedir.

Name: FIL Vietnam
Description:

Việc xử lý khí nén theo ISO 8573-1: 2010 là rất quan trọng. Nó không chỉ đảm bảo các sản phẩm và dây chuyền sản xuất có chất lượng cao, mà còn giúp cho dây chuyền hoạt động trơn tru, ít lỗi, chi phí vận hành, sửa chữa thấp hơn rất nhiều. Là nhà phân phối của Donaldson, Omega-Air và CS-Instruments, Kobelco chúng tôi đồng hành cùng các nhà sản xuất chất lượng cao để đem đến sự hỗ trợ kỹ thuật và công nghệ mới nhất trong mọi dự án đòi hỏi chất lượng khí nén cao.
Sử dụng các thiết bị đo và kiểm tra khí nén (của CS-Instruments), chúng tôi đảm bảo các ứng dụng được cung cấp với các tiêu chuẩn khí nén tương ứng và bảo vệ hệ thống khỏi khí nén không đạt tiêu chuẩn.
Không chỉ cung cấp giải pháp mới, chúng tôi còn khảo sát đánh giá hiện trạng, đưa ra phương án cải tạo, nâng cấp hệ thống nhằm tiết kiệm năng lượng, nân cao chất lượng khí nén cho khách hàng với thời gian hoàn vốn ngắn nhất có thể.
Location: Ho Chi Minh, Outside the US or Canada

Name: BUCK KREIHS MARINE REPAIR
Description:
Buck Kreihs Marine Repair is located in New Orleans, Louisiana. We operate a  full-service machine and fabrication shop and a 3,500 ft. marine repair/dock facility on the Mississippi River located at 92.1AHP.  We operate 2 straight time shifts per day: 8 AM to 4:30 PM and 4:30 PM to 1 AM, Monday through Friday.  Overtime as needed.  We have all the necessary equipment and experienced personnel to meet your marine and industrial repair needs.

Should your vessel or facility require emergency or after hours maintenance, we are available 24 hours per day.  We specialize in the repair of oceangoing vessels, coal transfer facilities, grain elevators, hospitals and all other types of industrial and commercial facilities.

We are an authorized repair facility for Peiner Smag Lifting Technologies.

AND REMEMBER…24-Hour emergency call-outs are one of our specialties!

MARINE
•	3,700 Mississippi River repair facility (92.1AHP)
•	Large scale machining and fabrication
•	Crane, water, compressed air and electrical service available
•	Certified boiler & pump repair
•	Machinery, steel/hull repair & fabrication
•	Portable welding equipment to travel to your vessel or facility is a specialty
•	We have extensive regulatory body experience
•       Specialize in deep well pump repair, Peiner grab & bucket repair

INDUSTRIAL & COMMERCIAL

İZOKAR olarak 2008 yılında yola çıktık bu zorlu yolda çalıştığımız bütün projelerde çözüm ortağı olmayı kendimize ilke edindik. Öncelikle bize güvenen, referans olan firmaların ve tabi ki bu başarımızın gizli kahramanları personellerimizin sayesinde daima başarı politikasından ödün vermeden ilerliyoruz.
	Çalıştığımız bütün projelerde çözüm ortağı olma konusunda bütün personelimiz ve bizler üzerimize düşen her konuda çaba göstererek farkındalık yaratmayı hedef edindik; Bu sayede gerçek anlamda dostlar kazandık, başarı sağladık ve devam ediyoruz.
	İZOKAR olarak bize güvenen ve referans olan tüm kişi ve kuruluşların güvenlerini sarsmamak onların bu güvende ne kadar haklı olduklarını ispatlamak adına tüm projelerimizde ticari ahlak konusunda örnek gösterilen bir firma olduk; bu sayede bizler hep çıtamızı yükselterek ilerliyoruz.
	Biz biliyoruz ki “başarılı çalışma başarılı personelden ileri gelir” çalışanlarımızın başarıları sayesinde daha emin ve daha cesur adımlar atabiliriz işin yönetim kısmı kadar uygulama kısmında uygulayıcıların kişisel ve grup olarak deneyimleri, tecrübeleri bunun yanı sıra mutlak iradelerinden geçmektedir. Başarılı firma olma yolunda personelimiz bize sonsuz güven vermektedir.
	İZOKAR olarak bu cesaret ve güvenle  bütün çalışmalarımızda başarı konusunda hep daha üst noktalarda olma konusunda kendimize söz verdik ve bizler tutamayacağımız sözlerden uzak durduk.

Name: New Tractor
Description:
Referência em manutenção de material rodante para tratores de esteira, escavadeiras, máquinas perfuratrizes e colheitadeiras, possuímos uma área fabril de 3 mil m², onde oferecemos seguintes serviços:

REFORMAS DE ROSÁRIO – Trocar ou girar pino e bucha, esses dois serviços exigem procedimentos similares:
Lavagem, desmontagem, inspeção e preparação do material. A montagem também é um diferencial, pois no giro o reposicionamento dos componentes se torna altamente importante, se feito de forma indevida, resulta em uma vida útil menor.

RECUPERAÇÃO DE SAPATAS – Existem vários tipos de sapatas, podendo ser garras simples, duplas e triplas. As sapatas também sofrem desgastes e devem ser recuperadas ou trocadas. Devido ao desgastes que este componente sofre, em sua recuperação, se faz necessário avaliar empeno, trincas e dimensão correta de talisca a ser aplicada no perfil, respeitando o padrão de altura original. Para isso é feita a limpeza, preparação e pré angulação do material, em seguida a aplicação de nova garra com solda.

RECUPERAÇÃO DE RODA GUIA – A peça apresenta desgaste na pista após certo período de trabalho. A recuperação é executada na maquina de solda de arco submerso. Após encher de solda, a roda guia passa pelo processo de usinagem em um torno de precisão para atingir a sua medida original.

REFORMA DE TRUCK – Serviço executado com ferramentas de última geração. 
Eliminação de trincas, correção de torções, correção de alojamentos e régua de apoio dos roletes, base de apoio da roda guia, pintura e acabamento final.

PEÇAS – A New Tractor fornece diversas peças e conjuntos de material rodante original recondicionado.
Consulte disponibilidade em nosso estoque.

Name: Becker Boiler Co., Inc.
Description:
Since 1956, Becker Boiler has been a leading provider of boiler and valve services for industrial and commercial facilities across Milwaukee, Madison, Fox Valley, Greater Wisconsin, and Northern Illinois. With decades of experience, we specialize in boiler repair, maintenance, installation, and refurbishment, ensuring reliable and efficient operation for a wide range of industries, including schools, commercial buildings, hospitals, food/beverage manufacturers, and industrial facilities.
Our ASME R Stamp and PP-certified technicians provide burner repair, combustion analysis, ASME code welding, boiler tube replacement, refractory work, and efficiency upgrades. We service all major boiler brands, including Cleaver-Brooks, Hurst, Superior, Johnston, Burnham, Fulton, and Miura.
Valve Division
In addition to our boiler expertise, Becker Boiler offers a full-service valve division, specializing in safety valve testing, repair, removal, installation, and sales. Our services include in-shop and on-site testing, valve recertification, and emergency repairs, ensuring critical system reliability and compliance. We work with leading valve brands such as Consolidated, Kunkle, Farris, Crosby, and Dresser.
Why Choose Becker Boiler?
 Comprehensive Solutions – From routine maintenance to emergency repairs, we provide end-to-end boiler and valve services.
 Certified Expertise – Our ASME-certified team ensures compliance and industry-best practices.
 Reliability & Efficiency – We help maximize system performance, minimize downtime, and extend equipment lifespan.
 24/7 Emergency Service – We’re available when you need us most.
At Becker Boiler, we’re committed to delivering trusted, high-quality solutions that keep your facility running safely and efficiently. We work with our customers to keep their boilers and safety valves operating at peak performance.

Name: PARS HİDROLİK PNÖMATİK SANAYİ VE TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ
Description:
PARS HİDROLİK, endüstriyel hidrolik ve mobil hidrolik alanında faaliyet gösteren firmalara projelendirme, satış ve satış sonrası destek hizmeti vermektedir.

Projelere yönelik çalışmalar kapsamında teşkil edilen proje ofisimizde, konusunda uzman tecrübeli mühendislerimiz tarafından proje çalışmaları yapılmakta ve her türlü mühendislik hizmeti verilmektedir. Ayrıca firmamız globalleşen dünya şartlarında müşterilerinin daima bir adım önde olabilmesi için mühendislik hizmetlerinin yanı sıra, AR-GE desteği de vermektedir.

PARS HİDROLİK, sektör içinde dünya genelinde kabul görmüş, alanında lider 43 firmanın temsilciliğini yapmaktadır.

PARS HİDROLİK, hizmet ağını yurt içinde olduğu gibi yurt dışında da genişletmiş ve 15 ülkeye ihracat yapan bir kuruluş halini almıştır. Bu yolda hızlı ve emin adımlarla ilerleyen firmamız, yurtdışı müşteri portföyüne her geçen gün yenilerini eklemektedir.

ÜRETİM
Üretim kadromuz, oluşan müşteri taleplerini, kalite standartlarına uygun olarak mümkün olan en kısa termin süresi içerisinde üretmeyi amaç edinmiştir.

SATIŞ
Hidrolik ekipmanların satışı konusunda tecrübeli kadromuz ile siz müşterilerimizi ürünlerimiz hakkında en doğru şekilde bilgilendiriyor ve alternatif çözümler sunabiliyoruz.

MÜHENDİSLİK VE DANIŞMANLIK
PARS HİDROLİK, alanında uzman, dinamik ve güvenilir mühendis kadrosu ile siz değerli müşterilerimize mühendislik ve danışmanlık hizmeti sunmaktadır. PARS HİDROLİK mühendisleri tarafından hazırlanan projelerde temel ilke, müşteri isteğini doğru analiz edip kaliteyi göz ardı etmeden ihtiyacı karşılayan doğru ve ekonomik çözümler üretmektir.

Regeneración aceite dieléctrico, corrección del factor de disipación, tangente de delta y eliminación de compuestos polares.

Flushing y/o microfiltrado, descontaminación y separación de agua, queroseno, acetona, disolventes, geles, nafta...etc.

Toma de muestras, analíticas e interpretación de resultados y asesoramiento de cara a su tratamiento y recuperación.

Name: TL Precision Welding Inc.
Description:
TL Precision Welding Inc. is a niche provider of highly-specialized technical services for turbine engine repair.

TLPW delivers TIG welding, precision laser drilling and other services for OEMs in high-tech sectors, such as energy, automotive, and engineering: welding, weld repair, laser drilling and fabrication involving nickel base alloys, including Hastelloy X, Inconel Alloy 617, Aluminium-Bronze and Titanium.

MULTI-AXIS LASER DRILLING for products ranging from delicate medical devices to industrial gas turbine components. Computer-aided lasers provide a significant impact on manufacturing speed, quality and reduced costs.

PRECISION WELDING, WELD REPAIR and FABRICATION of components made of nickel base alloys, using advanced welding technologies to satisfy the strictest OEM requirements. 

Advanced welding technologies utilizing inert gases (Argon) and plasma welds have opened the door for weld repairs on alloyed metals, offering extensive financial savings to manufacturers. Components made of expensive alloyed materials can be re-manufactured using our special processes for significant cost reductions. We support the weld repair process with a sealed sandblast room and a full non-destructive examination (NDE) line, employing fluorescent penetrant testing.

SOLUTIONS: 

CLOSE COLLABORATION and PROBLEM-SOLVING with all members of the OEM team. We handle the details, and logistics to free up valuable plant space for our clients.

QA/QC to satisfy the requirements of ISO-9001 and our quality assurance clients. We monitor all processes to ensure efficacy; maintain proper records; follow strict internal quality control processes; and strive to surpass requirements for continual improvement.

ENGINEERING SUPPORT for OEMs including design review and process recommendations to simplify manufacturing. Our process engineers determine the quickest, most cost-effective way to make your parts. By having a well documented process, we can measure for quality and performance.

Name: APOLLO 3D
Description: To avoid the occurrence of failures as much as possible, maintenance is carried out, with the maintenance strategy chosen often depending on the risks posed by an unplanned stoppage. The trade-off to be made concerns the balance between preventive maintenance and corrective maintenance. Preventive maintenance is always planned and done to prevent failures. Corrective maintenance is unplanned and is done to rectify any faults that have occurred as quickly as possible. The advantages of preventive maintenance are, of course, that everything can be planned in advance and that fewer breakdowns occur. The disadvantage, however, is that it is relatively expensive: undoubtedly you will also replace parts at a time when this is not at all necessary. How nice would it be if you only performed preventive maintenance when it was really necessary? This is possible with predictive maintenance.

Em 2010, passou a contar com um departamento de engenharia, padronizando seus processos e adotando um sistema de ERP para gerenciamento avançado da produção. 
Com o incremento nas atividades, a USIMAX passou a dominar diversos processos industriais como usinagem, caldeiraria, solda, revestimento de solda e metalização, tornando-se muito versátil e capaz de produzir uma enorme variedade de peças.

Name: Interproind Lubrificazione
Description:
Sorta nel 1961, nei suoi oltre 50 anni di attività INTERPROIND si è progressivamente imposta nel campo della lubrificazione industriale commercializzando sistemi ad olio, grasso fluido e di lubrorefrigerazione. I componenti utilizzati, realizzati su proprio disegno o di acquisizione esterna, sono di provata qualità ed affidabilità come quelli della società INTZA leader del mercato spagnolo, di cui INTERPROIND è distributore esclusivo per l'Italia.

L'esperienza maturata nel settore ha consentito ad INTERPROIND di offrire al mercato soluzioni diversificate in grado di rispondere efficacemente a qualsiasi esigenza applicativa: dalla lubrificazione di macchine industriali (macchine utensili e da stampa, per la lavorazione della carta, del legno, delle materie plastiche, presse, ecc.) alla realizzazione e messa a punto di sofisticati e complessi impianti di lubrificazione centralizzata. Questi ultimi si differenziano tra impianti a linea singola ed a ricircolo.

È inoltre particolarmente significativa la presenza di INTERPROIND nel settore della lubrificazione ferroviaria.

Più recente - ma non meno consolidata - è l'attività di distribuzione di catene portacavi, nata dalla collaborazione con il partner tedesco EKD System. L'impiego di queste catene è ideale ovunque siano presenti meccanizzazioni che richiedono la movimentazione di cavi elettrici, tubazioni idrauliche, oleodinamiche e pneumatiche.

Name: I.O.S.S
Description:
IOSS LLC is a service and tech products developer and supplier company.

Our main activity is based on machinery prescriptive maintenance, a condition-based and predictive maintenance strategy that is currently being implemented in smart factories.

Machines are everywhere. You will find them in manufacturing plants including cars and food to power generation, water pumping stations, quarries, hotels, shopping centers, amusement parks, etc. These machines will eventually fail and break at some point in time; extending their lifetime and accurately predicting the remaining useful lifetime will provide great benefits and savings. To achieve this, multi-parameter detailed monitoring is required, measurements of vibration, temperature, current, pressure, sound, flow, and other important parameters are collected, trended and analyzed in details.

The team is led by a highly trained and certified analyst with over 18 years of experience in the CBM, will use high-end sophisticated measuring instruments and tools to accurately diagnose the potential failure modes in facilities mechanical and electrical systems, which will give time to plan, schedule, and undertake a repair during regularly scheduled-down days and not when you least expect it. Our CBM services include the following:

Vibration Analysis
Motion Analysis
Infrared Thermography
Ultrasonic
Motor Current Analysis
Hydraulic flow analysis
Steam systems analysis
Dynamic Balancing
Laser Alignment
CBM Program Audits
The tech product development department of IOSS focuses on research, development, and production of different types of products including sensors that automate the CBM services such as hardware and software solutions (SAAS – software as a service). Types of sensors include vibration, ultrasound, electrical current monitoring and analysis, automatic lubricators, and others, hence the end product will be composed of wireless sensors that transmit data to cloud servers on which data is processed, analyzed using

Name: ILEC Industries
Description:
Notre histoire commence en 1985 lorsque Jean-Marc Thiboutot fonde Radiateur JMT. À l’époque l’entreprise était spécialisée en réparation de voiture et de camions lourds. Puis, rapidement l’industrie minière a commencé à prendre de plus en plus de place.

En 2003, nous avons commencé à faire des prototypes de radiateurs pour l’industrie minière. Et en 2005, nous avons produit le radiateur JMT doté d’une technologie de fabrication résistante aux vibrations à la corrosion et à la poussière.

C’est en 2011 que l’entreprise change de main. Ivan Lecours devient le nouveau propriétaire et commence à développer le marché international pour le radiateur qui a fait la renommée de l’industrie.

Aujourd’hui Ilec Industries est reconnue pour la qualité exceptionnelle de ses radiateurs. L’industrie minière, les entreprises de dynamitage et les usines pétrochimiques peuvent compter sur nos produits pour éviter de faire surchauffer leur équipement et continuer de produire.

Name: Mechmine GmbH
Description:
Unerwartete Maschinenschäden oder Produktionsausfälle sind teuer und muss man vermeiden. Traditionell misst jährlich ein Schwingungsexperte stichprobenartig die Maschine aus. Von Vorteil ist eine Dauerüberwachung. 

Mechmine bietet ein retrofit und turnkey Condition Monitoring und Predictive Maintenance System an, welches 24/7 Ihre Maschine mit der Qualität eines Schwingungsexperten überwacht, weil es auf hochaufgelösten Daten basiert. 

Die Cloud-Plattform mmViewer ermöglicht es Diagnosen vorzunehmen um Defekte frühzeitig zu erkennen, oder von der automatisierten Überwachung Gebrauch zu machen. Die kinematischen Maschinendaten für Wälzlager oder Getriebe machen die Ergebnisse transparent und nachvollziehbar. Der mmViewer ermöglicht auch Ursachenerkennung wie Ausrichtefehler, Unwucht oder Lagerströme.

Aktuelle Anwendungsgebiete:
 Kläranlagen (ARA) und Wasserwerke 
 Industrie-Anlagen und Getriebe 
 BHKW und Wasserkraftwerke
 Liftmotoren
 Bergbahnen

Wir freuen uns auf den weiteren Austausch mit Ihnen!

Name: MIOSIS
Description:
Miosis - Votre Partenaire de Confiance pour la Maintenance Industrielle

Fort de plus de 10 ans d’expertise dans les industries pharmaceutiques et des dispositifs médicaux, Miosis se distingue comme un acteur majeur en maintenance industrielle. Conscients que chaque minute est précieuse, nous nous engageons à assurer la continuité de vos opérations grâce à nos services de maintenance curative et préventive, de consulting en maintenance, de renfort d’équipe, et d’amélioration des outils de production.

Nos Services :
	• Maintenance Curative et Préventive : Miosis intervient rapidement pour réparer vos équipements critiques, réduisant ainsi les temps d’arrêt. Avec notre approche préventive, nous anticipons les pannes pour garantir une production fluide et continue.

	• Consulting en Maintenance : Nous analysons vos besoins spécifiques afin de proposer des stratégies personnalisées, visant à renforcer la fiabilité de vos équipements tout en optimisant vos coûts d’exploitation.

	• Renfort d’Équipe : En cas de surcharge d’activité ou de besoin temporaire, Miosis intègre rapidement des techniciens qualifiés au sein de vos équipes, assurant ainsi la continuité de vos opérations.

	• Amélioration des Outils de Production : Nous menons des projets d’optimisation pour accroître la performance, la productivité, et l’efficacité énergétique de vos installations. Nos solutions vous permettent de conjuguer rentabilité et respect des normes environnementales.

Engagement envers l’ISO 14001 :
Miosis s’engage fermement à respecter les exigences de la norme ISO 14001. Nous intégrons des solutions d’économies d’énergie et des pratiques écologiques dans toutes nos interventions, vous aidant à minimiser l’empreinte écologique de vos installations.

Pourquoi Choisir Miosis ?

Notre flexibilité et notre expertise technique nous permettent de répondre aux besoins spécifiques de chaque client.

Description:
Depuis plus de 50 ans, SATEO située à Saint-Gilles (35), est spécialisée dans l’activité de maintenance industrielle.

LA RÉPARATION DANS NOS ATELIERS : 
     •	Nos techniciens réalisent, les expertises puis les réparations sur vos matériels dans les meilleurs délais.
     •	Nos équipements sans cesse en évolution comptent : Pont roulant de 4 tonnes / Étuves / Sableuse / Cabine de peinture / Bancs de tests.

MAINTENANCE ET DIAGNOSTICS DE PANNES SUR VOTRE SITE : 
     •	Nos techniciens interviennent sur votre site de production, réalisent les réparations et/ou la maintenance préventive.
     •	Ainsi que les diagnostics de pannes sur votre site de production et effectuent les réparations nécessaires.

MESURES ET ANALYSES SUR VOTRE SITE : Que ce soit par le biais de l’analyse vibratoire ou encore la thermographie, nos techniciens effectuent des mesures en données réelles afin d’établir des plans de maintenances prédictifs et éviter ainsi les arrêts de production.	
		
LES PLANS DES MÉTHODES : Nos équipes prennent en charge, depuis l’analyse du besoin jusqu’à la mise en service, les évolutions de vos outils de production. 

L’équipe SATEO aux valeurs familiales vous propose un accompagnement dédié à chaque étape de vos projets.

Name: AIGNEP MÉXICO SA de CV
Description:
LA FUERZA DEL GRUPO

Aignep comenzó sus actividades en 1976 en Bione (Brescia) como empresa contratista, produciendo accesorios para el sector de la calefacción, aprovechando las ventajas de un distrito industrial especializado en el sector “grifería y accesorios”. Hoy en día la empresa produce una gama completa de productos, con marca propia en la industria FluidPower.

Calidad e innovación son el lema de Aignep: toda la producción se realiza en Italia y se distribuye en todo el mundo. La única excepción son algunos productos dedicados al mercado norteamericano, que deben cumplir con las regulaciones locales, donde se perfeccionan en la sucursal de EE. UU.

Aignep forma parte del Grupo Bugatti (desde 1923), que está formado por 4 empresas de otros sectores: productos para el hogar (Casa Bugatti), iluminación (Landa), máquina herramienta (Picchi) y fluidpower (Aignep).

UNA PRESENCIA INTERNACIONAL

Aignep exporta en más de 100 países gracias a una intensiva red de distribución y gracias a 11 sucursales ubicadas en EE.UU., Colombia, España, Suiza, Brasil, Francia, China, Rusia, Alemania, México y Vietnam.

La red de distribución y las filiales permiten a Aignep estar siempre disponible para los clientes y transmitir información al Departamento Técnico. Esta información se ha convertido en algunos casos en nuevos productos de Aignep puestos en el mercado.

La dimensión internacional de Aignep se muestra también en el sitio web y en toda la documentación técnica de cada producto, traducida a 7 idiomas diferentes.

Soluciones adaptadas a cada modelo productivo, diseño, desarrollo y fabricación de equipos de seguridad.

•	Ingeniería de seguridad industrial
Adecuación de maquinaria según RD/1215, Evaluación 13849, ATEX, 486, ect.
Análisis inicial del estado de las máquinas (Evaluación de riesgos de las máquinas)
Diseño y estudio de las medidas de seguridad. Elaboramos el informe previo con medidas correctoras (consensuando soluciones con producción, mantenimiento, seguridad oficina técnica).
Realizamos el proyecto de ejecución (siempre que el cliente lo pida)
Validación y certificación de las máquinas.

                Asistencia técnica de seguridad.


•	Ejecución y fabricación
Integración y ejecución de las medidas de seguridad. Adecuación conforme a RD1215/97 de informes previos (medidas correctoras mecánicas y eléctricas) según normativa.
Automatización y montaje de soluciones de seguridad
Fabricación y montaje (todo tipo de útiles de elevación, etc ), vallado perimetral.
Fabricación y montaje de todo tipo de protecciones mecánicas y eléctricas.
Dentro de nuestros servicios también realizamos: Instalación, mantenimiento y reparación de maquinaria industrial, diseñamos y ejecutamos planes de mantenimiento preventivo,  automatización de procesos industriales, diseño y construcción de armarios eléctricos y proyectos e  instalaciones eléctricas en baja tensión para industria.
Mantenimientos industriales.

El éxito de la seguridad bien hecha es que sea adaptada al entorno y que mantenga el nivel de productividad del equipo o línea de producción

Az innovatív vállalati koncepció megvalósítása azt eredményezte, hogy a vállalat rövid időn belül nemzetközi hírnévre tett szert. Partnereink közé több multinacionális, az egész világra kiterjedő hálózattal rendelkező vállalat tartozik.

Napjainkban az Oxor számos különböző méretű és eltérő területeken működő cég megbízható partnere, és folyamatosan arra törekszik, hogy személyre szabott megoldásaival és jól képzett, motivált és rugalmas szakembergárdájának segítségével ügyfélkörét bővítse.

Gyártógépsorok telepítése, bontása, átalakítása; szerkezetlakatos munkák, hegesztés és programozás. Tevékenységeinket mindig a legmagasabb színvonalon, gondos körültekintéssel, a megrendelők igényeinek maximális figyelembe vételével végezzük. Ennek köszönhetően, az elmúlt években joggal vívtunk ki magunknak biztos pozíciókat mind a hazai, mind a nemzetközi színtéren. Megbízásainkat gyorsan, szakszerűen és kiváló ár-érték arány mellett teljesítjük.

Kollégáink folyamatos továbbképzésével garantáljuk azt, hogy projektjeinket mindenkor az erőforrások optimális felhasználásával, a természeti környezet lehető legkisebb megterhelése mellett, rugalmasan és költséghatékonyan bonyolítjuk le.

Name: Steeltek A/S
Description:
SteelTek tilbyder salg, service og reparation af maskiner til industrielt brug, med en særlig ekspertise inden for pladebearbejdning og automatiseringsløsninger. Vi er eksklusiv forhandler i Danmark af de anerkendte mærker RICO og HK Lasers & Systems, som begge er kendt for deres avancerede teknologi inden for skære- og bukkemaskiner.
 
RICO, med over 50 års erfaring, er specialiseret i fremstilling af kantpressere og pladesakse, der kan tilpasses til kundens specifikke behov. Deres maskiner er kendt for høj præcision, holdbarhed og energieffektivitet, hvilket gør dem til et fremragende valg for virksomheder, der søger bæredygtige løsninger med maksimal ydeevne.
 
HK Lasers & Systems er en førende producent af laserskæremaskiner, der udmærker sig ved innovation inden for både højtryks- og lavtryks-skæring. Deres CORONA Fiber Laser teknologi  og LPC tilbyder enestående skærekvalitet og reduceret energiforbrug, hvilket resulterer i op til 65% besparelse på nitrogenforbrug under skæringsprocessen.
 
Hos SteelTek tilbyder vi ikke kun maskiner af højeste kvalitet, Vi servicerer alle slags maskiner inden for pladebearbejdning, uanset fabrikat, og vores erfarne teknikere sikrer hurtig reparation og løbende vedligeholdelse for at minimere nedetid. Derudover tilbyder vi installation og træning, så dine maskiner kører optimalt og med maksimal effektivitet.

Description:
we specialise in LOLER inspections, access platform servicing, and MEWP safety checks across the Northeast.

 Whether you are looking to have an existing machine serviced, fully refurbished or you have equipment on site which needs repair quickly and cost-efficiently, you can rely on us to help. Name: Evosys Laser Services GmbH
Description:
We are your service partners for laser technology

Our Services
Your wishes and our experience form the basis for the comprehensive range of services for your plastic laser welding system. Evosys Laser Services supports you from installation consulting and commissioning to maintenance and future modernization or complete system renewal over the entire service life of your system. Through our cooperation with Evosys Laser GmbH, we can also draw on first-class expertise in products and technologies for laser material processing, especially in the area of processes for laser plastic welding.

Our contract manufacturing
It does not always make economic sense to invest in a production system immediately, as small quantities, pilot or expiring projects can prevent such an investment. In this case, we offer contract manufacturing on our production systems. Our range of services includes application consulting, process development and process optimization, as well as contract manufacturing of prototypes, small and large series of the highest quality. Our employees have extensive experience with materials, tools, applications and layout. They therefore have the necessary know-how to manufacture new products quickly and reliably. With the latest technology and innovative approaches, we are your reliable partner in every phase of your project!

Name: Aryans Powertech
Description:
Aryans Powertech – Powering Progress with Precision since 2012
A Division of Aryans Group | Proudly 'Make in India'

At Aryans Powertech, we don’t just build machines—we build possibilities.

Since 2012, we’ve been on a mission to fuel India’s industrial transformation through cutting-edge innovation in mechatronics, robotics, and paint tinting technologies. As a key division of the Aryans Group, our passion lies in engineering smarter, faster, and more reliable solutions for Indian and global industries alike.

 From high-precision gearboxes and slip rings to special purpose machines (SPMs) and industrial conveyors, we craft every product with in-house expertise and a deep understanding of our clients’ unique needs. We’re proud partners to giants like UFlex and Coca-Cola India, helping them automate smarter and scale better.

Our robotics wing brings innovation to the shop floor—offering customized pick-and-place robotic arms and end-of-line automation systems that enhance productivity while reducing manual effort.

In 2024, we joined hands with IDEX India (Fast & Fluid) to bring world-class paint tinting solutions to the Indian market. With over 7000+ machines installed across North India and trusted by brands like Nerolac, Birla Opus, Shalimar, Kamdhenu, and JK Max, we’re redefining precision in the tinting industry—one shade at a time.

At the heart of Aryans Powertech is a commitment to:

Engineering Excellence

Customer-Specific Innovation

Supporting Indian Industry with Global Standards

Name: Copevac
Description:
COPEVAC es una empresa especializada en limpiezas técnicas e industriales, aspiración de sólidos y líquidos y trabajos avanzados de mantenimiento en entornos de alta exigencia. Nuestro enfoque combina innovación tecnológica, maquinaria de última generación y un compromiso firme con la seguridad y la eficiencia operativa. Prestamos servicio a cualquier sector industrial que requiera intervenciones complejas y de alta precisión, desde plantas químicas, energéticas, alimentarias y cementeras, hasta entornos portuarios, logísticos y de producción, adaptándonos siempre a las necesidades concretas de cada instalación.
Nuestra actividad abarca trabajos como el vaciado y limpieza de silos, la limpieza y el mantenimiento de cámaras de hornos, la demolición interior y exterior de hornos rotatorios, la aspiración de sólidos y lodos, la clasificación de bolas de molino, el transporte de residuos y la limpieza integral de instalaciones mediante equipos técnicos y barredoras. También disponemos de amplios servicios de apoyo logístico a través de carretillas elevadoras y equipos auxiliares.
Contamos con una especialización destacada en sistemas Cardox y Winchester, herramientas que permiten actuar con total seguridad en la desobstrucción y demolición de materiales en reactores, catalizadores, hornos y grandes acumulaciones sin necesidad de emplear métodos invasivos. Estas tecnologías ofrecen la posibilidad de intervenir en espacios confinados o zonas sensibles sin dañar estructuras, reduciendo tiempos de parada y aumentando la fiabilidad del proceso.
La constante renovación de nuestra flota y la incorporación de maquinaria de última generación nos permiten operar en zonas de difícil acceso, instalaciones críticas y áreas donde no es viable utilizar técnicas tradicionales. Apostamos por la innovación continua, la digitalización y la formación permanente de nuestro equipo, garantizando intervenciones seguras, precisas y adaptadas a la realidad de cualquier sector industrial.
