Our mission is to do our part in saving the planet from the effects of climate change. We seek for like-minded companies to join forces for this common cause. With the help of technology, we believe we are able to contribute reliably and effectively towards our common goal. 

Currently we are focused on making a positive impact in the Energy and Waste sectors in Malaysia. We believe changes made in both these sectors carries maximum impact in CO2e emission avoidance. 

In the Energy sector, with an internal combustion gas generating set, we are able to convert waste gas from various sources into renewable electrical energy, instead of being released into the atmosphere as greenhouse gas which increases CO2 levels. 

In the Waste sector, with a small-scale composting machine, we are able to convert organic waste into useful resource in the form of compost on site, which would prevent organic waste being dump into sanitary landfills. This would help avoid potential CO2 being released into the atmosphere. 

Contact us to find out ways to reduce your carbon footprint, and do our part in saving the planet today!

Name: Mediana doo
Description:
Mediana d.o.o. Loznica je porodična firma sa tradicijom dugom više od 30 godina, specijalizovana za distribuciju tehničkih, industrijskih i specijalnih gasova, kao i opreme i potrošnih materijala za zavarivanje, brušenje i rezanje.
Osnovani 1994. godine, izrasli smo iz male porodične firme u pouzdanog partnera za stotine klijenata iz industrijskog, zanatskog i građevinskog sektora širom Srbije. Danas, naša rešenja biraju kako velike proizvodne firme, tako i mala preduzeća kojima je važno da posao obavljaju bez zastoja i uz punu tehničku podršku.
Naša ponuda uključuje:
Tehničke i specijalne gasove (kiseonik, CO₂, argon, acetilen, azot...)
Opreme za MIG/MAG, TIG, elektro i lasersko zavarivanje
Brusni i rezni program
Prateću industrijsku opremu i zaštitna sredstva
Kvalitet. Iskustvo. Pouzdanost.
To su vrednosti na kojima gradimo svaki posao – i svaku saradnju.
Naš tim kombinuje stručno znanje i lični pristup, jer verujemo da je profesionalnost najjača kada je lična i dosledna.
Sedište firme je u Loznici, a isporuku i saradnju realizujemo širom Srbije.
Kontaktirajte nas direktno za tehničke savete i komercijalne ponude.

Our mission is simple yet profound - to empower industries worldwide with state-of-the-art atmosphere and vacuum furnace systems that unlock the full potential of materials. We understand that heat treatment isn't just a process, it's a critical factor in determining the durability, performance, and quality of a wide range of products.

What Sets Us Apart:
We have skilled engineers who has decades of experiences in different types of furnaces. AVP is a market-leading provider of Spares and maintenance servicing for heat treatment industry equipment including Seald-Quench Furnaces, Vacuum Furnaces, Endo-Gas Generator. Our ServiceCare service offering incorporates planned and preventative maintenance, 24/7 emergency callouts, spares, overhaul and repair services. Our technicians are constantly updated with the latest advancements in furnace technology, ensuring that they're well-equipped to handle even the most intricate service requirements.

Our Services:
Preventive Maintenance: Our proactive approach to maintenance helps you avoid costly breakdowns and ensures your furnaces are operating at peak efficiency.

Emergency Repairs: We understand that breakdowns can happen unexpectedly. Our rapid response team is poised to get your operations back on track swiftly.

Performance Enhancement: Our experts analyze your furnace's performance data to identify opportunities for optimization, energy savings, and enhanced output quality.

Training Programs: We offer comprehensive training programs that empower your staff to operate and maintain the furnaces efficiently, maximizing their potential.

Stay tuned to our LinkedIn page for the latest updates on industry trends, technological advancements,

Seja na indústria, no comércio ou em qualquer outro setor que dependa de motores elétricos, estamos prontos para oferecer soluções que fazem a diferença. A confiança e a satisfação dos nossos clientes são o nosso maior patrimônio, e estamos sempre prontos para novos desafios.

Bueno Motores Elétricos – Mantendo seu motor em movimento desde 2000.

Name: İNTESKON ŞİRKETLER TOPLULUĞU
Description:
İNTESKON – Endüstriyel Bakım ve Yatırım Mühendisliği
İNTESKON olarak, endüstriyel tesislerin bakım, onarım ve yatırım mühendislik süreçlerinde uzmanlaşmış bir çözüm ortağıyız. 2018’den bu yana, Türkiye genelinde baştaFORD OTOSAN fabrikaları olmak üzere birçok sanayi kuruluşuna yüksek standartlarda hizmet sunmaktayız.

Faaliyet alanlarımız arasında mekanik ve elektrik bakım hizmetleri, altyapı ve üstyapı revizyonları, üretim hatlarının modernizasyonu ve tesislerin verimliliğini artırmaya yönelik mühendislik çözümleri yer almaktadır. İşletmelerin üretim süreçlerini kesintisiz ve güvenli bir şekilde sürdürmelerini sağlamak için çalışıyor, her projede maksimum operasyonel verimlilik hedefliyoruz.

İş güvenliği bizim için bir önceliktir. Çalışanlarımızın ve iş ortaklarımızın sağlığını ve güvenliğini korumak adına, uluslararası standartlara uygun prosedürler uyguluyor, tüm ekiplerimizi düzenli olarak iş güvenliği eğitimlerine tabi tutuyoruz.

Sadece teknik anlamda değil, finansal uyumluluk açısından da işletmelerinizle entegre çalışıyoruz. Proje bazlı veya sürekli bakım sözleşmeleriyle, işletmelerin finansal planlamalarına uygun esnek çözümler sunuyoruz.

İNTESKON olarak, sektörün en zorlu kabul edilen müşteri taleplerini dahi memnuniyet odaklı yaklaşımımızla karşılıyoruz. Her projede kaliteli ve sertifikalı uzmanlarla çalışarak, mühendislik hizmetlerimizi en üst seviyeye taşıyoruz. Güven, kalite ve sürdürülebilir başarı prensiplerimizle, işletmelerin ihtiyaç duyduğu profesyonel destek için buradayız.

Bize ulaşın, tesislerinizi daha güvenli, verimli ve sürdürülebilir hale getirelim.

Name: Ceccato Assistenza
Description:
Ceccato Assistenza è il partner di riferimento ufficiale Ceccato Aria Compressa nel Lazio, specializzato in soluzioni e servizi completi per aria compressa e compressori industriali. In qualità di Original Partner Ceccato, garantiamo ai nostri clienti accesso diretto a prodotti e ricambi originali, insieme a un servizio di assistenza tecnica di altissimo livello.

Nel nostro core business, offriamo numerose soluzioni per rispondere a ogni esigenza industriale: vendita di compressori nuovi e usati, noleggio flessibile di impianti e attrezzature, assistenza tecnica qualificata e ricambi originali Ceccato per garantire performance ottimali e lunga durata agli impianti.

Ci occupiamo inoltre di servizi di riparazione specializzati per compressori ad aria compressa, con interventi rapidi e mirati che assicurano continuità produttiva e riduzione dei fermi macchina.

Uno degli ambiti chiave del nostro lavoro è l’audit dell’aria compressa, grazie al quale analizziamo le prestazioni degli impianti, individuiamo possibili inefficienze e proponiamo interventi personalizzati di efficientamento energetico. Questo ci permette di offrire soluzioni su misura che non solo ottimizzano i consumi, ma aumentano l’affidabilità e la produttività degli impianti.

La nostra forza risiede in un team di tecnici altamente qualificati, costantemente aggiornati sulle ultime tecnologie e normative di sicurezza, pronti a intervenire con competenza e professionalità sia in officina che direttamente presso il cliente.

Ceccato Assistenza è sinonimo di qualità, affidabilità e innovazione, valori che ci hanno reso punto di riferimento nel settore aria compressa nel Lazio e nel Centro Italia.

Scegliendo noi, scegli un partner completo che ti accompagna in ogni fase, dalla consulenza alla progettazione, dalla vendita all’assistenza post-vendita, garantendo sempre soluzioni all’avanguardia e un supporto tecnico di eccellenza.

Per info e preventivi contattaci subito allo 0692927543 -3805941744

Name: Elétrica Oeste
Description:
A Elétrica Oeste é uma empresa especializada em serviços elétricos de alta qualidade e confiabilidade, oferecendo soluções completas para necessidades industriais. Com uma equipe altamente capacitada e experiente, a empresa se destaca na prestação dos seguintes serviços:



1. Manutenção Elétrica Industrial: A Elétrica Oeste realiza manutenções preventivas e corretivas em sistemas elétricos industriais, garantindo o funcionamento seguro e eficiente das instalações.



2. Correção de Fator de Potência: Oferecendo soluções para otimizar o consumo de energia, a empresa realiza análises e implementa sistemas para corrigir o fator de potência, reduzindo custos e aumentando a eficiência energética.



3. Instalação e Programação de Inversores de Frequência e Soft Starter: Especializada na instalação e configuração desses dispositivos, a Elétrica Oeste proporciona maior controle e eficiência no funcionamento de motores elétricos, reduzindo picos de energia e prolongando a vida útil dos equipamentos.



4. Montagem e Manutenção de Quadros de Comandos e CCMs: Com expertise na montagem e manutenção de quadros de comandos e centros de controle de motores, a empresa assegura a integridade e o funcionamento adequado desses sistemas fundamentais para operações industriais.



5. Sistema de Proteção Contra Descargas Atmosféricas (SPDA): A Elétrica Oeste oferece serviços de projeto, instalação e manutenção de sistemas de proteção contra descargas atmosféricas, garantindo a segurança das estruturas e equipamentos contra danos causados por raios.



A empresa prioriza a excelência, a segurança e a eficiência em todos os serviços prestados, sempre utilizando tecnologias de ponta e seguindo rigorosos padrões de qualidade e normas técnicas. Com um compromisso sólido com seus clientes, a Elétrica Oeste se destaca no mercado pela confiabilidade e expertise em soluções elétricas para o setor industrial.

Name: SOMAIND SARL
Description:
La Société SOMAIND SARL (Société de Maintenance Industrielle), implantée à Montigny-Lès-Cormeilles (95) France et la Succursale basée à Douala - Cameroun, est spécialisée dans les secteurs d'activités en industrie tels que:
- Aéronautique, Maritime/Naval, Agroalimentaire, Pharmaceutique, Chimie, Base Logistique, Energie/Bâtiment Environnement, Industrie Lourde, Automobile et Ferroviaire.

Dans ce cadre d'activités, elle s'occupe avec précision des interventions techniques de votre société. 

Par la présente, je vous sollicite de bien vouloir référencer la société SOMAIND SARL dans vos livres fournisseurs pour les différents services exercés dans la société:
-Répondre au cahier des charges du client, évaluer les risques (techniques, coûts, délais et qualité) au cours de la réalisation et valider des prestations (GMAO).
-Planifier, encadrer, organiser et assurer les interventions techniques (préventive, curative et amélioration continue), analyse des dérives et correction si nécessaire.
- Accompagner les sociétés extérieures sur le site.
- Réalisation d'étude et plan avant-projet.
- Rédiger les procédures d'interventions.
- Mise à jour des documents techniques.
- Respecter et appliquer les règles QHSE (Qualité, Hygiène, Sécurité, Environnement).

Name: Diesel Now
Description:
Is your Diesel fuel ready for any emergency? 

Diesel Now removes contaminants in stored diesel fuel with its proven Diesel Now Fuel Maintenance Systems. 

The current blends of Diesel Fuel break down and become contaminated much faster than the “older” Diesels with high sulphur levels. 

Water (condensate) is always present in Stored Diesel Fuel Tanks and this provides an ideal breeding ground for microorganisms. These microorganisms result in sludge and accelerated corrosion of tanks and pipe work. This accelerated ageing is the major cause of backup diesel power generators not starting, or not continuing to run when most needed.

Diesel Now aims to:

1. Educate all maintenance, engineering and management personnel on the importance of ensuring that stored diesel is always clean, dry and ready for any power failure or emergency. 

2. Assist customers to identify the presence of contamination in their bulk stored diesel fuel and assess the type and amount of contaminants that need to be removed.

3. Provide innovative equipment and systems to safely and effectively restore diesel fuel to its optimum quality and maintain this quality at all times.

ANY tank that holds diesel is subject to contamination. 

Diesel tanks can be found at Data Processing Centres, Prisons, Hospitals, Banks, Government Installations, Defence Installations, Air Traffic Control, Utility Companies, Mining Sites, Farms, Research Laboratories, Railroads, Fleet Truck Centres, Police & Fire Stations, Universities & Schools, Social Media Headquarters…Do we need to keep going? 

Contact us today for an obligation free consultation to see how Diesel Now can help ensure your Risk Management Plan is complete.

When the lights go out, it’s too late to clean your fuel.

En règle générale, les solutions de production d’électricité proposées par SARL ADAM sont des unités de cogénération ou tri-génération. Elles permettent de produire deux ou trois utilités différentes au sein d’une même unité. Vous réalisez de fait, des économies d’énergie sur la production de vos utilités industrielles en réduisant sensiblement l’impact de votre activité sur l’environnement.
De plus, nous privilégions systématiquement les énergies primaires vertes locales pour alimenter vos équipements. Ces derniers sont donc plus respectueux de la planète et servent votre tissu économique local. En termes de productivité, nous adaptons votre centrale de production d’électricité dès sa conception et durant son exploitation, en fonction de l’évolution de votre courbe de charge et de vos besoins en énergie. Ainsi, vous bénéficiez dès leur mise en place, d’installations neuves, fonctionnelles et performantes, et d’un suivi optimal pour assurer leur pérennité et leur disponibilité.

Brandurile reprezentate de compania noastră se regăsesc astăzi în majoritatea fabricilor de cherestea și mobilier din țară.

Compania Woodprocess a pornit la drum cu un obiectiv clar: introducerea pe piața românească a utilajelor profesionale pentru prelucrarea primară și secundară a lemnului, în industria mobilei.

Portofoliul nostru include atât soluții la cheie, cât și echipamente individuale, configurate de producători în funcție de cerințele fiecărui proiect.

Astăzi, proiectarea unui flux tehnologic performant pentru prelucrarea lemnului este mai complexă ca niciodată. Diferențele dintre echipamente sunt tot mai subtile, iar nivelul de tehnologie este extrem de avansat — motiv pentru care alegerea integratorului potrivit devine esențială.

Specialiștii Woodprocess beneficiază de acces direct la cele mai moderne tehnici de proiectare, la cele mai avansate echipamente și la suportul permanent al producătorilor parteneri.
Rezultatul? Soluții eficiente, bugete realiste și management de proiect la cel mai înalt nivel.

Our independence from original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) ensures flexibility, fast decision-making and an absolute focus on the best solution for each asset and operation, not merely equipment replacement, while consistently delivering the same level of technical quality.

At Ventura Power, our purpose is clear: to keep energy moving, with technical responsibility, operational safety and a strong commitment to the future of power generation. Every day, we transform operational challenges into reliable, sustainable, long-term performance-oriented solutions.

Especializados em automação eletroeletrônica e manutenção industrial, aplicamos tecnologias avançadas para otimizar processos produtivos. Nosso compromisso é implementar projetos que aprimorem a autonomia na fabricação, visando eficiência e produtividade.

Atendemos diversos setores industriais, incluindo têxtil, metalúrgico, alimentício, plástico, químico, automobilístico, celulose e papel, entre outros. Destacamos nossos serviços especializados, como corte e dobra de chapas em ligas diversas, alumínio, inox, aço carbono. Também oferecemos soluções em caldeiraria, confecção, manutenção e reparos com soldas, englobando o desenvolvimento de peças e equipamentos por meio de chapas metálicas e serviços de Usinagem, serviço de Torno, Fresa e CNC.

Fornecemos mão de obra administrada para serviços de mecânica, elétrica, hidráulica, pneumática, caldeiraria, encanamento, solda Mig/Mag/Tig e serviços gerais. Atendemos em caráter de urgência a qualquer horário.

Destacamos ainda nossos serviços de isolamento térmico em tubulações industriais, linha de vida e fabricação de estruturas mecânicas, em total conformidade com as normas da NR 12, além de fornecer adequação a NR12 para barracões e fábricas. Comprometidos com práticas sustentáveis, dedicamos atenção à responsabilidade ambiental em todas as nossas operações, contribuindo para um ambiente industrial mais ecológico e eficiente.

Valorizamos comunicação clara, colaboração entre áreas, registro técnico completo e postura profissional em campo. Ética não negocia: fazemos o certo, do jeito certo.

Manutenção preventiva

Name: FrioClass Brasil LTDA
Description:
Criada em 2013, a Frioclass Brasil LTDA nasceu com um propósito claro: transformar a experiência de contratação de serviços em climatização e refrigeração. Surgimos em um mercado carente de bons prestadores e distante das necessidades reais dos clientes — e foi justamente aí que vimos a oportunidade de fazer diferente.

Idealizada por executivos com vasta experiência na contratação de empresas terceirizadas, a Frioclass foi criada para ser aquilo que os próprios fundadores sempre buscaram como clientes: um parceiro confiável, com atendimento de alto nível, corpo técnico experiente e preços justos. Desde o início, o objetivo era entregar mais do que soluções técnicas — era entregar profissionalismo, respeito e excelência em cada detalhe.

Começamos pequenos, com as ferramentas que tínhamos em mãos e uma enorme vontade de fazer acontecer. Cada cliente atendido, cada obra entregue, cada desafio superado se tornou parte da nossa construção. Nosso crescimento não foi apenas em números, mas em cultura, em maturidade, em relações de confiança.

Hoje, temos orgulho de oferecer serviços completos de projeto, instalação e manutenção de sistemas de ar-condicionado, promovendo conforto térmico e ambientes mais saudáveis e eficientes. Somos reconhecidos por clientes, colaboradores e fornecedores por aplicar as melhores práticas de governança corporativa e sustentabilidade, gerando valor compartilhado à sociedade.

A Frioclass é mais do que uma empresa. É um time comprometido com a excelência, um espaço de aprendizado e crescimento contínuo. Nossa cultura é feita pelas pessoas que constroem essa

Nossa Missão
Proporcionar satisfação e bem-estar às pessoas por meio de serviço especializado e de excelência em climatização refrigeração.

Nossa Visão
Estar entre as principais empresas no setor, sendo referência de excelência no segmento de refrigeração e ar condicionado.

Nossos valores
Integridade, comprometimento, valorização, foco no cliente, inovação, qualidade e sustentabilidade

Description:
Larssons Eltjänst är auktoriserade återförsäljare och servicepartners till Miele, Miele Professional, Podab och Swatab.

Vi vågar påstå att vi med våra samarbetspartners är marknadsledande vad gäller teknisk kompetens på området såväl som att vi har branschens bästa produktutbud vad gäller funktion och resultat, livslängd och kostnadseffektivitet. Med nuvarande personalstyrka har vi över 100 års erfarenhet från vitvarusidan och professionell tvätt, tork och disk. 

Vi hjälper fastighetsägare, BRF:er, företag, offentlig sektor och i viss mån även privatpersoner med allt från projektering till installation och service av den utrustning som får deras vardag att fungera, oavsett fabrikat. Vi projektleder även totalrenoveringar av tvättstugor där vi sköter alla kontakter mellan samtliga inblandade entrepenörer och ser till att kunden på enklast möjliga vis får vad de efterfrågat.

Vi hanterar hela Mieles sortiment av t.ex. hushållsprodukter för kök och tvätt samt deras professionella utrustning där även medicinteknik ingår. Vi har med framgång hand om flertalet sterilcentraler hos både sjukhus och tandläkare, där vi säkerställer den dagliga driften och tryggar patientsäkerheten. Vi ingår i Mieles nätverk av noga utvalda representanter; Miele Elite.

Som representant för Podab hanterar vi även hela deras produktkatalog, service- såväl som återförsäljarmässigt och vi ingår i Podabs nätverk av noga utvalda representanter där vi har PPP-status; Podab Professionell Partner.

Vi representerar även Swatab i Örebroregionen och har hand om försäljning av nya DIRO-system såväl som service av befintliga anläggningar.

Vi samarbetar även med Mimbly som servicepartner och återförsäljare. Med deras marknadsunika produkt Mimboxen hjälper vi företag och verksamheter att spara energi, och kraftigt minska sina utsläpp av mikroplaster i våra vattendrag.

Med kompletta koncept från våra leverantörer kan vi erbjuda marknadens energisnålaste tvättlösningar, bland mycket annat.

Siamo anche concessionari KÄRCHER macchine per la pulizia industriale.

Manutenzioni programmate come da D.Lgs. 81/08
Verifiche spessimetriche UT
Trattamento, recupero e ricerca di fughe

Messa a norma scarichi condense oleose degli impianti secondo il D. Lgs. 3 Aprile 2006 N.152

Name: DROPHU
Description:
A DROPHU 2020 óta végez drónos ipari ellenőrzéseket és műszaki felméréseket Magyarország egész területén.

Tapasztalatunk szerint, a légi vizsgálatok akkor a leghatékonyabbak, ha a műszaki döntéshozatal részeként együtt működnek. Szolgáltatásaink azokra a területekre fókuszálnak, ahol a hagyományos módszerek korlátozottan alkalmazhatók, nehezen hozzáférhetők, vagy túlzottan költségesek. Épületek, homlokzatok, napelemek, vezetékek és kémények állapotfelmérését végezzük különféle képalkotási technológiákkal – többek között hőkamerával, nagy felbontású optikával és 2D/3D modellezéssel. Olyan hibákat tárva fel, amelyeket hagyományos módszerekkel szinte lehetetlen észrevenni.

A modern technológia önmagában nem elég – ezért minden projekt mögött pontos tervezés, célorientált repülési stratégia és értelmezhető adatelemzés áll. Modern technológiánkkal, innovatív szemléletünkkel és speciális képalkotási megoldásainkkal nem csupán időt és pénzt takarítunk meg partnereinknek, de megelőzzük a váratlan meghibásodásokat, üzemzavarokat és költséges állásidőket is.

Elkötelezettek vagyunk, hogy minden repülés mögött, egyértelmű szándék húzódik. Ügyfeleink tisztábban lássák saját rendszereik működését. Nemcsak a hibákra, hanem az azokhoz vezető folyamatokra fókuszálunk – hogy a megelőzés ne lehetőség, hanem gyakorlat legyen!

Emellett a környezetbarát működés hívei vagyunk: megújuló, fenntartható megoldásainkkal segítjük ügyfeleinket abban, hogy ipari folyamataik hatékonyabbak, gazdaságosabbak és környezettudatosabbak legyenek.

A DROPHU szolgáltatásával nemcsak gyorsabb, pontosabb és hatékonyabb lesz az ipari ellenőrzés – hanem mindig egy lépéssel a problémák előtt járhat.

„Nem egyszerűen drónokat reptetünk, megoldásokat szállítunk”

Name: Green Maple Inc.
Description:
Green Maple Inc. of Toronto is a dynamic and innovative company specializing in providing cutting-edge solutions across various industries. With a focus on sustainability and efficiency, Green Maple Inc. offers advanced technologies that enhance operational processes while reducing environmental impact.

Recently, Green Maple Inc. has expanded its portfolio by partnering with DeepChill Inc. (Woodbridge, Ontario) a pioneer in the field of liquid ice technologies. This endeavor enables Green Maple Inc. to represent DeepChill Inc.'s novel ice pigging technology across multiple sectors, including food and beverage, dairy, cosmetics, pharmaceutical, etc.

Ice pigging is a revolutionary method of cleaning in place (CIP) that utilizes ice slurry to clean pipes more effectively and with less waste than traditional methods. This technology is particularly valuable in industries where hygiene, efficiency, and sustainability are paramount. By adopting this state-of-the-art solution, companies can significantly reduce their water usage, lower their environmental footprint, and enhance the cleanliness of their production lines.

Green Maple Inc. is committed to driving innovation and sustainability in all its endeavors, and the collaboration with DeepChill Inc. represents a significant step forward in achieving these goals. With a team of experts, Green Maple Inc. and DeepChill Inc are poised to deliver exceptional value by offering advanced, eco-friendly solutions tailored to specific needs.

Call 647-762-8804 for a free consultation!

Name: Palmetto Automation Inc
Description:
Palmetto Automation, Inc. is a full-service industrial automation company based in Duncan, South Carolina, conveniently located off I-85 between Greenville and Spartanburg.

We operate through two specialized divisions designed to keep manufacturing operations running efficiently:

 Equipment Sales & Surplus Division
We buy and sell new, used, and obsolete industrial automation equipment from leading brands such as Allen-Bradley, Siemens, Eaton, ABB, Yaskawa, and Control Techniques. Whether you’re looking to purchase replacement parts or sell surplus or obsolete inventory, we offer fair pricing, fast payment, and worldwide shipping. Our inventory includes drives, PLCs, HMIs, power supplies, and other automation components — all tested and ready to install.

 Industrial Electronic Repair Division
Our in-house team restores and tests industrial drives, PLCs, HMIs, and control boards for all major brands. Each repair is performed by experienced technicians, fully load-tested, and backed by a 6-month warranty. We provide same-day quotes, local pickup and delivery across Upstate South Carolina, and nationwide repair support.

Palmetto Automation is your single-source partner for equipment, repairs, and asset recovery — helping manufacturers reduce downtime, extend equipment life, and maximize value from every asset.

Description:
PT. We have our own units and use latest Water Jet Cleaning technology made by “NLB” High Pressure Water Jetting Systems up to 40,000 PSI (13 Units). “Gardner Denver” Water Jetting Systems. “CONCO” with BuIlet Scrapper Cleaner Systems and Thomas C. Wilson in our projects.

Any type of deposits, from soft scale caused by sea water, fluids, fresh water fluid, crude oil hydrocarbon or other materials can be removed. As well as the inside tube surfaces can also be preventively protected from any sedimentation. We also clean the tube from abstraction and debris such as Brushes, plastics, rubber plugs, rubber balls, calm mussels, barnacles, twigs and rock.

Well skilled of supervisors, technician and operators, 24 hours working condition proven, We strive to deliver the best cleaning and result. Optimizing tube cleaning service maintenance projects on time and environmentally friendly.

All the above combination will guide us to keep maintain a maximal productivity and maintain the long-life use of Tube, Pipe and Tank/Vessel.

Name: Innomaintain
Description:
InnoMaintain – Innovation i vedligeholdelse

InnoMaintain er en innovativ virksomhed, der specialiserer sig i at levere bæredygtige og digitale løsninger inden for vedligeholdelse og drift. Vi kombinerer solid brancheerfaring med de nyeste teknologier for at optimere processer, reducere nedetid og skabe målbare resultater for vores kunder.

Vores ekspertise spænder over:

Forebyggende vedligeholdelse: Skræddersyede løsninger, der sikrer kontinuerlig drift og forlænger levetiden på dine aktiver.
Digitalisering og dataanalyse: Avancerede systemer og værktøjer, der giver indsigt og mulighed for proaktiv styring.
Bæredygtighed: Fokus på miljøvenlige metoder, der skaber langtidsholdbare og økonomisk fordelagtige løsninger.
Akustiske målinger på trykluftanlæg:
Gennem vores avancerede akustiske målinger identificerer vi energitab og unødvendig støj i trykluftanlæg. Ved at afdække ineffektiviteter og potentielle lækager, kan vi rådgive om optimeringer, der både reducerer driftsomkostninger og CO₂-udledning. Denne målrettede tilgang hjælper virksomheder med at spare penge, samtidig med at de bidrager til en grønnere og mere bæredygtig drift.

Hos InnoMaintain tror vi på, at den bedste vedligeholdelse opnås gennem en kombination af traditionelt håndværk og moderne digital innovation. Vores mission er at styrke vores kunders konkurrenceevne ved at skabe effektive, sikre og fremtidssikrede vedligeholdelsesløsninger.

Lad os sammen tage det næste skridt mod en mere innovativ og bæredygtig drift

Name: Best Mold Technologies, LLC
Description: Our organization services the largest single tire production facility in North America. We provide tire mold services which include clean and vent operations ( Laser cleaning, Media blasting), and we manage and warehouse 4400+ tire molds and mold components. Our logistics team picks up the production molds coming off of production and delivers these to our operations department where we can perform the necessary work required to bring the molds back to press ready condition. These operations will include clean and vent maintenance, tire mold flash repairs, stamping alterations and damaged mold repair. Our facility makes the DOT and Regulatory serial inserts required for the tire molds. Best Mold Technologies (BMT) is an experienced tire mold vendor with 45 years of experience. Name: SISCON INDUSTRIAL PARTNERS
Description:
Activitatea firmei Siscon  a început  cu importul și distributia de ingrediente pentru brutării.

Specificul companiei Siscon le permite angajaților să observe activitatea din brutăriile și cofetăriile din toată tara, să cunoască problemele cu care se confruntă producătorii români din industria de panificație. Ei întâlnesc astfel echipamente învechite după numai un an sau doi ani de funcționare, la care muncesc mai mult mecanicii decât brutarii, scule și accesorii cvasiinexistente, tehnologii rudimentare etc.

Pornind de la aceste constatări, Siscon a dorit să ofere soluții la probleme, mai ales din considerentul că România aparține Europei secolului 21 și nu se pot obține produse de calitate cu tehnologii perimate. Specialiștii firmei au luat astfel legătura cu cei mai mari producători de utilaje și accesorii pentru panificație și patiserie din Europa pentru a implementa tehnologia de ultimă oră în brutăriile și patiseriile din România.
Siscon este, în acest moment, în situația de a oferi de la hârtie de copt la linii automate de produs pâine sau patiserie, de la instalații de însilozare și dozare făină, la cuptoare de toate capacitățile, începând cu cele pentru magazine și gastronomie și mergând până la cuptoare-tunel.

Firma Siscon oferă toată gama de accesorii, respectiv tăvi, forme, cărucioare, mese și mobilier de lucru, ustensile specifice, cuțite profesionale, pentru întreaga industrie alimentară.

Sectorul ingredientelor nu a fost lăsat deoparte, oferta Siscon incluzând premixuri, alune de pădure și migdale în toate formele (întregi, zdrobite, cipsuri, stifturi, gris etc.), ciocolată pe bază de unt de cacao, arome și în general tot ceea ce este necesar într-o cofetărie modernă, oferind astfel patiserilor sau cofetarilor din România exact aceleași ingrediente cu care lucrează colegii lor din Viena, Berlin sau Paris, asigurând totodată și know-how-ul necesar realizării unor produse de clasă, care să iasă din tiparul savarinelor și amandinelor.

Name: Soma Industrial Automation
Description:
Soma Industrial Automation provides complete solutions in industrial automation, covering system integration, validation, certification, installation, project development, and technical training. With a focus on advanced technology, we ensure safety and efficiency to optimize the productivity of industrial processes.

Our Industrial Automation Services include:

Development and Programming
Creation and configuration of projects with programmable logic controllers (PLCs) and human-machine interfaces (HMIs).

Programming and integration of motion control systems.

Real-time connectivity and data exchange using Node-RED or Web Server.

Development and implementation of MES and ERP systems (SAP / TOTVS).

Creation of routines and parameterization for batch production processes and dynamic manufacturing (Batch).

System Configuration and Integration
Implementation and adjustment of supervisory systems (SCADA).

Configuration of data servers and industrial databases.

Structuring redundancy for servers and controllers.

Development of systems for remote management and monitoring of equipment.

Industrial Networks and Communication Protocols
Installation, configuration, and maintenance of industrial networks with protocols such as:
 Profinet
 Profibus DP/PA
 Ethernet/IP
 DeviceNet
 Modbus
 AS-i

Commissioning, Operation, and Documentation
Startups and execution of factory acceptance tests (FAT) and site acceptance tests (SAT).

Development of P&ID flowcharts and detailed functional documentation.

The adoption of automated systems provides benefits such as:

ISO 9001 certification guarantees quality management in line with the industry and the times. What is important to our customers is also our top priority: process reliability through new, repaired and maintained products.

 Where our strengths lie:   Flexibility   Brand diversity   Price optimization

Only rarely can a single manufacturer optimally fulfill all the requirements of a system. The solution is too expensive, too inflexible or both. MACH, on the other hand, has many years of experience with all the major brands and knows how the components can be combined in individual cases. This results in increased functionality and, as a rule, a more favorable price. Thanks to our brand neutrality and our cross-manufacturer expertise, we can always offer our customers the solution that best suits the task.

"MACH bundles the advantages of the leading manufacturers and compensates for their project-specific weaknesses through professional, customer-oriented and cost-conscious planning and combination."

Name: Märtens Industrie-Service GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Sie sind auf der Suche nach einem kompetenten und zuverlässigen Ansprechpartner, der Sie umfassend und branchengerecht zu den unterschiedlichsten Leistungen des Industrieservices beraten kann? Dann haben Sie ihn hier gefunden!

Saugtechnik
Saugwagen mieten oder Saugbagger mieten & sofort loslegen. Unsere Saugtechnik ist sofort verfügbar, egal ob kalte oder heiße Flüssigkeiten und trockene Materialien. Für die Be- und Entkiesung die ideale Wahl. Bei Notfällen sorgt unsere 24/7-Notfall-Hotline für schnelle Hilfe. Mit geschulten Mitarbeitern, die sowohl die Luftförderanlagen als auch die Arbeitssicherheit perfekt beherrschen, bieten wir Ihnen das volle Paket – nur bei Märtens.

Industriereinigung
Biogasanlagen, Kraftwerke, Raffinerien und Chemiewerke sind einige Beispiele industrieller Anlagen, die regelmäßig gereinigt werden müssen. Wir bieten individuelle Lösungen für jede Art von Industrieanlage. Ihre Anlage wird dann gründlich mit den richtigen Mitteln von Schmutz befreit. Dazu gehören beispielsweise Hochdruckwaschgeräte, Einsätze mit Chemikalien und Säuren oder Dampfgeräte.

Industriebeschichtungen & Strahltechnik
Im Bereich der Instandhaltung Ihrer Industrieanlagen kommen unterschiedliche Beschichtungen infrage. Von Trockenstrahlen über CO2-Strahlen (Trockeneisreinigung) bis hin zu Glasperlenstrahlen – bei der Märtens Industrie-Service GmbH & Co. KG werden Sie zur Instandhaltung Ihrer Anlagen bestens beraten!

Oberflächentechnik
Maschinenbauteile, Kühler, Wärmetauscher, Stahlkonstruktionen oder Behälter können von starken Verschmutzungen befallen sein. Für Sie holen wir Ihre Materialien zu uns in unsere Strahlhalle, sodass sie gereinigt werden können – ohne den Betriebsalltag Ihres Unternehmens zu stoppen. Nach einer gründlichen Reinigung in unserer Waschhalle kommen Ihre Teile in die Strahlhalle. Dort werden Sie bis zur Rautiefe gestrahlt. Wenn Sie wünschen, erledigen wir gerne jegliche Nassbeschichtungs-Arbeiten für Sie.

Name: Nuwave Laser Cleaning LLC
Description: Laser cleaning is a non-contact method of removing surface contaminants, such as rust, dirt, dust, and oxidation, from a variety of materials. It uses a focused beam of light energy to vaporize and remove the contaminants without causing damage to the underlying substrate. Cleaning with lasers does not produce any chemical waste, making it an environmentally friendly option.  It is also highly precise and can target specific areas without affecting surrounding areas. Additionally, it is a fast and efficient process that can save time and labor costs compared to traditional cleaning methods.

Name: PSE COMPRESSORES LTDA
Description:
A PSE COMPRESSORES, foi criada a partir de duas grandes empresas do ramo petroquímico a ENGEMASA ENGENHARIA E MATERIAIS LTDA, que atua no ramo de fundição de aços especiais e montagem de colunas de tubos centrifugados para fornos petroquímicos, e a PSE Engineering GmbH, conceituada empresa Alemã do ramo de Óleo, Gás e Refinaria que atua em vários setores incluindo o de tecnologia de compressão, empresa forte em Engenharia. Essas duas forças juntas criaram a PSE COMPRESSORES LTDA, para atuar de forma inovadora, confiável e segura, prepostos que o setor exige por natureza devido à alta periculosidade.

Atualmente tem uma equipe preparada e capacitada para fazer reformas de sistemas de compressão e up grade de SKIDs de GNV para GNC, e para fabricação de sistemas novos garantindo o melhor prazo de comissionamento e cumprindo todas as etapas de documentação e projeto.

Dentre os vários projetos desenvolvidos na PSE Compressores, temos o projeto ECOFOR, que foi um marco no Brasil para a compressão de gás proveniente de aterro sanitário, o BIOGÁS, criado em Fortaleza pela GNR.

Nosso forte é a presença próxima do cliente, com a mesma linguagem técnica que facilita muita as interpretações de normas, segurança e prazos confiáveis.

MISSÃO

Fornecer a melhor solução para nossos clientes em sistemas de compressão e descompressão de gases .
Superar as necessidades dos nossos clientes em prazo e qualidade; sempre visando segurança , rentabilidade e responsabilidade  social e ambiental.

VISÃO

Ser referência global em qualidade, tecnologia e inovação para  projetos de novos sistemas de compressão de gás, e também manutenção e reformas em unidades de compressão.

VALORES

- Comprometimento
- Respeito
- Ética
- Trabalho em equipe
- Transparência

Name: BW Refrigeration & Air Conditioning LTD
Description:
BW Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Limited is a family-run business, established in March 1999. Over the past two decades, we have steadily grown and built a solid and diverse customer base. Our reputation is founded on the exceptional service we provide, which is reflected in the high volume of repeat work and personal recommendations we receive.

Services:

Breakdown Service: We strive to attend to breakdown calls on the same day they are received. Our dedicated team operates a 24/7 breakdown service, ensuring that all corners of East Anglia are covered.

Maintenance Contracts: We offer tailored maintenance contracts with up to two service visits per year to ensure your equipment remains in optimal condition, reducing the need for breakdowns and extending the equipment's lifespan.

Equipment Rental: Since 2005, we have provided short-term and long-term equipment rental options. This is an ideal solution for customers facing high initial costs or temporary equipment needs.
Comprehensive Service Coverage: We cover all aspects of air conditioning, refrigeration, gas and electric catering equipment, and related areas.
Specialized Services:

Gas Safe Catering/Heating Engineers: Added to our team in August 2013, these engineers allow us to offer comprehensive service and maintenance, including a 24/7 breakdown service.
Rational Servicing and Maintenance: Many of our engineers have attended the Rational Training Centre, enabling us to provide specialized servicing and maintenance for Rational equipment.
Commercial Boiler Qualification: Recently, we achieved a commercial boiler qualification, allowing us to service, maintain, and repair all types of commercial boilers.

At BW Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Ltd, our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction is the best advertisement for our services. We are dedicated to providing top-notch service and support to meet all your refrigeration, air conditioning, and catering equipment needs.

Name: Forklift Parts & Equipment
Description:
Since its inception in 1989, FPE | Forklift Parts & Equipment has distinguished itself as a pinnacle in the lift truck industry, standing as a beacon for those in need of high-quality forklifts, comprehensive service, and an extensive range of parts for various makes and models. Rooted in a family-owned business ethos, our journey over the past three-plus decades is a testament to our unwavering quality and dedication to customer satisfaction, earning us a sterling reputation among our clientele.

Our commitment to excellence is not just a statement but a practice, evidenced by our innovative approach to fulfilling customer needs. Recognizing the evolving landscape of the industry and the importance of convenience, FPE | Forklift Parts & Equipment has streamlined access to a vast inventory of both aftermarket and OEM parts and accessories via our user-friendly online store. This effort is bolstered by our proprietary brands, HACUS and ORCU, through which we supply an array of top-tier forklift components that meet, and often exceed, our clients' expectations.

Understanding the diverse requirements of our customers, our catalog spans a comprehensive assortment of parts ranging from brakes and filters to more complex hydraulics and electrical systems. Our website invites industry professionals and enthusiasts alike to explore our offerings or to reach out directly for tailored guidance. We pride ourselves on housing an expansive selection of parts from leading manufacturers such as Toyota, Nissan, and Hyster, ensuring that quality is never compromised.

Moreover, FPE | Forklift Parts & Equipment doesn't just stop at parts. Our inventory is replete with a variety of forklift accessories designed to enhance operational efficiency and safety, including ergonomic forklift seats, practical attachments, and much more. This holistic approach to servicing the lift truck industry underscores our dedication to being a one-stop solution for all forklift-related needs.

Superior Precision:** Removes contaminants without damaging underlying materials.

Name: Intelligent Cyber-Physical Systems Lab
Description:
A modular and standards-based intelligent CPS testbed has been developed at the I-CPS Laboratory of Polytechnique Montreal to enable real-time monitoring, planning and scheduling in an automated and smart warehouse environment.

In this project, the following components were integrated:

 Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs)

 RFID and QR Code identification systems

 Camera vision systems for quality inspection

 Digital Twin technologies for real-time synchronization

 Communication protocols such as ROS2, PROFINET, and MQTT

A data acquisition rate of 25 cycles per second was achieved, allowing for precise alignment between physical processes and virtual models. This integration supported real-time decisions and process tracking.

The architecture was designed by the IEC 62264 industrial automation hierarchy, covering levels 0 to 2. Future improvements are being considered, such as synthetic anomaly injection to enhance the accuracy of fault detection mechanisms.

This work is being positioned as a foundation for scalable and adaptive CPS applications in Industry 4.0 contexts.

• Retail store renovations and national rollouts
• Tenant improvements and commercial fit-outs

Whether upgrading an existing space or expanding into new locations, King Renovate Inc. delivers transparent, reliable, and fully turnkey commercial renovation solutions throughout the GTA and across Canada.

Başlıca hizmet alanlarımız:

 Motor Rektefiyesi

• Gemi ve jeneratör motor bloklarının komple rektefiyesi

• Ana yatak ve kol yatak yuvası taşlama

• Silindir blok honlama ve gömlek değişimi

 Krank Mili Taşlama (Mobil veya Atölyede)

• Ana ve kol yatak ölçülerinde hassas tolerans

• Mobil taşlama ünitemizle yerinde hizmet imkanı

• Sertlik ölçümü, çatlak testi ve balans kontrolü

 Çatlak Testi ve Kontrol Hizmetleri

• Manyetik parçacık yöntemi (MT) ile yüzey çatlak tespiti

• Gemi klas kuruluşları için uygun raporlama

• Görsel kontrol ve ölçü kontrol hizmetleri

 Silindir Liner Honlama ve Gömlek Değişimi

• Hassas honlama makineleri ile yüzey pürüzlülüğü optimizasyonu
 Kol Frezeleme ve Yatak Kanalı İşleme

• Piston kolu, biyel kolu yüzey işleme

• Uygun toleransta yatak yuvası açma ve taşlama işlemleri

 Yerinde Hizmet (On-site Service)

• Mobil taşlama ve yerinde motor onarımı

• Tersanelerde, gemi üzerinde veya limanda hızlı çözüm

• Zaman ve nakliye maliyetinden tasarruf

 Kimlere Hizmet Veriyoruz?
• Gemi bakım ve onarım tersaneleri

• Kuru yük, tanker, römorkör ve yolcu gemileri

• Enerji santralleri (jeneratör motorları)

• Liman işletmeleri ve gemi makine daireleri

• Yedek parça tedarikçileri ve motor atölyeleri

Name: Bakkerij Service Hagel B.V.
Description:
Wat wij doen

Bij Bakkerij Service Hagel blazen we bakkerijmachines nieuw leven in met hoogwaardige revisie, maatwerk en service. Onze focus ligt op duurzaamheid, kwaliteit en klantgerichtheid. 

We bieden:
•	Revisie van bakkerijmachines: Machines worden volledig hersteld, technisch geüpdatet en schoon afgeleverd – klaar voor jarenlange inzet.
•	Verkoop van gereviseerde en tweedehands bakkerijmachines: Hoogwaardige A-merken zoals bollenrijskasten, ovens en deegmachines, zorgvuldig gereviseerd en als nieuw.
•	Maatwerkoplossingen: Op maat gemaakte bollenrijskasten (van 3- tot 14-delig), volledig uitgevoerd in roestvrij staal, afgestemd op de wensen van de klant.
•	Onderhoud en aanpassingen: Preventief onderhoud, technische updates en aanpassingen aan bestaande machines om aan specifieke behoeften te voldoen.
•	Inkoop en advies: Aankoop van gebruikte machines, met deskundig advies over de juiste keuze en het onderhoud van apparatuur.

Met meer dan 30 jaar ervaring staan wij voor vakmanschap, flexibiliteit en service. Of het nu gaat om een tweedehands machine of een volledig aangepaste oplossing, wij zorgen ervoor dat uw bakkerijmachines betrouwbaar en als nieuw blijven presteren.

Description:
RIFF – Innovación que Fluye es la evolución de Aguapur Medición, empresa con más de 40 años de trayectoria en la industria del agua y la medición de fluidos. Desde 1979 hemos acompañado a la industria chilena en sus procesos, entregando tecnologías, asesorías y equipos de clase mundial. El cambio de razón social representa una mejora integral que nos permite consolidar nuestra historia y proyectarnos con una identidad más moderna, sólida y alineada con los desafíos actuales de sostenibilidad y eficiencia.

Con miles de medidores instalados a lo largo de Chile, somos un referente en control y medición de fluidos, respaldados por un equipo de ingenieros y técnicos especializados. Nuestra experiencia nos permite entregar soluciones a medida que optimizan procesos, aseguran confiabilidad y aumentan la eficiencia operativa de cada proyecto.

Nuestros servicios incluyen:

Instalación y puesta en marcha de equipos de medición de fluidos.

Suministro de medidores de flujo industriales (electromagnéticos, ultrasónicos, mecánicos, vortex, térmicos, Coriolis, entre otros).

Desarrollo de soluciones técnicas para control y optimización de procesos.

Asesorías técnicas y acompañamiento en proyectos de Plantas de Ósmosis Inversa, tanto en agua salobre como de mar.

Suministro de insumos, equipos y soporte técnico para plantas de tratamiento de agua.

Representación en Chile de marcas líderes globales en tecnología para la industria.

En RIFF creemos en la innovación como motor de cambio y en la experiencia como la base para seguir evolucionando junto a nuestros clientes. Nuestro propósito es entregar soluciones confiables y sostenibles que acompañen a las empresas productivas en sus desafíos actuales y futuros.

RIFF – Innovación que Fluye: más de cuatro décadas creando soluciones para la industria del agua y la medición de fluidos en Chile.

Firmamız tarafından sunulan satış, servis ve danışmanlık hizmetleri kapsamında, fatura tutarına bağlı olarak resmi ve denetime tabi sivil toplum kuruluşları olan TEMA Vakfı, LÖSEV ve Gerçek Sevgi Derneği’ne düzenli bağışlar yapılmaktadır.
Yapılan bağışlar, her ay sonunda toplu olarak hem müşterilerimizle hem de sosyal medya hesaplarımız üzerinden kamuoyu ile şeffaf bir şekilde paylaşılmaktadır.
Bu uygulamadaki temel amacımız; sektörümüzde sosyal sorumluluk bilincini artırmak, doğaya, sokak hayvanlarına, insan sağlığına ve toplumumuza katkı sağlamak, bu katkıyı iş ortaklarımızla birlikte sürdürülebilir hale getirmektir.

Custom Solutions: We offer customized solutions tailored to your specific needs, enhancing performance, reducing costs, and minimizing downtime.

We cater to diverse sectors across Canada, including oil & gas, mining, manufacturing, forestry, construction, renewable energy, pulp & paper, and steel manufacturing. Our solutions meet the unique challenges of each industry.

Safety is our priority. We uphold the highest standards with certifications like ISN World, Complyworks, and WCB, ensuring responsible and sustainable operations.

Why Choose Us?
We’re more than a supplier; we’re your partner in success. We provide, top-tier products, advice & on-going support.

Name: rawe hermetics
Description:
rawe hermetics ist ein 2015 gegründetes Unternehmen aus dem Sauerland.
Mein Name ist Daniel Rawe, ich bin Gründer und Inhaber von rawe hermetics. Ich bin damals von einem der führenden Hersteller von Ultraschallmesstechnik in die Selbstständigkeit gewechselt.
Grund war der Kundenwunsch nach einem Dienstleister, welcher deutschlandweit Leckageortungen an Druckluft- &Gasnetzen durchführen kann.

Nach einem Jahr der alleinigen Selbstständigkeit wurde rawe hermetics zu einem kleinen aber feinen Team, einem Familienunternehmen.
Mit meiner Frau Melanie Rawe wurde der Bereich Vertrieb und Support vergrößert.
2018 war es dann so weit und die erste "externe" Mitarbeiterin schloß sich rawe hermetics an - ebenfalls im Bereich Vertrieb. Im selben Jahr wurden unsere Dienstleistungen um den Bereich Reparaturservice erweitert. Neben der Ortung, wurde also auch die Instandsetzung & Ersatzteilbeschaffung der georteten Leckagen übernommen.

Seit Beginn des Unternehmens wurde immer viel Wert auf Digitalisierung
gelegt. So war es nur logisch, dass der bis dahin händisch erfolgte Weg der Auswertung unserer Audits durch unsere eigens entwickelte Software rawe energetics abgelöst wurde.

Eine Software, welche seit der Veröffentlichung im Jahr 2018 kontinuierlich weiterentwickelt wurde und mittlerweile zahlreiche weitere Funktionen aufweist.
Seit dem Jahr 2020 hat sich unserem Team jedes Jahr ein weiterer Mitarbeiter angeschlossen, nun jedoch nicht im Vertrieb, sondern im Service.
Dies macht uns nicht nur sehr stolz, sondern bietet uns und unseren Kunden natürlich sehr viele neue Möglichkeiten.
Stolz macht uns auch, dass wir niemals "stehen geblieben
sind".
Seit Gründung im Jahr 2015 haben wir unser Portfolio stets erweitert, seien es unsere Tätigkeitsfelder, die verwendeten und zum Kauf oder zur Miete angebotenen und vorhandenen Messtechniken oder unser Maschinen- und Werkzeugpark.

WaterSystemsCleaning is Northern California’s specialist contractor for cooling‑tower and wet‑fume‑scrubber maintenance.Since 1986, we’ve helped data centers, semiconductor fabs, hospitals, life‑science labs, and commercial campuses protect uptime, cut energy costs, and stay compliant with ASHRAE188, OSHA, CTI, and local air‑quality rules.

What sets us apart?
•Single‑focus expertise – Cooling towers and scrubbers aren’t “one line item” for us—they’re all we do. Each technician is factory‑trained and mentored by ≥10‑year veterans.
•Documented processes – Detailed before/after photos, comprehensive checklist, and digital service logs keep facility teams & auditors happy.
•Rapid response – Based in SanJose with a tight Bay‑Area radius, we can mobilize in hours, not days.
•Safety first – ISNetworld, Avetta & Corrigo compliant; zero recordables in the last five years.
•Performance ROI – Regular cleaning can save up to15% on chiller energy and extend tower life by 5+years—ask for our cost‑savings model.

Core Services
•Cooling‑tower cleaning & disinfection (biannual or quarterly plans)
•Wet‑fume‑scrubber cleaning, packing/media replacement & epoxy relining
•Epoxy basin coatings, drift‑eliminator & fill upgrades


Whether you manage a hyper‑scale data hall or a regional medical center, our mission is simple: keep your critical HVAC assets clean, safe, and running at peak efficiency—year‑round.

 Ready to benchmark your tower or scrubber?

Name: Chemical Cleaning Specialists, Inc.
Description:
Chemical Cleaning Specialists, Inc. (CCS)
Marine & Industrial Cleaning Solutions You Can Trust

About Us:
Chemical Cleaning Specialists, Inc. (CCS) is a HUBZone-certified, family-operated small business based in Chesapeake, VA, specializing in advanced industrial and marine cleaning services. With over four decades of proven expertise, we deliver customized chemical cleaning solutions designed to extend the life and efficiency of critical systems while ensuring compliance with federal and industry standards.

As a trusted partner for the U.S. Navy, defense contractors, and industrial clients, CCS has built a reputation for quality, reliability, and unparalleled service. Our commitment to operational excellence, safety, and regulatory compliance sets us apart as a premier choice for specialized cleaning and preservation services.

Our Services:
CCS provides a comprehensive suite of specialized cleaning and preservation services tailored to the unique needs of marine, industrial, and government clients, including:
	•	Acid Washing & Descaling: Safe and effective removal of scale, corrosion, and mineral buildup from heat exchangers, radiators, and other critical equipment.
	•	Pipe Pickling & Passivation: Advanced chemical treatments for preserving stainless steel and other metals, meeting NAVSEA and MIL-STD-419D standards.
	•	Firemain Piping System Cleaning: Ensuring optimal water flow and corrosion prevention in shipboard fire suppression systems.
	•	VCHT (Vacuum Collection, Holding, and Transfer) Acid Flushing: Complete acid flushing and system restoration for onboard waste management systems.
	•	Hydro Blasting & Pressure Washing: High-pressure cleaning for industrial surfaces, tanks, and pipelines.
	•	Grease Trap Cleaning & Environmental Waste Management: Eco-friendly waste removal and compliance with EPA standards.
	•	Metal Preservation & Corrosion Control: Long-term protection of critical components against rust, wear, and corrosion damage.

Our knowledge and access to wind turbine manufacturers and gearboxes, with key conversations and comments gleaned from maintenance operators in the O & M (Operation and Maintenance) space, have given Hoses Unlimited insight and a competitive advantage in taking care of our customers.

Please contact us today on (0151) 559 7999 or email info@hoses-unlimited.co.uk

Reducing customer downtime, using only the highest quality products and quality of service are our number one priorities.

Name: RZ Manutenção e Serviços Elétricos
Description:
Somos uma empresa especializada em serviços elétricos industriais, com ampla experiência em montagem e manutenção de sistemas elétricos, emissão de laudos técnicos completos e abrangentes, garantindo soluções seguras, eficientes e personalizadas para cada cliente.

Oferecemos um portfólio de serviços que inclui:

- Montagem e Manutenção Elétrica: Realizamos a instalação de sistemas elétricos novos e prestamos serviços de manutenção preventiva e corretiva, assegurando o desempenho contínuo e seguro das instalações.

- Emissão de Laudos Técnicos: Emitimos laudos que atendem a todas as exigências técnicas e normativas, como:
  - SPDA (Sistema de Proteção contra Descargas Atmosféricas): Inspeção e certificação dos sistemas de proteção contra raios para garantir a segurança das edificações e equipamentos.
  - Aterramento Elétrico: Avaliação e adequação dos sistemas de aterramento para proteger pessoas e equipamentos contra descargas elétricas.
  - Análise de Qualidade de Energia: Diagnóstico detalhado para identificar e corrigir problemas de oscilação e harmônicas que afetam a qualidade da energia e o desempenho dos equipamentos.
  - Estudo para Redução de Demanda Elétrica: Avaliação e otimização do consumo energético, reduzindo a demanda e os custos operacionais de forma sustentável.

- Prontuário de Instalações Elétricas: Criamos e mantemos o conjunto completo de documentos exigidos pela NR-10 para as instalações elétricas, assegurando a conformidade legal e a segurança dos operadores e das instalações.

Nosso compromisso é com a excelência e segurança, oferecendo soluções personalizadas que promovem a eficiência energética e a confiabilidade das operações industriais. Conte com nossa equipe para soluções elétricas inovadoras, sempre em conformidade com as melhores práticas do mercado.

Name: Apex Reliability Engineering
Description:
Apex Industrial Reliability is a predictive maintenance (PdM) consulting firm, dedicated to optimizing equipment performance and eliminating unplanned downtime. Our Certified Maintenance & Reliability Technicians (CMRTs) are accredited under ISO/IEC 17024 through SMRPCO, ensuring globally recognized expertise in maintenance and reliability best practices.

We provide predictive maintenance services which are tailored to our clients to maximize ROI. We specialize in thermography, vibration diagnostics, ultrasonic analysis, motor circuit analysis, and power quality assessment, providing data-driven insights that enhance reliability, efficiency, and asset longevity. Our approach prioritizes proactive maintenance strategies, training personnel, and implementing cutting-edge technologies to help businesses stay ahead of failures.

Whether you’re looking to improve operational efficiency, reduce costs, or implement a scalable predictive maintenance program within your maintenance team, Apex delivers precision, expertise, and results.

Name: 3N Solutions s.r.o.
Description:
Společnost 3N Solutions s.r.o. je synonymem pro komplexní údržbu elektroenergetických zařízení.
Od roku 2010 sbíráme zkušenosti a budujeme vztahy se zákazníky nejen v České republice, Polsku a Německu, ale i v dalších evropských zemích.

Naše mise – pečovat o bezpečnost a efektivitu provozu elektroenergetických systémů, minimalizovat riziko požárů a poruch a zároveň maximalizovat úspory.

Naše hodnoty – zkušenosti, profesionální tým, špičková měřicí technika a nejefektivnější technologie čištění a údržby zařízení.

Technologie využívaná společností 3N Solutions je založena na použití inovativního čisticího média, jehož klíčovou složkou je směs suchých vzácných plynů. Nečistoty jsou odstraňovány přímo v místě aplikace a okamžitě odsávány podtlakovým systémem.

Jsme hrdí na to že jsme s úspěchem a spokojeností zákazníků splnili všechny dosud zadané úkoly – a všichni naši partneři nám udělili pozitivní reference a pokračují ve spolupráci s námi.

Spolupracujeme jak s předními mezinárodními koncerny, tak s firmami působícími na lokálních trzích. Ke každému klientovi přistupujeme individuálně.

 VYTVÁŘÍME NOVÉ TECHNOLOGIE – Volíme správnou metodu čištění dle typu znečištění, případně vyvíjíme nová technologická řešení dle konkrétních potřeb.

 POUŽÍVÁME CERTIFIKOVANÉ POSTUPY – Provádíme čištění elektrických zařízení pod napětím až do 1kV pomocí suchých plynů.

 STANDARDY A NORMY – Plně odpovídáme platným bezpečnostním normám EU a nejpřísnějším požadavkům v oblasti ochrany životního prostředí.

Name: Euromex Service
Description:
En Euromex Service somos especialistas en servicio técnico, mantenimiento preventivo y correctivo, y refacciones originales para la industria alimentaria en México y Latinoamérica. Con más de 16 años de experiencia, nos hemos consolidado como un socio estratégico de confianza para empresas que buscan maximizar la vida útil de sus equipos gastronómicos e industriales, reducir fallas y garantizar la continuidad de sus operaciones.

Nuestro equipo técnico certificado brinda atención integral para equipos de cocción, refrigeración, panificación, preparación y empaque, ofreciendo diagnósticos precisos, reparaciones profesionales y soluciones personalizadas de acuerdo con las necesidades de cada cliente.

 Nuestros servicios incluyen:

Mantenimiento preventivo y correctivo para evitar paros inesperados en la producción.

Refacciones originales de marcas líderes internacionales.

Instalación y puesta en marcha de equipos industriales.

Capacitación técnica para usuarios y distribuidores.

Name: Predict Industrial Reliability
Description:
Predict Industrial Reliability is a reliability service contractor based out of Welland, Ontario & servicing Canada. A regional leader specializing in industrial preventative maintenance & reliability applications & programs for any and all industries.

Tailor made reliability programs focused around:
• Vibration Analysis - Plant-wide routes or individual assembly diagnostics. Diagnosing a variety of issues including bearing fatigue & failure to unbalance, misalignment, flow issues etc.

• Thermal Imaging - Plant-wide routes or individual surveys for electrical infrastructure, motor temperature or insulation around ovens, oxidizers etc.

• Ultrasonic Thickness Testing - Surveying pipe or vessel wall thickness to determine material loss.

• Non-Destructive Testing - LPI & MPI of vessels, piping, lifting devices etc. Detection of cracks & pinholes responsible for leaks, fatigue fractures and other anomalies.

• Steam Trap Testing - Plant-wide survey of steam system.

• Lubrication & Tribology - Plant-wide lubrication programs including oil changes, greasing & oil sampling and testing for wear particulate.

• Machinery Repair - Bearing changes, electric motor overhaul, fan cleaning etc.

Your one-stop shop for preventative & reliability specialists.

Name: Voltex Automation And Electrical Ltd.gh
Description:
Industrial Automation
We design and implement automation systems that streamline operations, increase production efficiency, and reduce human error. Our solutions include PLC-based automation, SCADA systems, and HMI integration tailored to your specific process requirements.

 Electrical Control Systems
From motor control centers to control panels, we offer end-to-end electrical system design and installation. We ensure compliance with safety and operational standards for seamless industrial operations.

 Power & Instrumentation
We provide complete power distribution solutions including transformers, switchgear, and instrumentation. Our instrumentation services ensure accurate monitoring and control of process variables such as pressure, temperature, level, and flow.

 PLC & Instrumentation Panel Manufacturing
Custom-built PLC panels and instrumentation panels that are user-friendly, reliable, and engineered to meet your specific industry standards. We support major PLC brands like Siemens, Allen Bradley, Schneider, and Mitsubishi.

 Motor & Transformer Termination
Safe and precise cable termination services for motors and transformers, ensuring longevity, fault tolerance, and optimal performance of your power systems.

 Cable Tray Design & Installation
Professional design and installation of cable trays to manage your cabling infrastructure. We focus on layout efficiency, safety, and future scalability while keeping maintenance simple.

 Training in Industrial Automation & Control
We offer practical training programs for engineering students, graduates, and working professionals. Courses cover PLC, SCADA, HMI, panel wiring, and industrial safety—bridging the gap between academic knowledge and industrial requirements.

Name: Thermal Optics South Africa
Description:
HIKMICRO Industrial Thermal Imaging is a cutting-edge technology that revolutionises the way we perceive our surroundings. By harnessing the power of infrared radiation, HIKMICRO has created a range of thermal imaging devices specifically designed for industrial applications. These advanced tools provide unparalleled insight into temperature variations and heat distribution, allowing for improved efficiency, safety, and accuracy in various industries.

Whether it's for preventive maintenance, inspection, or troubleshooting, HIKMICRO Industrial Thermal Imaging offers a non-contact and non-destructive method of identifying potential issues quickly and effectively. By visualizing the otherwise invisible thermal energy emitted by objects, these devices enable professionals to detect anomalies, hot spots, and potential failures before they result in costly downtime or accidents.

HIKMICRO's thermal imaging products are meticulously engineered to offer exceptional image quality, reliability, and versatility. Equipped with high-resolution sensors and advanced signal processing algorithms, these devices capture and present thermal data in a clear and detailed manner. They can be used in challenging environments, such as construction sites, manufacturing facilities, electrical systems, HVAC systems, etc.

The benefits of HIKMICRO Industrial Thermal Imaging extend beyond immediate problem-solving. Through ongoing monitoring and trend analysis, professionals can predict and prevent equipment failures, optimizing maintenance schedules and minimizing operational disruptions. Furthermore, these devices help prioritize the allocation of resources, allowing for targeted repairs or upgrades based on verifiable data.

We supply Thermal Optics in South Africa | Industrial Thermal Imaging | Test equipment for Solar, Electrical, Plumbing & Renewable Energy | Ideal for monitoring & managing heat dissipation in many industrial applications.

MAKING OUR CHILDREN PROUD

Nuestro equipo de profesionales altamente cualificados cuenta con tecnología avanzada para brindarte un servicio excepcional, garantizando que tu vehículo esté siempre en condiciones óptimas y seguras.

Servicios de Talleres Subias:

 Diagnóstico Avanzado: Detectamos rápidamente cualquier problema técnico mediante herramientas digitales de última generación. 

 Pre ITV: Preparamos tu vehículo para superar con éxito la Inspección Técnica de Vehículos, evitando sorpresas de última hora. 

 Mecánica Rápida: Resolución ágil de problemas cotidianos como cambio de baterías, frenos, escapes o filtros. 

 Cambio de Aceite y Mantenimiento: Protegemos el motor de tu vehículo o maquinaria agrícola, asegurando un rendimiento óptimo durante más tiempo. 

 Neumáticos y Amortiguadores: Ofrecemos alineación, reparación y cambio de neumáticos y amortiguadores para garantizar seguridad y confort en carretera. 

 Especialización en Vehículos Agrícolas: Cuidamos de tu maquinaria agrícola con servicios específicos que aumentan su productividad y vida útil. 

 Nos comprometemos a brindarte un servicio personalizado, rápido y eficaz, con atención cercana y soluciones adaptadas a tus necesidades.

Name: Chriscelian Energy Limited
Description:
Chriscelian Energy is in the business of providing power generating equipment and a channel partner for Guascor Energy Spain (Formerly Siemens Energy) and Generac Industrial power USA in Nigeria. 
Chriscelian Energy is committed to revolutionizing energy generation 
and distribution in Nigeria and beyond-through providing customer-centric services in supplying cutting-edge and environmental sustainability gas generators. 
Chriscelian distributes Guascor generators in Nigeria and Guascor has been in existence since 1966 as they were formerly known as Siemens Energy till 2022 when it was acquired by German Global Investment Company by name Mutares SE & Co. KGaA. Guascor are known for manufacturing industrial gas generators and marine gas generators while Generac is an American company establish in 1959 that specializes on gas generators ranging from 8KVA to 500KW single engine and other power equipment.

Chriscelian Energy also is a channel partner for Renner Kompressoren in Nigerian which has been in compressor business since 1994 in Germany with the aim of developing efficient screw compressors. Renner compressors are of high-quality standards not only in the field of screw compressors but also in the segment of oil-free compressed air and piston compressors.

Chriscelian Energy being an indigenous company in Nigeria, provides adequate sales support/after-market service for all their products. We provide one-stop power equipment and services considering the value for our customers. We supply with comprehensive warranty that gives customers a firm confidence with peace of mind. 

Vision: 
To be Nigeria Foremost provider of efficient, accessible, and sustainable power solution.

The trusted electrical contractor of grain elevators along the Mississippi River, TKC has been sought after for Continuous Barge Unloader renovations and repairs, Motor Control Center installations, automation programming, ship loader repair and maintenance, and much more. 
We are ready to provide electrical planning, coordination, and project management for your turnarounds and everyday projects alike, keeping safety and quality at the forefront.

Name: Max Klat Maschinentechnik GmbH
Description:
Max Klat Maschinentechnik GmbH ist ein Unternehmen mit Sitz in Göppingen Baden-Württemberg, das sich auf den Service von  Kartoniermaschinen spezialisiert hat. Das Unternehmen wurde 2018 aus der Vision und dem geschäftlichen Sachverstand des ehemaligen BOSCH Mitarbeiters Max Klat gegründet und pflegt seitdem eine enge Partnerschaft mit dem Traditionsunternehmen. Heute bietet Max Klat Maschinentechnik GmbH Kunden die volle Bandbreite an Dienstleistungen rund um die Verpackungsmaschinen an. Dazu gehören Wartungs- und Reparaturdienste ebenso wie Einfahren der Maschine mit neuem Produkt oder das Erreichen steigender Produktivitätskennzahlen durch Prüfung und Optimierung der Anlage. Unser leistungsfähiges fachmännisches Team gewährleistet zudem jederzeit den bestmöglichen Support bei allen Fragen. 

Unser Team setzt sich aus qualifizierten Technikern und hilfsbereiten Mitarbeitern zusammen, die viel Erfahrung in ihrem jeweiligen Fachgebiet mitbringen. Wir legen großen Wert auf ein sympathisches Arbeitsklima und fördern innovative Ideen sowie persönliche Entwicklung unserer Mitarbeiter aktiv. So empfindet unser erfolgreiches Team seine Tätigkeit stets als Herausforderung und motivierendes Ziel gleichermaßen. 

Die Max Klat Maschinentechnik GmbH ist heute ein kompetenter Partner bei all Ihren Anliegen rund um die Bosch Kartoniermaschinen .

Name: Forbidden Mechanical
Description:
Forbidden Mechanical, a Meraki company, is Vancouver Island's premier destination for heavy duty repair and parts. Specializing in commercial vehicle repair, we offer 24/7 mobile assistance and a comprehensive range of solutions, encompassing maintenance, inspections, and part procurement.

Founded in 2017 in the Comox Valley, the company's commitment to filling a service gap in the local industry has led to rapid growth, boasting a dedicated team of 30 professionals.

Forbidden Mechanical is pleased to also be the local Traction Heavy Duty Parts store. As a recognized and established brand, Traction has been the number one parts vendor for Canadians from coast to coast for over 50 years. Their knowledgeable and experienced Traction staff can source parts for all makes and models of heavy-duty diesel engines and equipment.

With a strong focus on customer satisfaction and a commitment to delivering honest and reliable service, Forbidden Mechanical ensures that customers get back on the road quickly and efficiently.

Name: Zaske Software & Technik GmbH
Description:
Wir sind ein DAkks akkreditiertes Unternehmen im Bereich der Koordinatenmesstechnik und bieten Service in Form von Kalibrierungen, Wartungen, Reparaturen sowie geometrischen Justagen von Koordinatenmessmaschinen an.

Unser Service-Portfolio beinhaltet Messmaschinen verschiedenster Hersteller z.B. COORD3, HEXAGON, etc.. 
Auch bieten wir Software und Hardware Modernisierungen von Koordinatenmessmaschinen.
Im Vertieb bieten wir neue Koordinatenmessmaschinen  des Herstellers COORD3.  
COORD3 hat seinen Hauptsitz in Bruzolo, Torino, Italien und fokussiert sich seit 1973 auf die Herstellung von 3D Messmaschinen. Die Kernkompetenz des Unternehmens war es seit jeher messtechnische Lösungen und hochqualitative Maschinen mit fortschrittlicher Software und Steuerung zu liefern. Heutzutage zählt COORD3 zu den italienischen Marktführern im KMG Bereich. 

Das andere Standbein unseres Unternehmens Zaske Software & Technik GmbH befindet sich in der Anwendungsentwicklung, Rechenzentrum, Anwendungshosting und Saas-Dienste für klinische Laboratorien

We are a DAkks accreditated company in the field of CMM metrology and offer services like calibrations, maintenance, repairs and geometric adjustments of measuring machines.
Our service portfolio includes measuring machines of various manufacturers e.g. COORD3, HEXAGON, etc.. 
We do also offer software and hardware retrofit's of any coordinate measuring machine.
In our distribution portfolio we do offer  COORD3.
COORD3 has its headquarters in Bruzolo, Torino, Italy and has been focusing on the production of 3D measuring machines since 1973. The company's core competence has always been to provide metrology solutions and high quality machines with advanced software and control. Nowadays COORD3 is one of the Italian market leaders in the CMM sector.  

The other part of our company offers application development, data center, application hosting and SaaS services for clinical laboratories.

Name: Ordinate
Description:
Ordinate is a staffing and workforce support company focused on delivering reliable, skilled, and job-ready talent to businesses that cannot afford hiring mistakes.

Founded by an experienced millwright and mechanical engineer, Ordinate was built on a simple principle: workforce problems are operational problems — and they require structured, practical solutions. Unlike traditional agencies that rely only on resumes, Ordinate pre-screens candidates based on real job requirements, hands-on experience, and work ethic.

We support companies across industrial, manufacturing, technical, healthcare, hospitality, and general labour sectors, offering full-time, contract, and temporary coverage for planned or urgent needs such as vacations, sick leave, shutdowns, and short-term gaps.

Ordinate focuses on quality over volume. Every candidate is personally reviewed to ensure technical capability, reliability, and alignment with the client’s environment. This approach reduces downtime, turnover, and training risk for employers.

Our goal is simple: bring order to hiring, place the right people, and help businesses operate without disruption.

Our hands-on approach ensures faster repairs, reduced downtime, and lower inventory costs by implementing tailored solutions for spare parts organization, workspace optimization, and real-time digital tracking. With a team experienced in industrial engineering, lean manufacturing, and digital transformation, we deliver measurable results that improve operational efficiency and save our clients time and money.

Ordinate – Creating order from chaos in maintenance departments and driving operational excellence.
